Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Tristan Rader
subject: Join Us for Tristan Rader's Swearing-In Ceremony on January 1st!
body:
Celebrate with us as Tristan Rader takes office as State Representative for Ohio's 13th District | | | |
---
| | | **You are cordially invited to
State Representative-Elect Rader's
Swearing-In Ceremony**
---
|
---
| Dear , We are delighted to invite you to the swearing-in ceremony of Tristan Rader as State Representative for Ohio's 13th House District. This significant event will take place on January 1, 2025, at 1:00 PM at the home of Mike and Chris Foley in Lakewood, Ohio. Light refreshments and drinks will be provided as we commemorate this milestone together. **Event Details:**
* **Date:** January 1, 2025
* **Time:** 1:00 PM
* **Location:** Home of Mike and Chris Foley
* 1026 Wilbert Ave, Lakewood, Ohio

We look forward to celebrating this significant milestone with you. Please RSVP via [Facebook](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=a080c52d82&e=869bcf0641) or [ACT Blue](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=13c8eb8922&e=869bcf0641) if you'd like to give to the event. Donation not required to attend.

name: Royce White
subject: All I want for Christmas is your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
And to become the first Black Senator from Minnesota
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=e369c64790b54dc894ec9ef8a89cb1fe&_e=JOMzQgGz_OiEKELfGLyEexLeIxexhtuBEKyKmrdxu0nytN0qQTPCguaSKM45dKNQ0gs8PzE6WSbVXWWWxzUSZgNSPXFSvNlsy06B1RfxGDkVOc5FTyL4v5xpywm4u9zmbILUzan4VPFC3CoKaFBLBFSBz6lQ3Lgy4UVxmmT7vzZ9MLb5DrvfsPbr5i13r73NS7w7KH9-045N4obNU6f0LUDjNaqRm5jVKkrDBVfcmvMzIjBVCWbWG3SAal40As_cD34OyGi-oZwgxbzMngIYB5vrXo5JW_ydZ0xNBBES6SL0k8csmpi2Ni3Llr7xCHqu4co7EWSk7umFnM8HeIUZQA%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

**This Christmas season, the only thing I want is your support. I 'm running for Senate in Minnesota to become the state's FIRST Republican Black Senator.**

[**Can you chip in $15 to help my America-First campaign?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=e369c64790b54dc894ec9ef8a89cb1fe&_e=JOMzQgGz_OiEKELfGLyEexLeIxexhtuBEKyKmrdxu0nytN0qQTPCguaSKM45dKNQ0gs8PzE6WSbVXWWWxzUSZgNSPXFSvNlsy06B1RfxGDkVOc5FTyL4v5xpywm4u9zmbILUzan4VPFC3CoKaFBLBFSBz6lQ3Lgy4UVxmmT7vzZ9MLb5DrvfsPbr5i13r73NnQhFOeaubjCaivRSfFdEWuH97RWJu1K8EZzS-SWJ6EB52EDGvdOdjpm8OGHsZALhM9b-9bU5ylgoQz_NBv0MUsV554YKkKDmFK4Rs21mDY7hAVyTdWQQjq1sVlWONKDvRfCi5kcXNyzI6JngRXIuzg%3D%3D)

Tina Smith, my radical opponent, already has MILLIONS of dollars in her election warchest. On top of that, she has the FULL support of the Industrial Media Complex and Radical Left Machine.

This fight is going to be like Lehigh vs. the superteam Duke led by Coach K. We're the underdogs, but on any given night, we can win.

[**So, while you 're preparing to spend the holidays with your family, I'm humbly asking you to donate just $15 to my MAGA campaign for Senate.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=e369c64790b54dc894ec9ef8a89cb1fe&_e=JOMzQgGz_OiEKELfGLyEexLeIxexhtuBEKyKmrdxu0nytN0qQTPCguaSKM45dKNQ0gs8PzE6WSbVXWWWxzUSZgNSPXFSvNlsy06B1RfxGDkVOc5FTyL4v5xpywm4u9zmbILUzan4VPFC3CoKaFBLBFSBz6lQ3Lgy4UVxmmT7vzZ9MLb5DrvfsPbr5i13r73NQTEkO0bJD3ovZq35k1Q0NPzLANLnovPBjSTmUOsb1UebFwP-6dbtouxm2zd0FED9uJ6UKqF0ohwqWjtx6lkoZYpuId1I_EwyOX3D-KaCKmzPqBrtWo4pqvJNSiGvBD7dIIokDSDZohAxSklhqug-XA%3D%3D)

Let's pull off the nation's biggest upset on Election Night in 2026 and give President Trump one more MAGA Patriot in the Senate to support his America-First Agenda.

Merry Christmas,
Royce White

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=e369c64790b54dc894ec9ef8a89cb1fe&_e=JOMzQgGz_OiEKELfGLyEexLeIxexhtuBEKyKmrdxu0nytN0qQTPCguaSKM45dKNQ0gs8PzE6WSbVXWWWxzUSZgNSPXFSvNlsy06B1RfxGDkVOc5FTyL4v5xpywm4u9zmbILUzan4VPFC3CoKaFBLBFSBz6lQ3Lgy4UVxmmT7vzZ9MLb5DrvfsPbr5i13r73N-TdtdRPjD6XedavK1p0qUIBxl0UT3BU1pmAKTEBxSEo8CPPyRcAk5nv2dYUTLYN3L54uWwfM61izHMovq5T2FXSh3PLWv7mcKPczD4FGNfO_Xmrd-0BZ36P3k4yx1uiov3ySx7Vqe-N4cFBIZ70hog%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

name: DNC HQ
subject: Please don’t scroll past this one-minute read...
body:
It’s Sunday, December 15.
---
️☀️️To all Democrats: 🇺🇸 ️Please don’t scroll past this one-minute read. ️It’s Sunday, December 15. In a few weeks, Trump will be sworn in as our next president — with a Republican Congress to do his bidding.
We have to be prepared for _anything_ coming our way — from destructive legislation and executive orders to Republican attempts to weaken our democracy. And we have to be prepared on day one.
But the truth is that less than 1 percent of the people receiving these messages pitch in. We’re counting on all Democrats who know how important this moment is to step up right now.
[**If fighting back against Trump and electing Democrats at all levels of government matters to you, then we’re asking you to pitch in $3 before tonight's mid-month deadline to help us be the strong Democratic Party we need. If you’re undecided, please remember any contribution makes an impact right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241215_2398_fr&refcode2=2398_22930333_zVyJhX&akid=2398%2E22930333%2EzVyJhX) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241215_2398_fr&refcode2=2398_22930333_zVyJhX&akid=2398%2E22930333%2EzVyJhX)**

clean_body: It’s Sunday, December 15. ️☀️️To all Democrats: 🇺🇸 ️Please don’t scroll past this one-minute read. ️It’s Sunday, December 15. In a few weeks, Trump will be sworn in as our next president — with a Republican Congress to do his bidding. We have to be prepared for anything coming our way — from destructive legislation and executive orders to Republican attempts to weaken our democracy. And we have to be prepared on day one. But the truth is that less than 1 percent of the people receiving these messages pitch in. We’re counting on all Democrats who know how important this moment is to step up right now. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for standing with us. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Justice for All? Or just some?
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBq/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – History was made. President Trump’s overwhelming victory proves one thing: the American people are ready for **bold leadership** and **fearless action**.
But there’s a dark cloud that we cannot ignore.
**The men and women who stood up on January 6th, 2021, have been targeted relentlessly by a corrupt system desperate to crush their voices.**
These patriots deserve our gratitude—not persecution.
**__[That’s why I’m demanding immediate action: a full pardon for every American wrongfully prosecuted for standing up for what they believed in.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBq/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBq/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
These aren’t criminals—they’re **citizens**. **Fathers**. **Mothers**. **Veterans**. **Neighbors**. _**The very fabric of our great nation.**_
They gathered at the Capitol to exercise their rights, **_and now they need us to exercise ours_**.
This is more than a petition— _**_[it’s a fight for our freedom](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBq/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**_. A fight against a government that thinks it can silence you.

What was done to those brave men & women on that day proves one thing:
The Deep State doesn’t just want to silence you... **They want to erase you**. They want to watch you sit in prison, and smear anybody who would stand up to them over it.
I won’t be silenced, and I will _**never**_ stop fighting for what’s right. I’m reaching out to you, Friend, because I know... _**you feel the same**_.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBq/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_For Freedom_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBq/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9EBq/?__vbtrk=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1Mzc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| |
---

If you do not wish to receive future emails from me, please [click here](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=265378&trkid=562634602&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Voter Action Project NC
subject: These restrictions don't belong in a state constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
This is simple -- voter suppression bills can be repealed . Voter suppression amendments in constitutions are much harder to get rid of.
That's why opponents of voting rights in North Carolina want this suppressive ID requirement in their constitution: It would codify their power and their voter suppression for years, if not decades, regardless of who wins elections.
Dirty tricks and bad faith tactics are just the beginning of what we'll see over the next few years, Team. RUSH $25 or more right now to help us fight on the ground in North Carolina and elsewhere nationwide to protect our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121524_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121524_2&amount=25]
NC Newsline: Proposed constitutional amendment to require photo ID for mail voting passes legislature [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121524_2&amount=25]
No beating around the bush on this one, Team: Opponents of voting rights in the state legislature have approved a proposed constitutional amendment that asks North Carolinians to approve photo ID for those voting by mail. It only needs a majority vote in the 2026 general election to be added to the state constitution.
Current North Carolina law already requires ID for all forms of voting, so a voter has previously supplied their ID to register. But opponents of voting rights in North Carolina are worried about their suppressive laws being overturned when the new governor takes office next year, so they're looking to put voter suppression directly in their state constitution, where it will be harder to remove.
North Carolina's voter suppression laws -- dating back to 2018 -- are still being challenged in the courts. But we need to start talking to voters now about this constitutional amendment that they'll be voting on so that everyone knows what's at stake.
This is just the beginning, and in North Carolina and beyond, opponents of voting rights are gearing up to make voting harder. Fuel our efforts to protect and expand the right to vote with $25 or whatever you can right today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121524_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121524_2&amount=25]

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I went into the belly of the beast…
body:
Following our historic Republican victory.
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5206a1135f014a7ba1e764c0bac91769&_e=pAwWt5afnZp64Fcng-fGyYqYwNvu16GQi0hQfS8lLQ-VypptGr32CsVma1jXxqzYqs-b94upoSYJQwOC_l9iz-mL1MluLtEFFlHwvDN1xuv5K0G47uE8Gcli6RsL32G_R_mi4Y6VRjcjZQRL-Cd_RUtun-9DYdqXkOOxcLl91UOcnrOnntn6yKk9deELA7agRWb9j73tOvtlFC0ZT_n90SHZqckFsd7fYbonPxYTNsEq31O7mdr1fd2jmxYYfYEUHqWCTrp_FN0Cm0Dm3adtk20z4qEOJ4dOR6tZftmlJaiLb76qKOxNdDohjX-kIcTDMRTaUEBTJkcJ2eit0nW1SkA_AVFjNo0UYuuOzg3dCTj8awq57a4v9TiwIwMStVHSMxSiRw0O8H8kG58vxKW0bJ_BLHs9NGYMaypU7INBv6U%3D)
---
Peter,
---
By sending President Trump back to the White House, flipping the Senate, and defending our House majority, voters like you delivered a clear message:
---
You asked us to clean house in Washington so that __your__ government would once again work for __you__ – the _PEOPLE_.
---
But there are those on the Left who – despite such a historic mandate from voters – would still have you believe that putting our country and _American_ citizens first is “extreme.”
---
**_That’s why I marched right into the belly of the beast on _CNN_ following the election to combat their lies and false narratives about voters like you, Peter._**
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5206a1135f014a7ba1e764c0bac91769&_e=pAwWt5afnZp64Fcng-fGyYqYwNvu16GQi0hQfS8lLQ-VypptGr32CsVma1jXxqzYqs-b94upoSYJQwOC_l9iz-mL1MluLtEFFlHwvDN1xuv5K0G47uE8Gcli6RsL32G_R_mi4Y6VRjcjZQRL-Cd_RUtun-9DYdqXkOOxcLl91UOcnrOnntn6yKk9deELA7agRWb9j73tOvtlFC0ZT_n90SHZqckFsd7fYbonPxYTNsEq31O7mdr1fd2jmxYYfYEUHqWCTrp_FN0Cm0Dm3adtk0ehvJVmi1Axn1opzwkQxrWBeaEqBA6mOGwhu9R0vEyX8JX3rqtLAcbwvfJ7AAqKJtgkcX9ny-qWtS3Stv79V8WNia7AzcRi_bE1q61tbQgXe9nRZZwwsiN1Yr6-Hu82azXE9V3mjozvcW7yd63vj1M%3D)
---
_I went on air to PROVE that the American people demanded change – and that no matter how hard they might try, the Democrats cannot deny the voice of the people._
---
But to fully prosecute my case against the Left’s continued lies and smears, I’m counting on grassroots Americans like you to share YOUR top priorities as we prepare to fight for you on _DAY_ _ONE_ of the new Congress.
---
[**So please, take the People’s Agenda Survey as your Republican elected officials come together to put America on track for a bright new future.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5206a1135f014a7ba1e764c0bac91769&_e=pAwWt5afnZp64Fcng-fGyYqYwNvu16GQi0hQfS8lLQ-VypptGr32CsVma1jXxqzYqs-b94upoSYJQwOC_l9iz-mL1MluLtEFFlHwvDN1xuv5K0G47uE8Gcli6RsL32G_R_mi4Y6VRjcjZQRL-Cd_RUtun-9DYdqXkOOxcLl91UOcnrOnntn6yKk9deELA7agRWb9j73tOvtlFC0ZT_n90SHZqckFsd7fYbonPxYTNsEq31O7mdr1fd2jmxYYfYEUHqWCTrp_FN0Cm0Dm3adtk_tKiiGC4lp8cAUICsXMubDoHBcx-wu_AlRDCdhQ159mBWnd1NHgiFhtqI9j63VxvUbfnyWajfX9jqQLnBE-tZQAK4i1-yvNMtVp7hiIQMIUrKdgjjhC6aIyu0aIx6BEe4T2DuSwYnfL_cRaUzJD5mk%3D)
---

[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5206a1135f014a7ba1e764c0bac91769&_e=pAwWt5afnZp64Fcng-fGyYqYwNvu16GQi0hQfS8lLQ-VypptGr32CsVma1jXxqzYqs-b94upoSYJQwOC_l9iz-mL1MluLtEFFlHwvDN1xuv5K0G47uE8Gcli6RsL32G_R_mi4Y6VRjcjZQRL-Cd_RUtun-9DYdqXkOOxcLl91UOcnrOnntn6yKk9deELA7agRWb9j73tOvtlFC0ZT_n90SHZqckFsd7fYbonPxYTNsEq31O7mdr1fd2jmxYYfYEUHqWCTrp_FN0Cm0Dm3adtk0qNB2A_Gf5y2s4bhTwDL4UVeFu86ojf6YQMuAPq32iEDG-FmBhNipaao14g8gWV9W1G8t-E8gTOyWRKy3Mpa2MrX9tIkvKgH8d0aYqOVlltJf1NwyTLryjG2slfEdUYjxE08-mEF2IO6aC-jFrFB_A%3D)

Thank you – and let’s get to work and save our country.
---

clean_body: Following our historic Republican victory. | Peter, By sending President Trump back to the White House, flipping the Senate, and defending our House majority, voters like you delivered a clear message: You asked us to clean house in Washington so that your government would once again work for you – the PEOPLE. But there are those on the Left who – despite such a historic mandate from voters – would still have you believe that putting our country and American citizens first is “extreme.” That’s why I marched right into the belly of the beast on CNN following the election to combat their lies and false narratives about voters like you, Peter. I went on air to PROVE that the American people demanded change – and that no matter how hard they might try, the Democrats cannot deny the voice of the people. But to fully prosecute my case against the Left’s continued lies and smears, I’m counting on grassroots Americans like you to share YOUR top priorities as we prepare to fight for you on DAY ONE of the new Congress. Thank you – and let’s get to work and save our country. Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040 |

body:
King Donald Trump?!
| **_LOOK, DESPITE_** us warning you that Donald Trump pledges to be a DICTATOR on Day One in office...

** _DESPITE_** the MAGA Supreme Court giving Trump FULL immunity from his crimes...

** _AND DESPITE_** Democrats’ new bill being our ONLY HOPE of stopping Trump from becoming a king...

** _Only 5 Democrats in your state have signed our petition to pass the No Kings Act and REVERSE the immunity ruling!_** **[This is our LAST chance to fight back before the GOP trifecta takes control in just weeks: Add your signature by MIDNIGHT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241215_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18229%2E878179%2E2d42fW)** | [**SIGN NOW: DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241215_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18229%2E878179%2E2d42fW)

Thank you. With so much at stake, your support makes ALL the difference in pressuring Congress to act!

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: URGENT: DeSantis escalates MAGA agenda - help us fight back!!!!!!
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

| | | Peter, It’s the final countdown to Christmas and the New Year! Are you ready? It seems like no matter how much I prepare, there is always one more thing on my list. It appears that President Biden has a few more things on his list, too—most notably, a list of pardons. One name that stands out above the others is Dr. Fauci! **Unbelievable**! The world suffered irreparable harm under Fauci’s guidance, and instead of offering us accountability or justice, Biden is considering a preemptive pardon. Also troubling is President-Elect Trump’s recent pick for Surgeon General, Dr. Janette Nesheiwat. Dr. Nesheiwat is on record referring to the COVID vaccine as a “gift from God” and praising Mark Zuckerberg for censoring Facebook commenters who spread “misinformation” about the vax. **And here in Texas, we still have our own battles to fight**. In the race for House Speaker, Rep. Dustin Burrows is dishonestly trying to gain ground. For TFVC, his authoring of a bill granting the state sweeping pandemic emergency authority, including commandeering private property and diverting public funds, makes him a persona non grata. It is clear that too many lawmakers and powerful bureaucrats are unwilling to accept the hard truth - the vaccine industry is corrupt, and safety studies are inherently unreliable. All of these issues point to one solution— _Never back down_!
---
| |
---

| Rebecca Hardy

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 12/15/2024
body:
2025 is the 'Year of the School Board' in order to defend school choice in Colorado
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s5m6f4d424d)
---
**December 15, 2024** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear Readers,
The battle for school choice in Colorado is heating up, and the stakes have never been higher. Two recent school board decisions—[one in Douglas County](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s9k9012f4a9) and another in Montrose—underscore the urgent need to defend educational freedom and advocate for parental empowerment in shaping our children’s futures.

In Douglas County, the narrow approval to release the John Adams Academy charter school to seek state authorization marked a [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sen5500810e)[hard-fought victory for school choice](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s8l690f215e). This decision, driven by conservative board members, highlights the growing demand for diverse educational options, especially in communities like Sterling Ranch that are experiencing rapid growth.

Meanwhile, the Montrose County School District dealt a significant blow to the movement by rejecting the charter application for Montrose Classical Academy. Despite strong community support and a classical curriculum aimed at fostering academic excellence, the board cited numerous concerns, ranging from facility plans to serving special populations. However, proponents remain steadfast, vowing to continue their fight for educational opportunities in Montrose County.

These decisions reflect a broader struggle across Colorado and the nation to protect the principle of school choice. As Charlie Kirk passionately declared during his speech on Saturday night here in Colorado at the Ladies for Liberty event, 2025 is the **YEAR OF THE SCHOOL BOARD**. The future of our schools—and, by extension, our communities—will be shaped by who we elect to these critical positions. It’s time for all of us to get involved, whether by running for a seat, supporting candidates who stand for choice, or holding current board members accountable.

Together, we can make 2025 the year we reclaim education for students, parents, and communities.

In liberty and truth, Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[U.S. Rep. Jeff Hurd ready to get to work on border security, immigration in Congress](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s1k0b708d44)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s5h53dbf3a7)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/scp6b6a96e3) Since the moment Jeff Hurd was declared the winner of Colorado’s 3rd District election to the U.S. House, he has been working on putting a finer point on the details of the campaign promises to the people in Southern and Western Colorado who elected him.

**[‘If you want the truth, seek the truth’: Mesa Co. Clerk Gross responds to article allegations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/seq1e5547f7)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s4jbd2a5a05)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sdl2c39b5f8) Tina Peters, the former Mesa County Clerk and a Gold Star mother with a clean prior record, has now served two months of a nine-year prison sentence. She was found guilty on seven charges related to the unlawful access she granted to the county’s election system.

**[Hegseth, Trump’s Sec. of Defense pick, is ‘good man, committed to America’, U.S. Rep.-elect Crank says](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s7l5e005e8a)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sfib0fc6c11) While half of the eight Coloradans in the U.S. House are Republican, when it comes down to a vote on confirming President Donald J. Trump’s nominees, it is unlikely anyone can depend on one from Colorado senators.

|
---
**STATE**
**[‘There are still a lot of unanswered questions’: Clerks react to investigative report on BIOS password exposure](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/scgffded562)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s4rf06ca745) A report detailing the findings of an investigation into the activities of the Colorado secretary of state’s office during the public exposure of BIOS passwords, in the days leading up to the 2024 election, was released Monday.

**[House Republicans announce committee assignments for 75th state legislative session](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s4l40f7f45f)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s2t6d2d19b4) A bench of Republicans offering diverse skill, experience and conservative values will serve Coloradans in the 75th session of the Colorado General Assembly, Minority Leader Rose Pugliese said Wednesday as she announced the party’s committee assignments.
**[State Rep. Brandi Bradley is fundraising, but this time to spread Christmas cheer](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s9m94216635)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s4ib968c32e)[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sfk99b7792c)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sfg5539d8e1) It’s a scene no parent wants to imagine: children sleeping on floors, wearing shoes three sizes too small or going without a warm coat during the winter. Yet, for hundreds of children in Douglas County, this is a stark reality.
**[Colorado Gov. Jared Polis criticized for blaming wolf reintroduction program costs on ranchers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s3gc132f23c)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/scj61f1ee61)****[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/seo4a9ea086)**[COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s7l75d31f84) Gov. Jared Polis is facing backlash for comments he made during the winter conference of Colorado counties, when he blamed ranchers for the cost of the wolf reintroduction program this year.

**[Colorado to expand health care to illegals, leading to $17 million expense overage](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s1n4518d2d7)** [DENVER7](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sbi37c6dec1) A Colorado program launching on Jan. 1 will provide health care coverage to thousands of undocumented immigrants who currently lack it. The program, known as Cover All Coloradans, will expand Medicaid coverage to low-income pregnant women and children regardless of their immigration status.
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s7oee8d74e3)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Chinese Balloon 2.0: Biden White House dismisses mystery drone sightings, suggests mistaken identity](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s8qfe9f218f)** [BREITBART](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s7m527b1470) The Biden administration has dismissed the recent wave of drone sightings on the East Coast, suggesting that most reports are likely cases of mistaken identity involving legally-operating aircraft.
**[ABC news to apologize, pay $16 million in defamation suit settlement with Donald Trump](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s3j5bf32dc9)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s3l81276704)**[NATIONAL REVIEW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/scl454c3616) ABC News and anchor George Stephanopoulos have reached a settlement in a defamation suit brought by President-elect Donald Trump, which requires the network to apologize, contribute $15 million to a “Presidential foundation and museum to be established by or for Plaintiff,” and pay Trump’s legal team $1 million.

**[Congress is ramming through a $895 billion pork-filled defense bill before Trump takes office](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s9i660259e5)** [THE FEDERALIST](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/semef0782ca) Clocking in at 1,813 pages, the 2025 NDAA is stuffed with items unrelated to defense policy and void of conservative priorities. Congressional leaders are gearing up to ram through a $895 billion pork-filled defense bill before President-elect Donald Trump is sworn into office next month.
**[Donald Trump rings NYSE Bell as he’s named TIME Magazine’s ‘Person of the Year’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sape38d0cd2)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sfn9109aafe)**[BREITBART](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s1r6360a15a) President-elect Donald Trump just can’t stop winning. On Thursday he rang the opening bell of the New York Stock Exchange as he was confirmed TIME Magazine’s “Person of the Year” and was met by cheers and applause from the trading floor as well as cries of “USA... USA.”

**[How Pete Hegseth turned his Secretary of Defense confirmation fight around in 7 days](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s6jfa250f12)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s8o32f58661)**[BREITBART](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s2l1307ccf8) Just one week ago, Trump Defense Secretary nominee Pete Hegseth’s confirmation appeared doomed after a barrage of hit pieces. However, after launching an intense campaign to defend himself, he now appears to be on a path towards confirmation.

**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/saqf7e1261f)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Grand Junction’s 7th Street plan may have city on course for head-on collision with constituents](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s5lbe395b67)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s1l9d4dec95)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sarc02d287b) As Grand Junction unveils its proposal to make major changes to 7th Street — citing safety for pedestrians and bicyclists — more than 200 people attended a meeting of City Council in person or virtually last week with about two-thirds of them vehemently opposed to the direction City Council seems determined to pursue.

**[Illegal immigrants straining education and healthcare, Common Sense report finds](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s1sed418f68)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sao411a2383)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/scjbc9f967d) Illegal immigrants have targeted Denver as a key destination since late 2022. The rate of new arrivals may have decreased in 2024, but the fiscal impact on the city’s finances, schools and healthcare systems has not.

**[Modern-day cattle rustlers? In Western Colorado, authorities want to know what happened to 200 head of cattle](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/scje50e5b1f)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s0gcada8535)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s7o58d1292e) Although cattle rustlers are no longer hung in the state of Colorado, the penalty is still pretty high for people who are convicted of stealing cattle. Yet, in Western Colorado, in a story that sounds as if it came right out of John Dutton’s Yellowstone, about 200 head of mostly this year’s calves appear to have been stolen in a major financial loss to ranchers.
**[Downtown Denver set for $570M tax-funded investment in housing, jobs, culture, parks, mobility](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s3i4b17c1f1)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/scp30f9823e)**[DENVERITE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/seu54133ac4) The Downtown Development Authority is set to revamp the central city with hundreds of millions of dollars in spending. The authority previously funded the revitalization of Union Station and the surrounding area.

**[Central to Colorado Springs’ hate crime hoax case, Derrick Bernard had lengthy record in home state](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sfta674acc3)** [COLORADO SPRINGS GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s1m422a03ab) Derrick Patrick Bernard is the figure at the center of a federal indictment and political dust-up involving an alleged hate crime hoax in the closing days of the 2023 Colorado Springs mayoral election.
**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s8od32f7406)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Gaines: Recalling drones of our own in Eastern Colorado and a ‘nothing to see here’ response](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s2j68957c81)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sane3bbe9bb)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s2j88123eb4) _Maintaining a healthy skepticism can be a challenge. So many things these days are there to monetize your attention, and all too often the people generating the eye-catching content on social media (and sometimes in regular media) are none too picky about grabbing you without exaggerating or, sadly, making things up._
__
**[Hindawi: If American media will chill, Syria can be made great again](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s4qc33f04c9)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s7v4eabf82d)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s8h420f0ad3) _Every time I scan American news outlets, especially the right-wing ones featuring the latest news on Syria, I get split between laughing or crying because of their outrageous panic about the future of Syria’s minorities._ __
**[Lundberg: More light needs to be shed on Griswoldgate, despite ‘move along’ spin](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s3r94615709)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s9l9d14816b)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sfqda8a740e) _Nothing to see here, move along, move along..._ _This week it was widely reported that a “third party” investigation concluded Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold’s public posting of hundreds of passwords for months on her official website was inadvertent and therefore no harm was done._
__
**[Sloan: Is the end of Assad the end of Obama foreign policy?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s0p7c887799)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/scp29a7cf7b)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/s2r7f51ad29) _Few tears, if any, will be shed for the demise of the Assad regime in Syria, save perhaps a few in Moscow and Tehran._ _The rapid success of the Syrian rebels last weekend took most everyone by surprise, not just the Biden administration to whom any world event not thoroughly discoursed upon The View or plastered on the front page of the New York Times apparently comes as a surprise._
__
**[Heatherly& Lundberg: It is time to downsize the Administrative State in Colorado, too](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sbp48b3fb08)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/ser66c4d606)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sei6b5e0479) _It’s not news that America’s $6 trillion federal Administrative State is targeted for radical downsizing by President Donald J. Trump. What is also not news is that Colorado’s progressives will oppose most of the President’s policies and probably think that Colorado can escape the oncoming Trump deregulation bulldozer._ __
_**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-K-A/sbg181240ee)**_

clean_body: 2025 is the 'Year of the School Board' in order to defend school choice in Colorado | | | | December 15, 2024 SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST By Heidi Ganahl | | Dear Readers, The battle for school choice in Colorado is heating up, and the stakes have never been higher. Two recent school board decisions— and another in Montrose—underscore the urgent need to defend educational freedom and advocate for parental empowerment in shaping our children’s futures. In Douglas County, the narrow approval to release the John Adams Academy charter school to seek state authorization marked a . This decision, driven by conservative board members, highlights the growing demand for diverse educational options, especially in communities like Sterling Ranch that are experiencing rapid growth. Meanwhile, the Montrose County School District dealt a significant blow to the movement by rejecting the charter application for Montrose Classical Academy. Despite strong community support and a classical curriculum aimed at fostering academic excellence, the board cited numerous concerns, ranging from facility plans to serving special populations. However, proponents remain steadfast, vowing to continue their fight for educational opportunities in Montrose County. These decisions reflect a broader struggle across Colorado and the nation to protect the principle of school choice. As Charlie Kirk passionately declared during his speech on Saturday night here in Colorado at the Ladies for Liberty event, 2025 is the YEAR OF THE SCHOOL BOARD. The future of our schools—and, by extension, our communities—will be shaped by who we elect to these critical positions. It’s time for all of us to get involved, whether by running for a seat, supporting candidates who stand for choice, or holding current board members accountable. Together, we can make 2025 the year we reclaim education for students, parents, and communities. In liberty and truth, Heidi Ganahl | | | TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK Since the moment Jeff Hurd was declared the winner of Colorado’s 3rd District election to the U.S. House, he has been working on putting a finer point on the details of the campaign promises to the people in Southern and Western Colorado who elected him. Tina Peters, the former Mesa County Clerk and a Gold Star mother with a clean prior record, has now served two months of a nine-year prison sentence. She was found guilty on seven charges related to the unlawful access she granted to the county’s election system. While half of the eight Coloradans in the U.S. House are Republican, when it comes down to a vote on confirming President Donald J. Trump’s nominees, it is unlikely anyone can depend on one from Colorado senators. | STATE A report detailing the findings of an investigation into the activities of the Colorado secretary of state’s office during the public exposure of BIOS passwords, in the days leading up to the 2024 election, was released Monday. A bench of Republicans offering diverse skill, experience and conservative values will serve Coloradans in the 75th session of the Colorado General Assembly, Minority Leader Rose Pugliese said Wednesday as she announced the party’s committee assignments. It’s a scene no parent wants to imagine: children sleeping on floors, wearing shoes three sizes too small or going without a warm coat during the winter. Yet, for hundreds of children in Douglas County, this is a stark reality. Gov. Jared Polis is facing backlash for comments he made during the winter conference of Colorado counties, when he blamed ranchers for the cost of the wolf reintroduction program this year. A Colorado program launching on Jan. 1 will provide health care coverage to thousands of undocumented immigrants who currently lack it. The program, known as Cover All Coloradans, will expand Medicaid coverage to low-income pregnant women and children regardless of their immigration status. | NATIONAL The Biden administration has dismissed the recent wave of drone sightings on the East Coast, suggesting that most reports are likely cases of mistaken identity involving legally-operating aircraft. ABC News and anchor George Stephanopoulos have reached a settlement in a defamation suit brought by President-elect Donald Trump, which requires the network to apologize, contribute $15 million to a “Presidential foundation and museum to be established by or for Plaintiff,” and pay Trump’s legal team $1 million. Clocking in at 1,813 pages, the 2025 NDAA is stuffed with items unrelated to defense policy and void of conservative priorities. Congressional leaders are gearing up to ram through a $895 billion pork-filled defense bill before President-elect Donald Trump is sworn into office next month. President-elect Donald Trump just can’t stop winning. On Thursday he rang the opening bell of the New York Stock Exchange as he was confirmed TIME Magazine’s “Person of the Year” and was met by cheers and applause from the trading floor as well as cries of “USA... name: Spanberger for Governor HQ
subject: a total toss up in the VA Governor’s race
disclaimer_text: paid for by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22634%2E4449941%2EBZQpUU)
---
**Team, it’s official: The Cook Political Report is calling the Virginia Governor’s race next year a TOTAL TOSS-UP:** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57845?t=7&akid=22634%2E4449941%2EBZQpUU) | [SUPPORT ABIGAIL AND FIGHT FOR REFORM »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57845?t=8&akid=22634%2E4449941%2EBZQpUU)
---
We’ve been saying this for months now, but it’s true: the Virginia Governor’s race is set to be the most competitive statewide race in the country in 2025. We saw what happened here in Virginia and across the country on November 5 – Trump and Republicans made gains in places Democrats led in 2020.

This race is going to draw national attention, and with that comes outside money. We know Republicans are going to pour millions of dollars into this race in order to keep the Governor’s seat red, but Abigail Spanberger knows how to win competitive and tough races, and we know she has what it takes to flip this seat blue.

But we can’t be complacent – we need to build up our infrastructure and prepare now [**So, can we count on you to contribute to Fight for Reform to help elect state and local Democrats and Abigail’s campaign today to make sure she has what she needs to win this TOSS ‐UP seat?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57845?t=9&akid=22634%2E4449941%2EBZQpUU)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Abigail Spanberger will go through immediately:

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57845?t=14&akid=22634%2E4449941%2EBZQpUU)
Thank you,

Spanberger for Governor HQ
Abigail Spanberger is only asking for contributions of up to $5,000 from individuals, federal PACs, and other federally permissible sources for End Citizens United-Nonfederal. Abigail Spanberger is not asking for contributions in excess of that amount or any contributions from corporations, unions, or other federally prohibited sources.

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: You understand the urgency of the situation
body:
Our nation is at a crossroads.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpkds9if6rubb7n1dn85dcv6578bribvbt4g69to_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgmcoj2chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlaa0q593c5ssa7mgojdib9ss8op6scb69k0ncb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgmcoj2chh2bs)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za76298bn291loaqeauj7vup3k6roff7cn5r0o4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgmcoj2chh2bs)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl7oedj1kumkb5aftm07jd6k2rhuea5sj9si9040_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgmcoj2chh2bs)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5f2d973ejjj98odml83u4em32t8jivt85mslhoo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshj6eor3cdim48d245p25oh4ctj62pj1cph64p324no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zos1fdeu6d9o7oo7a4b98gcitkugvccb9arbreug_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgmcoj2chh2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3rhcb5i7rvkholk3n7t0clmokmg90qdpvcm41mg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5j62pj2c9i649fg)

subject: Will you sign our Christmas Card for the Trump family?

body:
We need to send this off ASAP!

subject: Words matter. Procedures matter

I am running for Congress in 2026. I am hopeful that I will be on the ballot in 2025.

NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [Words matter. Procedures matter](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=153189489&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMTg5NDg5LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQzMjY4MDUsImV4cCI6MTczNjkxODgwNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._-EJCe-K11tciwThBl148I1uNwJ_L14Lp_hjcE6NEMA)
### I am running for Congress in 2026. I am hopeful that I will be on the ballot in 2025.
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Dec 16
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4a334326-c97e-4ae6-9496-f6ed9664fe65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I am running for Congress in New York's 21st Congressional District in 2026. I have filed my candidacy with the Federal Election Commission (FEC). I ran in 2024. I remain hopeful that I will be the Democratic nominee on the ballot if we have a Special Election in 2025.
I am writing this because I am concerned. Some of my fellow Democrats are actively soliciting donations, stating that they are _**running**_ for Congress, when there is no indication that they have filed with the FEC.
On this date, December 16, 2024, there is no Special Election in NY-21. We will not have a Special Election in NY-21 until the current Representative resigns her seat and the Governor of the State of New York declares a Special Election. At that point, the 15 county chairs will convene and, through a weighted vote, designate a candidate for the ballot. There is a separate process for running as an Independent, complete with a very high bar of 3500 signatures collected over the course of about 12 days from registered voters who live within NY-21.
I can say that I am running for Congress since I have filed my bid for the 2026 election with the FEC. My compliance team also filed paperwork on my behalf in the event that there is an election in 2025. We are preparing. But we are still waiting.
I cannot yet say that I am _**running**_ for Congress in the Special Election, since there isn't one. I say that I am seeking the nomination for the ballot, or that I remain hopeful that the Democratic County Chairs will consider my Letter of Intent and Resume to become the party's nominee on the Special Election ballot.
Words matter. Procedures matter. Much of our frustration with the MAGA candidates centers around their use or abuse of words and procedures.
I know from experience that MAGA Republicans will nitpick FEC filings and engage in a process I have labeled election-by-litigation, in which a substantial portion of the race is battled out in administrative complaints and courts of law. I also know from experience that they will malign a candidate in the press sooner than it takes to say, "Democracy" -- or in my case, before the FEC even had time to to notify me of the need to amend a filing.
We don't want that for a candidate. We don't want that for our party.
By FEC rules, a candidate crosses the line from "testing the waters" (exploring a possible candidacy) into an obligation to file a Statement of Candidacy when they receive or spend more than $5,000. That threshold is exceeded by sending out a single text to a wide audience of recipients. It's America. It costs money just to raise money.
It isn't complicated to file with the FEC, but it has to be done, especially if someone is sending email messages and texts asking for contributions.
I welcome the other candidates who have indicated interest in running for Congress in NY-21. I do hope they will heed FEC rules. As a party, we need for our candidates to be in compliance.
Speaking of our Democratic party in NY-21, I'm thrilled to report that we are in a far different place from where we were in January 2024, when I first asked who was running to oppose Stefanik. At that point, only one candidate had filed, and that person had not held any campaign events nor had they contacted the county chairs.
We need candidates. Many state and local Republican incumbents on the November 2024 ballot ran unopposed because we simply did not have any Democrats willing to step forward.
My hope is that we will have more robust participation from New York North Country Democrats as we move into the second Trump administration. We need candidates to fill ballot lines up and down the ballot.
Now that I have filed with the FEC, my days are filled with phone calls, team meetings, and general planning. It has been great to attend several holiday celebrations with voters and friends. I'm meeting with two professional teams -- one for fundraising, digital outreach, and compliance, and the other for field operations. Building a campaign is a lot like building a business: with greater experience, there is a greater opportunity to strengthen the positives and correct the negatives.
For now, let's wait and watch. And if you are a candidate and you are serious about this Special Election, match your Letter of Intent and Resume that you sent to the county chairs with a fully-compliant FEC filing!
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _
[Pledge your support](https://substack..eVs8H1mVwngu2PgR247r6t1qBOZQg0an7fG40FcDKMA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153189489)

---

If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Paula Collins 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: 2025 is a critical year
body:
Our nation is at a crossroads.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq2m95m9jjks2nvqc79ie651pldnf0uqtc4ovsn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgm6o72cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi4ga5tc7epb9nv2aldkbrht2da67q24bqtsar40_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgm6o72cth2bs)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z98trsfser456o56v81m3toccttuuame79h3h9sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgm6o72cth2bs)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr0btp1lcunnrh6ajcdjdpkva5hvmj44cveafnh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgm6o72cth2bs)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm3j35o0nsnub8nv1komp3vj00jebil11a3voe10_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgm6o72cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpjm6or3c3h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zenda8u983isk60mvlgot6rttpv19c36njpsitc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgm6o72cth2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zje6rsif254dh22if64kl3pfj4vp50j6f65r95k0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5j62or0s9jm49fg)

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: You think this is the end of an era?
body:
Dear Friend, how are you today? I'm reaching out with a bold prediction--what do you think about this...

| | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=26aa9724b26541fc8e283d55cc86033f&_e=OnRMBuGwgl9rSZ9phtuW0VLXOlXnMzmu4OXM1o9sDMc57xnn4xFA7y2b5euH3SDia4rEKwsvpM6ZM9K6BeAmB09diugpxcIXcZjtymB7YwJ684snktWtxwv3tIEnxAOpnlFs5ZlAdsqvHjnCXXi2mKksfh9qGSy7FTXtUvTKLtr-dAmWjesm65rJ5jC4UqEs5zOm3F72nGpGt-QPdizllt0krq3FwEdqZ-HkoYilqWp_47LGJ2Cp_MB9Z4jI5HbYeIxfgqzqNWp4nWdb8vh7nBy4GF1Wa89EEcqETZljX2IMlN4185jk-nW4GbE19fieWWxskCfLg1cwh4_OaQPuxMEXuuVAyonscVHcrcKWt_ax-_bQag4dQtMF7n5Y6kf2ro0WB4UYeM3O-18nJjA-CA%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend, how are you today? I'm reaching out with a bold prediction--what do you think about this...

**Big media is over**.

It's the end of an era. And I can't say I'm sad to see it go.

But the death spiral of the legacy news media means that [I need YOUR urgent help to be forward-thinking during this news revolution.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=26aa9724b26541fc8e283d55cc86033f&_e=OnRMBuGwgl9rSZ9phtuW0VLXOlXnMzmu4OXM1o9sDMc57xnn4xFA7y2b5euH3SDia4rEKwsvpM6ZM9K6BeAmB09diugpxcIXcZjtymB7YwJ684snktWtxwv3tIEnxAOpnlFs5ZlAdsqvHjnCXXi2mKksfh9qGSy7FTXtUvTKLtr-dAmWjesm65rJ5jC4UqEs5zOm3F72nGpGt-QPdizllt0krq3FwEdqZ-HkoYilqWovbbjNl8UCjnqBaxMS4ZNO3dMUINlVE62BwLr9aoC52XYLNlRegGI-2wmoROpXGRIpGtF9MxAl7uF0F7uo6rrx5z5g8BwJF6m7kTlcEF03rRtd66Jk3v5fJbDI1BuO2d6DaJtTv8gsOYsYH8RjpwzUu1j_KcYKgyNZxrlSC51TCg%3D%3D)

I'll tell you more about how you can help in just a moment, but first, let me tell you why we need to act right away.

Next year, there's one thing we can absolutely expect...

Big media will continue to call for censorship of new media. And honestly, is that any surprise to you?

The ladies on _The View_ are already blaming the election results on X (formerly Twitter) and "misinformation." The _New York Times_ claims we're experiencing a "dark turn in democracy." Rachel Maddow cried on MSNBC about the dangers of Elon Musk and new media. Here's the thing--so-called "Big Media" has been corrupt and one-sided for a long, long time. In fact...

[**Hillsdale has led the fight against "Big media" for decades--with YOUR help!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=26aa9724b26541fc8e283d55cc86033f&_e=OnRMBuGwgl9rSZ9phtuW0VLXOlXnMzmu4OXM1o9sDMc57xnn4xFA7y2b5euH3SDia4rEKwsvpM6ZM9K6BeAmB09diugpxcIXcZjtymB7YwJ684snktWtxwv3tIEnxAOpnlFs5ZlAdsqvHjnCXXi2mKksfh9qGSy7FTXtUvTKLtr-dAmWjesm65rJ5jC4UqEs5zOm3F72nGpGt-QPdizllt0krq3FwEdqZ-HkoYilqWr464hbpCvlW92rrOJJBgOI9tn2gR0uRqm-EHsjiMMbruOM53my95oMDfxTdcMqaOYtTh6zVYjJE3xNjNpmcoNA0vek9-KCig5zpZZS0ElOVz3EMMgvuoC3ZTg-z_XxBNb8P6TakDE_hswmRKHLDRGkurjA1q6uetzCX9Jq59uPAQ%3D%3D)

_Imprimis_ --an important alternative to pervasive and pernicious far-Left narratives--first reached the mailboxes of a few thousand readers in 1972. Now, we fight against dangerous ideologies through our **free** online courses, **Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , and all our **outreach on social media**.

**And our outreach numbers in the millions --a far cry from the few thousand folks that received the first issue of _Imprimis_ back in '72!**

We've also partnered for decades with talk-radio shows and podcast hosts like Mark Levin, Tucker Carlson, and Charlie Kirk. We've also had the blessing to work with some of the best radio hosts in history--Rush Limbaugh and Paul Harvey--to promote the principles of liberty that Hillsdale staunchly defends.

**This has been some of our most important work. And it 's work we couldn't do without YOU.** You've especially been a big help to us during attacks from legacy media and censorship from Big Tech companies like Facebook.

Thank you so much!

Next year--as Big Media clings desperately to remain relevant--we can expect more attacks, so [I pray you'll continue to stand with us for TRUTH against Leftist dogmas.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=26aa9724b26541fc8e283d55cc86033f&_e=OnRMBuGwgl9rSZ9phtuW0VLXOlXnMzmu4OXM1o9sDMc57xnn4xFA7y2b5euH3SDia4rEKwsvpM6ZM9K6BeAmB09diugpxcIXcZjtymB7YwJ684snktWtxwv3tIEnxAOpnlFs5ZlAdsqvHjnCXXi2mKksfh9qGSy7FTXtUvTKLtr-dAmWjesm65rJ5jC4UqEs5zOm3F72nGpGt-QPdizllt0krq3FwEdqZ-HkoYilqWr9qayvAO367h4XGB23M3W6jCAs4DSLEXyhW7DyG66sjH2whEX8Rm3kmcmoaC7WICrgLiO_ZvbHhP6i39lWsHdp3yzPAWK8YqxYwU76O2DSODT7BjPYuSuZlTx1rk4Sml0dJAzRrzSsuqtH62c8ohiJhd_zjufFK1XgejFZ6yJ__g%3D%3D)

An important part of our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** will be confronting Big Media head-on. As more Americans begin turning off MSNBC and canceling their _New York Times_ subscriptions, with your generous gift today, you will provide...

* Free subscriptions to _Imprimis_ --our digest of liberty--featuring constitutional perspectives on contemporary problems, including immigration, the weaponization of government, and education.
* Podcasts including "The Larry Arnn Show," "Hillsdale Dialogues," and "Liberty and Learning with Mark Levin," all on **our Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , part of the "New Media" that more and more people--especially and including young people--are tuning in to.
* Free online courses on the Constitution, American history, Christianity, and Marxism--especially important as our audience for these courses begins to become younger and younger. We've got a great lineup of courses planned for 2025, by the way...
* Massive outreach on social media--including X (formerly known as Twitter)--where we often share our educational content, such as lectures from Hillsdale events, free online courses, informative surveys, and our learning videos.

**I hope you know we can only accomplish all of this with your help.**

[**Are you with us?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=26aa9724b26541fc8e283d55cc86033f&_e=OnRMBuGwgl9rSZ9phtuW0VLXOlXnMzmu4OXM1o9sDMc57xnn4xFA7y2b5euH3SDia4rEKwsvpM6ZM9K6BeAmB09diugpxcIXcZjtymB7YwJ684snktWtxwv3tIEnxAOpnlFs5ZlAdsqvHjnCXXi2mKksfh9qGSy7FTXtUvTKLtr-dAmWjesm65rJ5jC4UqEs5zOm3F72nGpGt-QPdizllt0krq3FwEdqZ-HkoYilqWrGtzD7PFbqmXm2hePrIuwHL-jHTRGXfjZkd4Q6CE_g7Dax9ClVNjRj5ugV8lI2EdS7W9ZXDRsXLM0UBnt8r_GNMjI47FjZbrhftVWm6I_Cmv7DGk7Bt8-chXVW_NcIoSYdvBHCJ7EH7MnKcNga_OAmOM7-gXbXCQvobCZjO1NctA%3D%3D)

This is an exciting time when we can do so much to restore liberty. Together, we will STOP Big Media LIES and propaganda and TEACH the American people the TRUTH about the principles underlying our Constitution.

To do so, we must expand these programs further than we ever have before--and that brings me to my last point...

I'm asking for your most generous year-end support for next year's **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

**If you haven 't renewed your support yet, can I count on you to please give your best tax-deductible year-end gift right away?**

**You can make your gift online, safely and securely, at this link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=26aa9724b26541fc8e283d55cc86033f&_e=OnRMBuGwgl9rSZ9phtuW0VLXOlXnMzmu4OXM1o9sDMc57xnn4xFA7y2b5euH3SDia4rEKwsvpM6ZM9K6BeAmB09diugpxcIXcZjtymB7YwJ684snktWtxwv3tIEnxAOpnlFs5ZlAdsqvHjnCXXi2mKksfh9qGSy7FTXtUvTKLtr-dAmWjesm65rJ5jC4UqEs5zOm3F72nGpGt-QPdizllt0krq3FwEdqZ-HkoYilqWqhZ2oKjZolfDTKROfeaDjxxXIS5jQZhMgfbp_2_H_SAJV4YmPLiVM7WXxO-APL9iQm0EVqxjbOwMFtqddzRuarKL72U8kbalRaltaLecjTPwiePB0rHNK6DTFFRsMvpN_xlSB1uDPpoGLBTtd3oxdlhEDfWzby0CYDq_BgKqV7kg%3D%3D)

And because we can count on the support of informed patriots like you, we'll continue to accomplish our goals without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT.

So please help us reach our $6,000,000 year-end online goal by **December 31** (that's only a few days away!).

Your gift of any size will help us restore liberty today, and secure liberty for the long term. After all, there is only one way to save liberty in America--EDUCATION.

Thank you for helping us meet this historic moment head-on--and for reading all the way to the end of this email! Really appreciate you,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** The era of Big Media is over. But next year, as legacy media attempts to cling to relevance, we can expect even more attacks. So I need your help to provide all our outreach, including _Imprimis_ , the Hillsdale College Podcast Network, and free online courses, to millions for FREE. Next year, we plan to expand our outreach to newer and younger audiences.

Thanks to the help of informed patriots like you, we remain on the vanguard of new media--standing up to the lies and propaganda of the legacy media with the TRUTH about the principles underlying our Constitution. This work will be even more important in 2025.

**That 's why I hope I can count on you today for a generous, tax-deductible gift to help us meet our $6,000,000 online funding goal--before December 31.** I've included your secure link to give right now here:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=26aa9724b26541fc8e283d55cc86033f&_e=OnRMBuGwgl9rSZ9phtuW0VLXOlXnMzmu4OXM1o9sDMc57xnn4xFA7y2b5euH3SDia4rEKwsvpM6ZM9K6BeAmB09diugpxcIXcZjtymB7YwJ684snktWtxwv3tIEnxAOpnlFs5ZlAdsqvHjnCXXi2mKksfh9qGSy7FTXtUvTKLtr-dAmWjesm65rJ5jC4UqEs5zOm3F72nGpGt-QPdizllt0krq3FwEdqZ-HkoYilqWpgZQGnJRDbNzKZneKwIuNYhXzzwboOwDfoxLI2u1TFYjoqGQkPMt4-rdYVf_xC3gQmtpkIXz8qhyslJmy4VEk-FgME15Oidb9_E_jcXB4Ux2l49LYq43WybAX-sJppPz3ZkmqMexgT113KfHTEOfkm_MqJq1hXKq_u4XBorFCVrg%3D%3D)

With Trump calling on Republican senators to “Show Up and Hold the Line” by not confirming any more judges before his inauguration, we Democrats must act FAST to confirm every last judge before the 118th Congress is adjourned. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or
