name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Paxton Sues NY Doctor, CEO of the Year, and a $1,000 Steak
body:
Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton filed a lawsuit Thursday against Dr. Margaret Daley Carpenter, a New York physician, for prescribing abortion-inducing drugs via telemedicine to a 20-year-old Collin County woman.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80DGP4yAQBeBfgztbDENsKChOitLl2isRgbGNBLYFJJf8-5Nv69125tPT0_tzt3cXU9yW3y6Tae95t4IL2YPoYbTBxfSxsgvmwYOGjgxMKFEqBbpbzUSchNQ4Y3hwmCdUQpJ-aD_qi9Sku2jOMBAwAiCAHMj7i5OoNWryISgmOYXY9jK0lRq9XZ3TZ39RGfyeu2TW1o7K8BcTNyZucXtRbcPhvKv7Kc4z3p4t27o_iyeG15DL1z-5LcRtOdxCTIynyRTiMzO8Hq60jUpd4wGK95JPFkTPJRNj21ym-oOxwKeLQuSK666YcPyNKcU6TkzyJbuY_jdv3075MuJfAAAA___aGHRY) | |
# Monday, December 16, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1826, Benjamin Edwards and about 30 men took control of Nacogdoches and soon after declared the region’s independence from Mexico as the [Republic of Fredonia](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z79ugzAQgPGnsbcgzjaOPXjowpYOXTqigzuSUw1GYOXP21fp3vFbftL3fRkuKFnW6ycunOpzLoNpjTuBOYEfCCW_BqcpjS1F0JzgbJ11IUDUt9T6eQqh69CNI8U4B0TnKRB6jGfbGS3pjYEBD2ABXMPT1KGzMdrIE1FQrmWSWvam3rjyE485v8qd92Yqi87pVut2KPuhTK9Mz2vzkB_ZmASbsl-V6d-tTN_vTGUVXIcvHjlnKaveE20PyVkOf1auvS4o-Y-t_37ek_kNAAD__9ULVh4). The short-lived Fredonian Rebellion was put down the following month. An editing oversight introduced an error in Saturday's history item. The Congress of the Republic of Texas—not the state legislature—approved [San Antonio's incorporation as a city](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kT2v2yAUhn8N3mKZD38NDFaibOnQVupoHcOxjYTBwjSxl_72KuReKXe40_PAQeeVXv7c-hsYa9z0AxaUcR99zwomTpSdaNVrMPboRablUOiWZihpzQUXTUPbbJasUGwcGoZVU9cg6hJaim2h6YAVK9WYGflcRhmtKOWUihyVKkHwtuUtKq0bIgrUJvqQxxkj7rCN9vB3DLnyS2blHOO6Ed4RdiXsOuAOYUKHYP105D5MhF0dLJjPcbGEccK7f4R3EfdI-KUjrGSFmiFEDMmNUz6sPkA0bko3ccbXKxOPJH5M-AUusXPRO-OTP2BLhHUN_o46HS6ocBk-9lPxxPnlDa-TDMeXpLN3U8Bte0_7nP3E9e9gjXqf_X62kmdB6vVhrDVbVRNRTAsYm0qK3_7aXbL_AQAA__9wR4_s) in 1837. The mystery drones you've heard about in other parts of the country have made it to Texas. Read [our coverage](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L9uwyAYBPCnwZstf0BsMzB08ZauHS3-fA5UBCygIX77Kunc-ae7k-7rul2VDz7ePtUdZX3uaaMj5T3QHqbNKh_OjXdW6tEK6FDCzDjjywKic3IfjdX7qHGGZUZx4WrWxoBlF80mbnXn5asMKEwADIAPaMxFcSYEE2isXQgf0fqa8lAdVnyqsoczPTAPJt27IF2tRyHsg9CV0LW1NhiXU3wpoWvEVghdXfopNcX-nSd0Vbl6E5DQ1eYUsfxBH7H135gLnj0IMS8A03C4o8vSHs2H4Ms0Ez7e7sqH93z994-HpL8BAAD__-_NY9o) in _The Roundup_ and let us know what you think is behind them in today's poll! We are sponsored today by [Pacaso](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80DGP4yAQBeBfgztbDENsKChOitLl2isRgbGNBLYFJJf8-5Nv69125tPT0_tzt3cXU9yW3y6Tae95t4IL2YPoYbTBxfSxsgvmwYOGjgxMKFEqBbpbzUSchNQ4Y3hwmCdUQpJ-aD_qi9Sku2jOMBAwAiCAHMj7i5OoNWryISgmOYXY9jK0lRq9XZ3TZ39RGfyeu2TW1o7K8BcTNyZucXtRbcPhvKv7Kc4z3p4t27o_iyeG15DL1z-5LcRtOdxCTIynyRTiMzO8Hq60jUpd4wGK95JPFkTPJRNj21ym-oOxwKeLQuSK666YcPyNKcU6TkzyJbuY_jdv3075MuJfAAAA___aGHRY), offering a unique real estate investing opportunity for _Flyover_ readers.

## Texas Sues New York Doctor Violating State's Abortion Ban
Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton filed a lawsuit Thursday against Dr. Margaret Daley Carpenter, a New York physician, for [prescribing abortion-inducing drugs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD-PozAQRz8NdEbM2Pxx4eIaulx7JTL2kIzOYGR7Q_LtV6HaZrunedLT6PfvNt8sB97vf-1GprzWOGOLSgAK6GdvObxnVXuztF5DTQYGqaQaR9D1w0CHQ-u0lN4ikVy9RtX1MK7QD4BLV7P5xAChB5AAqiHnOquk1lKT836sVEueS0xNeVChl81reMcnpcbFrQ7mUcqRK_mnwqnC6TzPZl_cTmf--AqnIwYu7PIPFB9d4XTVRP6i6yLeMf0XProSkygUaCPPjncSR6LsEh-F4y7sEtMFB4eQRXK7hVEhtnUy_jg5BM79UKn2vlkO15Pl19WeBr8DAAD__809cpE) via telemedicine to a 20-year-old Collin County woman. The lawsuit alleges that Carpenter prescribed mifepristone and misoprostol via telemedicine in violation of Texas law, facilitating the medical abortion of the woman’s nine-week pregnancy. Her partner reportedly [learned about the pregnancy and abortion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OqzAQBeCnMZ0jZmwgLlzchi633RINeAJWDEa288Pbr0i_zTRz9Ono_NyGG_ngt_k_rWzL5x4HrFFLQAnt4MiHY9CVs2PtDFRsoVNa6esVTLVYIDBK30fqahqxblBBazpqGtPosTN15e2JAUILoAD0haepIa2MUYYn565C1-x8ielSFi78oXwPR3xxukxxrYJdStmzUP8E9gL77dhjLudLYH_KAnvA8yiB_TPLjd9ZYP-FJI0xFR83ufsQZKB3fvoiaSa_5XJG5RHTQ7o4lZjkSumR5bRQCLzNLEuUhQOv7PzkNxbYV8m6_e1D8LnthK7nlXz49ix_Dvey-BsAAP__Hu1wxw) when he was asked to take the woman to the hospital for hemorrhaging. Carpenter, who is not licensed in Texas, founded an advocacy group promoting telemedicine abortion nationwide. Paxton is seeking an injunction against her and [up to $250,000 in civil penalties](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8GNix-bkgYGLpkS9eOFoZLgoLBsmmw375K9u7fd450fm7jzaWcyv3bzWjbHusouQQmJBN6DC7lYwQa7MSDERStOCtQcLkIQx_WTGjiFD3oqLSLJx0nz9WJQ9TxDKBosm-YkEILoYSAAb0_OVDGKIM-hAsBjiG1ug7tgQ13t8V81Beug68zzfbR2rIR9UXklchr730o2LeO-HwPiLw-sbDF7a0W9rmzgp0ddX0yN9W1pVrYknJm2fXtNzUmOefaGLrasPSUc9r0mQC_zy7lj7P9G-Fl5V8AAAD__7zWYJk). New York Gov. Kathy Hochul said in a Friday statement that she is committed to ensuring that her state remains a “safe harbor for all who seek abortion care.”
## Mystery Drones in Texas
After nearly a month of reports about mysterious drones being spotted over [highly populated areas in the Mid-Atlantic region](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQAL_GdEbs2hBcuHgNXV57JXLYJVgyNsK-OPz9KddfP5qR5us-350PPj7_u51tea9pxg61BJQwzOR8uGbdkH10ZKBhCzellR5HMM1me2d6YFQwUjcQ9XjrmZQ2ixuHfoW-8fYjA4QBQAHolpeld1oZowwvRKPQHZMv6WzLxoXfLq_hSi8-2yXtTbBbKUcW6p_ASeBUa20j1xxd8SnGVD-UwCkfbmGB0_eaBE77lQufl6QzRc6ybnyyLBtfcnMvlg_mKPORSmESODWnpaP6EHwebkJ3z9358Fsvf-54WfwJAAD__xGUZAY) and across the country, residents near Houston have reported several drone sightings in the past week. Cheryl Bowman in Crystal Beach told a local news outlet she [saw about 20 drones](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L9uwyAYBPCnwZstf0BsMzB08ZauHS3-fA5UBCygIX77Kunc-ae7k-7rul2VDz7ePtUdZX3uaaMj5T3QHqbNKh_OjXdW6tEK6FDCzDjjywKic3IfjdX7qHGGZUZx4WrWxoBlF80mbnXn5asMKEwADIAPaMxFcSYEE2isXQgf0fqa8lAdVnyqsoczPTAPJt27IF2tRyHsg9CV0LW1NhiXU3wpoWvEVghdXfopNcX-nSd0Vbl6E5DQ1eYUsfxBH7H135gLnj0IMS8A03C4o8vSHs2H4Ms0Ez7e7sqH93z994-HpL8BAAD__-_NY9o) flying in from the Gulf of Mexico toward the Galveston Ship Channel on Tuesday. Another resident photographed a group of drones flying near I-45 on Thursday night. _"They seem to be fairly big because we see them so far out in the Gulf as they fly toward us on the Peninsula,”_ Bowman said. Other residents expressed concern about the drones’ proximity to the Port of Houston, numerous refineries, and the Johnson Space Center. Despite repeated [calls for clarity](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd1i-F-LYBcVr6PLaLS0M1wEFmwhwnPz9yqttt5nqaGZ0vm7TzYQYtvt_s5Kq7yVN2KHkgBz6yZkQP5NsnJo7N0JDCq5CCjkMMDZedW6RRDDDAEhihNlcrXXiMou5c8PcN0GdZYDQAwgA2ZK1FyPFOIqRrHMDkx25UFNuq6dKb1OW-Ekvyq1NaxOVr_VZmPjHUDPUx3G0Ngb7QJ_2UtN2Ugz1QqbumQpDfe4x1IBnCIb6l-QxpQffn9xk4tWnQnz9lEo5pL1wl9NGhYeNV0_chMxQN1m55xFiDKW_MtndVxPiz636p6eXwu8AAAD__yJ5a24) from the public and elected officials, the FBI and Department of Homeland Security have said they have _"no evidence at this time that the reported drone sightings pose a national security or a public safety threat, or have a foreign nexus."_
## Lagoon Park Coming to McKinney
The city of McKinney has given preliminary approval for a 35-acre development featuring a [4-acre surf lagoon](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd0TMQIhdULzGXV67pTWGcYyCITKsk_z9Kttvf-_R0fm6TleKKebbf9rYtddSJlRoJKAEOwWK6T2ZLrhZhQE6dnDRRpu-h6Fbne7tRftge08I1gY_D-YMVi-L7xewpovuAwMEC6ABzIm9P5PRw6AH9iH0wigOsZX91FZu_KK6pHc5eD_5snXJra09qtD_BI4Cx0ApUY05l4Ma189G4Jj5KZ90cJUxy83fY878lqjUJj3lXLKcmfwqAx-cymPj3GQrct6Z7vK2l-8cPk9UeBY4drsLj2dMKVZ7EUbdNorp16b9medw-BMAAP__joVo5g), a resort-style hotel, dining venues, and entertainment facilities. The $200 million Cannon Beach Surf and Adventure Park will include attractions such as a rooftop pool, sandy beach, cliff diving, and a stationary surf wave. Construction is [scheduled to begin next year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGP3CAQRn8N7lgxYw5DQZHG3aVNuRpg2EXBcLK58_nfR5vUKT990tPT-_V-f6dSS3v8pI39-M79jgq1BJRg7olKve56Sj6o5GBiD8usZ20tuOnpkyFUgcHO-S0oo4IzCAFIoQaTFzsV_4IBggGYAfSNY3wjPTs3O44pWaEVpzL6fhtPHvxNR65X_-L9Fvs2Vf8c4-MQ8w-Bq8D1PM_bmYlep8CV9lFiZYFr4_MQuNYeqQpcY6-1NBn7ZxvXv80yUmu9ycAUn3KLv0trfMnjc8-y0qP3Jjc-SOCKdpHIS0xLslI7R1KD1TIkN8uYEyvnOGSD0-7Tx1lqLYdZhFaPjUr96z3-G_LL458AAAD__7QidCU). The development is projected to create more than 700 jobs and generate [$2 billion in economic impact](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOqzAQRb_GdCDP2DG4cPEaurx2S2Q8Q7Bi7Ai8Ifn7Vbbf7hZX5-h8Xaerjynm23-_sauvpUwoUbeALZiJfEzvSTfkZkkWGnbQK630MIBtVqeMoQsEA7hIiReyduB-5p40oaVZNdF9YIBgABSA7jiEi9fKWmU5EA1CS6ZYy97VlSu__LGkd3ny3oWyNcmttT4Oof4JHAWO53l2S3npzOfxOQgcP1PgeHzvS_vw-73dwj3mzO82-JxLbmf2YW12R48zphQP0wstb5uP6VdR_2x-OvwJAAD__8JXWiw) over 20 years, attracting an estimated 300,000 visitors annually. Although similar lagoon parks have been developed in the Houston area and in Waco, Cannon Beach will be the first in North Texas.

clean_body: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton filed a lawsuit Thursday against Dr. Margaret Daley Carpenter, a New York physician, for prescribing abortion-inducing drugs via telemedicine to a 20-year-old Collin County woman. | | | | | | Monday, December 16, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1826, Benjamin Edwards and about 30 men took control of Nacogdoches and soon after declared the region’s independence from Mexico as the . The short-lived Fredonian Rebellion was put down the following month. An editing oversight introduced an error in Saturday's history item. The Congress of the Republic of Texas—not the state legislature—approved in 1837. The mystery drones you've heard about in other parts of the country have made it to Texas. Read in The Roundup and let us know what you think is behind them in today's poll! We are sponsored today by , offering a unique real estate investing opportunity for Flyover readers. Abilene 🌦️ 65/50° | Amarillo 🌤️ 56/35° | Austin 🌦️ 76/64° | Brownsville 🌦️ 82/69° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 80/68° | DFW 🌦️ 69/58° | El Paso ⛅ 66/36° | Houston 🌦️ 78/67° | Lubbock ☀️ 60/38° | San Antonio 🌦️ 75/66° | Texarkana 🌦️ 70/60° | Texas Sues New York Doctor Violating State's Abortion Ban Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton filed a lawsuit Thursday against Dr. Margaret Daley Carpenter, a New York physician, for via telemedicine to a 20-year-old Collin County woman. The lawsuit alleges that Carpenter prescribed mifepristone and misoprostol via telemedicine in violation of Texas law, facilitating the medical abortion of the woman’s nine-week pregnancy. Her partner reportedly when he was asked to take the woman to the hospital for hemorrhaging. Carpenter, who is not licensed in Texas, founded an advocacy group promoting telemedicine abortion nationwide. Paxton is seeking an injunction against her and . New York Gov. Kathy Hochul said in a Friday statement that she is committed to ensuring that her state remains a “safe harbor for all who seek abortion care.” Mystery Drones in Texas After nearly a month of reports about mysterious drones being spotted over and across the country, residents near Houston have reported several drone sightings in the past week. Cheryl Bowman in Crystal Beach told a local news outlet she flying in from the Gulf of Mexico toward the Galveston Ship Channel on Tuesday. Another resident photographed a group of drones flying near I-45 on Thursday night. "They seem to be fairly big because we see them so far out in the Gulf as they fly toward us on the Peninsula,” Bowman said. Other residents expressed concern about the drones’ proximity to the Port of Houston, numerous refineries, and the Johnson Space Center. Despite repeated from the public and elected officials, the FBI and Department of Homeland Security have said they have "no evidence at this time that the reported drone sightings pose a national security or a public safety threat, or have a foreign nexus." Lagoon Park Coming to McKinney The city of McKinney has given preliminary approval for a 35-acre development featuring a , a resort-style hotel, dining venues, and entertainment facilities. The $200 million Cannon Beach Surf and Adventure Park will include attractions such as a rooftop pool, sandy beach, cliff diving, and a stationary surf wave. Construction is . The development is projected to create more than 700 jobs and generate over 20 years, attracting an estimated 300,000 visitors annually. Although similar lagoon parks have been developed in the Houston area and in Waco, Cannon Beach will be the first in North Texas. | Top investors are backing this “unlisted” stock When the team that created Zillow and grew it into a real estate leader starts a new company, investors take note. After all, growing a company to $16B in size doesn’t happen by accident. That’s why top firms like SoftBank and Maveron already invested in . Taking the industry by storm all over again, Pacaso’s streamlined digital marketplace offers fractional ownership of premier properties – completely revamping a $1.3T market. This co-ownership approach maximizes demand by minimizing costs and worries. Look no further than the 1,500+ happy buyers across 40 destinations – including their most recent addition, Paris – . With over $100M in gross profits in four years, they’re ready to bring this co-ownership model across the globe (and into your portfolio for just $2.70 a share). Learn how you can get a piece as a Pacaso investor today. | ➤**San Antonio: The police department revealed that Officer William Kasberg’s death last Tuesday was a suicide, not an accidental shooting as initially reported. () ➤ Corpus Christi: Mayor Paulette Guajardo defeated City Council Member Michael Hunter by 336 votes in Saturday’s runoff election to win a third term. Guajardo trailed Hunter in early and Election Day voting but led by a significant margin in absentee votes. () ➤ Baytown: State and local agencies responded to a chemical spill at Bluebonnet Petrochemical Solutions following a fire last week. According to Harris County Judge Lina Hidalgo, the facility had not obtained permits for or properly labeled some of the chemicals involved in the leak. # Monday, December 16, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1773, American colonists staged the Boston Tea Party, a pivotal event that fueled the American Revolution. Explore it through this [virtual museum experience](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAQgOGngW6NM6BIQXGN3V57pYFlWOeCYpSs8e0ve_32f77k_7lPd8-Z1-e3X8jVVCZsUd8Ab9BP0XO-Ji2jS0RISpIDo7TSg4VOzi4q23ljfPDKDMZi6AfQYDUk6lIYSLJ7a4DQA6gOuibGZEOAVsMDNSkvdEuRa9mb38JrnSnlq7xobx5lkdnNtW6HUF8CR4HjeZ5NKEctayW_-b1ex8zbOxU4yt3F7eSc-eiN0O1z8Zz_mfpp6-XwLwAA__-8AU9-). ## Some Democrats to Skip Trump Inauguration
Democrats are [divided over whether to attend](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GZCB32xgmcHCJs7n0QtTgZsYng5Exg_j7FSttuEnrBV2lp_r3HJ4UYlhff2lhW-Y0oERdA9ZgBk8hXoOuvJ2ZkVXFFjqlle4f0FZvS8hGdtT2yuh-7qUepRoNkOphmiVTFezdBggGQLXQNt7Pj3EEqWFCzYqEluxDSbn5n8Ja3jzHK304N1NaqmjfpWy7UH8EOoHuPM_m2KkkT9f9INDtJeVLoFv53AW6LcVQwnQjR55KSOvNt4RAB_hzPC9pylT2uuRj2eqw0vE6Mt0Bga4zD2hRayk7ga7K1m9niDHsphNavhYK8Vuw_DbYx-JXAAAA__9MWGr5) President-elect Donald Trump’s inauguration on Jan. 20. Some view skipping the event as a "first act of resistance," while others see attendance as a duty to uphold tradition. Notable Democrats, including Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, have stated they are undecided about attending. [Donald Trump Jr.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D-PozAUBPBPYzoj_CchFC5yBdXlqpO2RA_7GRwZO7Jfgvj2K7bf-jcajebrMT0gxJCWf7ChIZ8n2UnNheTiOjkI8Zh044xHlKgaNKJXWunbIC7Nam4gO92rQVmLHjvU2Ftvh1l1zt9cj00wZ5uQ4iqEuohL65wf5ll0WlipUQHTHbpAubTPHBKt6OORP1ham7cmmpXoVZm6MzkyOe773m41ncbkiImHxOSYcK8n5hIdk6PLCaLjVN7biz8Lr3zDWmFBTpk73LItQJXP-bCZKKSFe6AVz2BI8F7eBSjkxCvBweQIhd_v4vO__vnbFONee4gx1GvPdLdsEOLPUPrtuI-R3wEAAP__VB5zJg) posted on X that Democrats boycotting his father's inauguration had his _"complete and total endorsement to stay home."_ Several Democratic lawmakers announced plans to participate in Martin Luther King Jr. Day events instead of attending the inauguration, while others cited Jan. 6 experiences as their reason for skipping.
## Blinken Confirms Talks with Syrian Rebels
U.S. Secretary of State Antony Blinken confirmed Saturday that the [U.S. has engaged directly with Syria’s Hayat Tahrir al-Sham](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1u7CAUBOCnwR0WHPBfQXEbd3vblBaYw_okLKyArLVvHzl9upE-aUaaj9t2sxQp3f_bB5oW8gYCNJfA5bh5S_G96c6bgAioOjRyUlrpeZFDd5gFpn0eZgUOQEwYrBZhXsZBC41OhLEjc7VJkKOUapBD731YnJNCyx00Ksu0QE8tl_4zU2oHhvjOLyz9nh9dNEdrz8rUPwYrg_U8zz65PeFZL2ewXvGCXKJnsLpI6QsTr-9Clhd0GCs_WuX2uzZKvNGOvOzJylnDPHTF-OdJMVIdJ6bF_WEp_i63v554GfgJAAD__yIHYGw) (HTS) rebels, now in control of the country after the toppling of the Assad regime. This marks the first U.S. acknowledgment of contact with HTS, a group still [designated as a terrorist organization](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zz1rwzAQxvFPI20xutPZcgYNXbyla0ejl1OioljBFjHupy_u3u2BB37w_7rNN5dLXu6f7sm2pTqjQroAXmCYo8vlmElGm5iRtWQLRpOm8Qq9fFjQhrhXxvvBBD0axDSqoBKMrIAMy2xPDRAGAN1D38WYrt6DIghIrJ0gxTG3unbfNS_twakc9c1rF-pTFvto7bUJ_SFwEjjt-955H85P4LTwvgmc3NpyKHzO0B80GNA_CFWuNr72XEreBiNI3Z8ulz-1_Vf5tvgbAAD__65XUi0), as officials prioritize efforts to locate missing journalist Austin Tice in their discussions. HTS leader Ahmed Al-Sharaa, in a bid to rebrand the group as a legitimate governing authority, has pledged rights for all Syrians, including minorities. Meanwhile, striking images from this historic week capture the [abandoned luxury palace](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1uhDAQBOCnMZ2Rd23-Chdp6C5tSrTYy-HIwMkmZ_H2EenTjfRJo9F8PaYHhRj25ydtbM_lmFChkYAS2slTiNdkKm8XZmRdsYVOG236AZpqte2CWrXedQoNK2qo7wk7NkhamwaGKti7DRBaAN1AU3u_DPMMyoBDw5qEUezDeaT6-wj7ufISr-PNqXbHVkW7nucrC_0hcBQ4llLqfXY7l3y7wPGONxwpeoFjvlIgOVNeKUmKknImL18UybH0tFF2P1kmnjlm6cI7RFkoyeR2gl4PaKpk_auEGENuO2HUc6MQ_7ac_33ztvgbAAD__0szZtY) of Bashar al-Assad.
## List: Most Terrifying Attractions in the World
The world's [30 most terrifying attractions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFurDAQAL_GdEZ4bbi7wsVr6O61KZHBa9hkwSezgvD30aVPPxqN5uM5PAMxbfP_sKKXlAdowGkD2nRDDMTX4KroEyKgrdCbm3XW3R-mrRbfPUaLKZngbm0K4Y7TBK7Fe0QbEcNYkX_bDJjOGNuato4xPcbRNM5M4NAG5RqMJLnUn5k2WTDxlQ8s9ZTXiv0i8tqV_aegV9Cf51lzPhC_X5wLbfObUtDPgRnLxbSLgt52roNWQS8L6jMXjru2jV7zLlqwFEoXbbMOIiVMQnnbdQnbF8aq-Pg6iZn27qZcM6-B-DdE_hpzePgJAAD___r6aF8) range from natural wonders to human-made thrills designed to test visitors' courage. Toronto's [CN Tower EdgeWalk](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAQgOGngU7DDKBrQXGN3V57pQFnVO5QNi6R7Ntf9vqr_-RL_q_7dPcxxWP99Du7suQJFZoGsIFuIh_TazKS3MKMrCU76LXR5jaAlZtjGHSnO8vKkg697wMEq4gAbyos3sjo3hogdADagm2JliEEUAZmNKy9MIoplny23zkeZeMlvfLFZzvnXSa3lfJ4Cv0hcBQ41lrb-Si5vrsXOIbTX9yUjRumlatPP_J09KgxpfjsemHUuvuY_rDy39zl8DcAAP__jaZRTg) took the top spot, allowing tourists to circle the tower's exterior ledge at a dizzying height of 116 stories. For pure adrenaline, visitors can brave Spain's [Red Force roller coaster](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7tuhDAQheGnsbtFnhlzK1xEiug2VZSUyGAPODLrDesFkaePSJ_2HOmT_s9rf7Uhhtv0ZhdvMqceFeoL4AWq3tkQj15LZ9h79CS9gZo06aaFUs6mrkbldEMVM5WWWdUWLZeouOVmIJLBnBogVABUQlk4x-0wgNIwovZkhVbehZzW4iuFW549xyNtfi3GtMho5pzvD0EvAjuB3b7vxZGe-Tn48z8Xm8dZULcJev342b7zu54nq-Rq3H0PMYZHVQutpsWG-Efm_xI3g78BAAD__5Z7UwQ) or hike China's Mount Huashan on paths that narrow to just 11.8 inches wide. You can [see the full list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFurDAQAL_GdEZ4bbi7wsVr6O61KZHBa9hkwSezgvD30aVPPxqN5uM5PAMxbfP_sKKXlAdowGkD2nRDDMTX4KroEyKgrdCbm3XW3R-mrRbfPUaLKZngbm0K4Y7TBK7Fe0QbEcNYkX_bDJjOGNuato4xPcbRNM5M4NAG5RqMJLnUn5k2WTDxlQ8s9ZTXiv0i8tqV_aegV9Cf51lzPhC_X5wLbfObUtDPgRnLxbSLgt52roNWQS8L6jMXjru2jV7zLlqwFEoXbbMOIiVMQnnbdQnbF8aq-Pg6iZn27qZcM6-B-DdE_hpzePgJAAD___r6aF8).

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsgKAaFWpN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osgKAaFWpN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the
proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64049217:sgKAaFWpN:m:3:2532013465:0E293A606F97118667DCD4D5231DFBE4:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

I'll tell you more about how you can help in just a moment, but first, let me tell you why we need to act right away.

Next year, there's one thing we can absolutely expect...

Rachel Maddow cried on MSNBC about the dangers of Elon Musk and new media. Here's the thing--so-called "Big Media" has been corrupt and one-sided for a long, long time. In fact...

_Imprimis_ --an important alternative to pervasive and pernicious far-Left narratives--first reached the mailboxes of a few thousand readers in 1972. Now, we fight against dangerous ideologies through our **free** online courses, **Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , and all our **outreach on social media**.

**And our outreach numbers in the millions --a far cry from the few thousand folks that received the first issue of _Imprimis_ back in '72!**

We've also had the blessing to work with some of the best radio hosts in history--Rush Limbaugh and Paul Harvey--to promote the principles of liberty that Hillsdale staunchly defends.

**This has been some of our most important work. And it 's work we couldn't do without YOU.** You've especially been a big help to us during attacks from legacy media and censorship from Big Tech companies like Facebook.

Thank you so much!

Next year--as Big Media clings desperately to remain relevant--we can expect more attacks, so [I pray you'll continue to stand with us for TRUTH against Leftist dogmas.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70b43d64e6ac42bd9c975abe6bb96930&_e=1rf1sBQcqjMvJpDdqF3qmRTivznL-wBMticllSUYW6mtUE7jCa5AJdoW8MdpmREs4O426aJ9miD0LBPNFvOVyZLLZZU_W6TYtaUF48F0CpizwOTr16qzU2mn-Pr8oAHWsltNCc8bRrU8FfJnbGud7qH7_tbL0w56fqtcnOCHwDIH7xe_ba89B0f772R2bZPMuMBgiyNDoM6OPw2CjQRbCP3moI61sgAgObEWFiNRd5_flb8LfAFDwydOV-XVUTWDCpNQECLd8qF4Mdmq6OmaNA_ivIttTANzPN1UXCoInUcrv7HP5FAuvsYnqMduE8eCmUs7fWnA0_1NP6kqio9X715MvokicpEFplzXtKpWoXhb7dXTQyLfXjkeqXEaq7ibl66mjtaDGGnxbz3DZ9y2bg%3D%3D)

An important part of our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** will be confronting Big Media head-on. As more Americans begin turning off MSNBC and canceling their _New York Times_ subscriptions, with your generous gift today, you will provide...

* Free subscriptions to _Imprimis_ --our digest of liberty--featuring constitutional perspectives on contemporary problems, including immigration, the weaponization of government, and education.
* Podcasts including "The Larry Arnn Show," "Hillsdale Dialogues," and "Liberty and Learning with Mark Levin," all on **our Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , part of the "New Media" that more and more people--especially and including young people--are tuning in to.
* Free online courses on the Constitution, American history, Christianity, and Marxism--especially important as our audience for these courses begins to become younger and younger. We've got a great lineup of courses planned for 2025, by the way...
* Massive outreach on social media--including X (formerly known as Twitter)--where we often share our educational content, such as lectures from Hillsdale events, free online courses, informative surveys, and our learning videos.

**I hope you know we can only accomplish all of this with your help.**

[**Are you with us?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70b43d64e6ac42bd9c975abe6bb96930&_e=1rf1sBQcqjMvJpDdqF3qmRTivznL-wBMticllSUYW6mtUE7jCa5AJdoW8MdpmREs4O426aJ9miD0LBPNFvOVyZLLZZU_W6TYtaUF48F0CpizwOTr16qzU2mn-Pr8oAHWsltNCc8bRrU8FfJnbGud7qH7_tbL0w56fqtcnOCHwDIH7xe_ba89B0f772R2bZPMuMBgiyNDoM6OPw2CjQRbCP3moI61sgAgObEWFiNRd59IR5bK6tLZXZlA1HMOepgS3FS4Tw-itMUXbZYmNvQRN-DdU1zDoVH8c6ZBGSHgp9n00Pi2epgISefT9WgiDBaARfJAbARMWqv1Jn18rnLVih62EoFi4KeCETa2kyCzyZq2Ga_xe7C-B0u3LBe114LbYIKGickOn_miP14SfkvihA%3D%3D)

This is an exciting time when we can do so much to restore liberty. Together, we will STOP Big Media LIES and propaganda and TEACH the American people the TRUTH about the principles underlying our Constitution.

To do so, we must expand these programs further than we ever have before--and that brings me to my last point...

I'm asking for your most generous year-end support for next year's **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

**If you haven 't renewed your support yet, can I count on you to please give your best tax-deductible year-end gift right away?**

**You can make your gift online, safely and securely, at this link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70b43d64e6ac42bd9c975abe6bb96930&_e=1rf1sBQcqjMvJpDdqF3qmRTivznL-wBMticllSUYW6mtUE7jCa5AJdoW8MdpmREs4O426aJ9miD0LBPNFvOVyZLLZZU_W6TYtaUF48F0CpizwOTr16qzU2mn-Pr8oAHWsltNCc8bRrU8FfJnbGud7qH7_tbL0w56fqtcnOCHwDIH7xe_ba89B0f772R2bZPMuMBgiyNDoM6OPw2CjQRbCP3moI61sgAgObEWFiNRd586R2oC1Asr9_9xG2qEJingGxQJTgA2i3sP6m_XlGYIHwd5amRJXLx_IhraQg33E-EKMqLcGlzUKnX5RhJPwGwEfD_9uhsfB1cyaWN9rLQI-dlKXsY1DZHeaYsUPNZ_7u5p3symNkX9aJ2PhOxM_QS-FkHZFx2pnHUvOhwiXjL-rg%3D%3D)

And because we can count on the support of informed patriots like you, we'll continue to accomplish our goals without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT.

So please help us reach our $6,000,000 year-end online goal by **December 31** (that's only a few days away!).

Your gift of any size will help us restore liberty today, and secure liberty for the long term. After all, there is only one way to save liberty in America--EDUCATION.

Thank you for helping us meet this historic moment head-on--and for reading all the way to the end of this email! Really appreciate you,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

So I need your help to provide all our outreach, including _Imprimis_ , the Hillsdale College Podcast Network, and free online courses, to millions for FREE. Next year, we plan to expand our outreach to newer and younger audiences.

Thanks to the help of informed patriots like you, we remain on the vanguard of new media--standing up to the lies and propaganda of the legacy media with the TRUTH about the principles underlying our Constitution. This work will be even more important in 2025.

**That 's why I hope I can count on you today for a generous, tax-deductible gift to help us meet our $6,000,000 online funding goal--before December 31.** I've included your secure link to give right now here:

body:
Our nation is at a crossroads.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c07abf8c79a4be8bf0b6a570e7e9d1c&_e=nhIYz8LPSVrQr090kQo5ihaVI-c_D8m0sAd_a3rXIuAdldn0kAxmQGev3NYZ8025FtQHOalQ-tQftXBSl59g1MF4XkTVwAVpItdre4t4w5ygY9JJ9XEXxx6rl15AyWwCEh8G-uDquCrZOizdPWG3GWmSylBMEaghFRNUu8aePu7revTSZYgaq6PrPKDPiR16dmoFjc0PS5q-4GVxtl8F7mXnTFSYVdxV1ao2r0uxrJkVB5PeB9UtnnD1EoNfCnaQKKs5HUHrz8JHIDOp7HQ5g6FYvM0xNEtLcALyxFsjBkLKGoCkMR6uFX68_JuFqHhqw_UjBePpAv2ZszYnGGzjRkm65IrV6UsBNTwVadFF_DCITqgLcRVK9WO8kHcBIqOd)

Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c07abf8c79a4be8bf0b6a570e7e9d1c&_e=nhIYz8LPSVrQr090kQo5ihaVI-c_D8m0sAd_a3rXIuAdldn0kAxmQGev3NYZ8025FtQHOalQ-tQftXBSl59g1MF4XkTVwAVpItdre4t4w5ygY9JJ9XEXxx6rl15AyWwCEh8G-uDquCrZOizdPWG3GWmSylBMEaghFRNUu8aePu7revTSZYgaq6PrPKDPiR16dmoFjc0PS5q-4GVxtl8F7mXnTFSYVdxV1ao2r0uxrJmUxM648bJFOa31cdwVvlUTt9KnTwPAEqSj6-4YGcDyUgyUbZfzZWnLBHtmFlpHyx_mP67xGHbKoyMUJxV5VvTlEi-8rLovVZuUBi-11F7HPnTyvKzYJakpbUof8laPubFu2tVHodcYIE8WYtxoZZfv)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c07abf8c79a4be8bf0b6a570e7e9d1c&_e=nhIYz8LPSVrQr090kQo5ihaVI-c_D8m0sAd_a3rXIuAdldn0kAxmQGev3NYZ8025FtQHOalQ-tQftXBSl59g1MF4XkTVwAVpItdre4t4w5ygY9JJ9XEXxx6rl15AyWwCEh8G-uDquCrZOizdPWG3GWmSylBMEaghFRNUu8aePu7revTSZYgaq6PrPKDPiR16dmoFjc0PS5q-4GVxtl8F7mXnTFSYVdxV1ao2r0uxrJlmqIMf4DVbr8DO3H6WPyvH3yR54KSHABBWFRGX0Kw3ohd_6ILqXxzh-dJ6oJtgP8YHRZzaRtN1RRY_c8KIDUDdgjBTvwKAVFJkhH_QCz0hFaB1NjBDw9h4OhU5bUzJ3a3wZQKSaOqGn0eG2pzs8R7O)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c07abf8c79a4be8bf0b6a570e7e9d1c&_e=nhIYz8LPSVrQr090kQo5ihaVI-c_D8m0sAd_a3rXIuAdldn0kAxmQGev3NYZ8025FtQHOalQ-tQftXBSl59g1MF4XkTVwAVpItdre4t4w5ygY9JJ9XEXxx6rl15AyWwCEh8G-uDquCrZOizdPWG3GWmSylBMEaghFRNUu8aePu7revTSZYgaq6PrPKDPiR16dmoFjc0PS5q-4GVxtl8F7mXnTFSYVdxV1ao2r0uxrJnl3oL---m484n0fw4cpebE52opt2ET0116SFOjMkdxNvWgI7dKrwAWFB8WuCVq3jM3KZFFNqS7PJEZH8Vr_HdOd5quYxhouGmqHgChLu1k8ZEdtco2hxa2rPDX5RpUJlS43rANLzrKo19SmT_ZUzFh)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

clean_body: Our nation is at a crossroads. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government. It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations. As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that. To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education in 2025. What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude. Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations. But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. We must do all that we possibly can. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation. You will help us to ... Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with Imprimis , our monthly digest of liberty. With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of Imprimis to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025. Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses. Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025. Restore excellence to American K-12 education. Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile. With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country! Hillsdale College conducts its educational outreach efforts --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept one penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between $25 and $100. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range. We will also need a significant number of $500 to $1,000 donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated. Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help. You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years. That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the December 31 deadline. Every dollar you give will get us closer to our $6,000,000 online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**. Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: History Facts
subject: Why people panicked over hatpins in the early 1900s
body:
At the beginning of the 20th century, elaborate hats were ubiquitous in women’s fashion. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cnx036ynwot6iz9tdu8lhgg5s4ycntdq0tkekp1z9dv8w3hvdgizwiobnfql7bwanhz2rqr4qz9vhbpfgntage14j3t3he0roi5sw23sygs2hc19dsgnyylhjoujgas1oqzc8k2kx4wgu5s&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sol5nz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Suffragists caused a hatpin panic in the early 1900s.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sol5nz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sol5nz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sol5nz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| A t the beginning of the 20th century, elaborate hats were ubiquitous in women’s fashion. Hat brims were so wide, they often extended out past a woman’s shoulders, and the tops of the hats were adorned with taffeta, ribbons, and lots of feathers. Hatpins, themselves often decorative and sometimes as big as a foot long, were required to fasten the large hats to a woman’s hairstyle — but they also became inadvertent tools of self-defense for women who were gaining more independence and venturing out into the world alone.
---
The use of hatpins for self-defense dovetailed with a growing culture of “[mashers](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sol5nz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com),” as they were known at the time. These were men who leered at, catcalled, or unwantedly touched women in public. Suffragists and other women’s rights groups became increasingly vocal about the need for female safety, autonomy, and self-defense in the face of “masher” culture, but their efforts had the unintended effect of bringing negative attention to the female victims. Newspapers across the country reported stories of women using hatpins and umbrellas to fend off attackers, and by 1909, hatpins were [considered dangerous around the world](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sol5nz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Some regions attempted to regulate their length; in many U.S. states, women could be fined up to $50 for wearing hatpins that were more than 9 inches long.
Eventually, measures were taken in some locations to punish “mashers,” including with fines and jail time. Still, women were sometimes told (by a judge in at least one instance) that they were simply too beautiful to be walking around alone. By the end of World War I, women’s hairstyles — and the size of their hats — were significantly smaller, and the “hatpin peril” was all but forgotten.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sol5nz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sol5nz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## British suffragettes’ self-defense was known as “suffrajitsu.”
The fight for women’s suffrage reached a fever pitch in the early 20th century, and in the U.K., women encountered increasing physical resistance by opponents and law enforcement during protests and demonstrations. In order to protect themselves, some women started learning the Japanese martial art of jiu-jitsu, which emphasizes using leverage and targeting pressure points to overcome physical aggression. Media outlets started reporting on the trend, as well as on martial artist Edith Garrud, who was teaching jiu-jitsu to members of the Women's Social and Political Union (the driving force of the U.K.’s suffrage campaign). Soon, the term “suffrajitsu” [was being used](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sol5nz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). The word was later used as the title of a graphic novel trilogy on the self-defense movement.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: A mere “toss-up” majority?
body:
I refuse to let all of our hard work be for nothing.

I refuse to let all of our hard work be for nothing.
| Friend – since I last emailed you, this situation has become far more serious.
---
With numerous special elections just around the corner in the new year, our _new_ majority was _already_ going to be facing a razor-thin margin of just 1 seat.
---
But now, with reports indicating that yet another special election will soon be announced, the majority we fought tirelessly for all year long could now be a mere **TOSS-UP!**
---
Trust me, I know just how much time, effort, and resources from hardworking Americans like YOU went into securing such a big victory this November.
---
_That’s why I pulled**$2.5 MILLION** from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest._
---
And now, with everything on the line, I REFUSE to let all of our hard work be for _nothing_.
---
So, before we officially close the books on 2024, I’m looking for **2.5 million PATRIOTS** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of truly ANY amount to help defend our new majority.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any size to match my commitment to DEFEND our new House majority that could soon be a mere TOSS-UP.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2znumcvtegtjtk9g4lvuldgjjjfbtmc9lkfm5k3cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm0oj4chh2bs)
---

[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zbplgit3dto9hoeguvh57t5f921rctoh24dqj0d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm0oj4chh2bs)
---
[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zc07m5v07mqp1s7tmh18sojal05eduo1qt54h4m0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm0oj4chh2bs)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zf9tbbhln0eu2jubkk28nn56rjin8tvngjnvefuo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm0oj4chh2bs)
---
Jim Jordan
---
\- - - - Forwarded Message - - - -

**From:** **Jim Jordan**
**Date:** Fri, December 6, 2024
**Subject:** Just 1 SEAT?!
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z9ea2hi0rjg22r23d2lrpp9p6t86ef5ckn1v8t9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm0oj4chh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Please don’t misunderstand...
---
I don’t want this email to come across as a message of doom and gloom.
---
_After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House _AND_ both chambers of Congress. _
---
But we also must face a glaring reality:
---
**Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT.**
---
Yes, you read that right. _1 seat._
---
I know how hard you fought for this new majority, Friend. I’m right there with you...
---
**Over the course of the election, I transferred _$2.5 million_ from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority.**
---
And now that our new majority could be hanging on by a thread next year, I refuse to let those efforts go to waste.
---
That’s why I have no choice but to reach out before year’s end.
---
I’m asking **_2.5 million patriots_** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of ANY amount to help defend our NEW majority that will soon be cut down to just 1 SEAT.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any size to match my commitment to DEFEND our House majority and SAVE AMERICA.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zokp93l7b1grgb9hja28mmiihi0to7pp6411di20_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm0oj4chh2bs)
---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zraq5mmk6bs51h23mrkj4pc0vluolgdp7c2errt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm0oj4chh2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z4oqfoifclo5oomuuoll50c1t4pqsrsmcv6rg6h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm0oj4chh2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z2hddkg42rf1194u81no9facncfva3luicjb57o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm0oj4chh2bs)

body:
Exclusive 24-Hour Offer: Pre-Order Your 2025 Membership Card Now and Keep Your Streak Alive

|
---
| | |
Dear Friend,

This is Julia from House GOP Membership Services.

We're auditing our members, and I noticed you are on track to have one of the longest membership streaks in House GOP history!

I talked to House Leadership about this extraordinary circumstance and as a small token of our appreciation, we are offering you **[EARLY ACCESS to PRE-ORDER your 2025 membership card.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z49iu8hqpdh5jqsplg958mdfpsn29n6rtadh0ce8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm8p32chh2bs "EARLY ACCESS to PRE-ORDER your 2025 membership card.")**

This is your chance to pre-order your 2025 Membership and keep your streak alive. By renewing now, you'll not only maintain your status as a sustained Republican Member, but you'll also be one of the first to receive your new membership card.

We've just emerged from a historic presidential election, and the stakes are higher than ever. The Left is regrouping, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters to stay vigilant and keep pushing forward.

body:
Exclusive 24-Hour Offer: Pre-Order Your 2025 Membership Card Now and Keep Your Streak Alive

|
---
| | |
Dear Friend,

This is Julia from House GOP Membership Services.

We're auditing our members, and I noticed you are on track to have one of the longest membership streaks in House GOP history!

I talked to House Leadership about this extraordinary circumstance and as a small token of our appreciation, we are offering you **[EARLY ACCESS to PRE-ORDER your 2025 membership card.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc7aihnsltb2orc4j0d4ctkmcl61km81ocu4r03g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm4p72c9h2bs "EARLY ACCESS to PRE-ORDER your 2025 membership card.")**

---

This is your chance to pre-order your 2025 Membership and keep your streak alive. By renewing now, you'll not only maintain your status as a sustained Republican Member, but you'll also be one of the first to receive your new membership card.

We've just emerged from a historic presidential election, and the stakes are higher than ever. The Left is regrouping, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters to stay vigilant and keep pushing forward.

**[Renew your membership TONIGHT and let us know you're committed to fighting for our values and our country.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfrea81oo9esnt9lso646ieu3ile0ob7u6o1te9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm4p72c9h2bs "Renew your membership TONIGHT and let us know you're committed to fighting for our values and our country.")**

Julia, House GOP Membership Office

Team,

On Sunday, I attended church in Amelia, County with our new Republican State Senate District 10 Nominee [Luther Cifers for Senate](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V5zDjyTK3D-qenZtmYE9xZpNE14PhK8W2Un08RaGAszUIz3s8TePyP5zIKiTCMKTCkT6f-EWmRDPhbTjOLI26HhslEPptJC80yQFXjFTtTUi-YS3oPrWJy6EKLbLzpn22yequQIrWI-j1Kqr6s7Y0mWsD4IxpFgZj3s3NxZfzm657qHZv5mFVy__U-pZK0nhLcNod-pH0Hn8JzhsJa7RI6ThRkKKZfYLQO6mH3WksK0tWxmU1CxYkdHso_7XE_ULps11TblTRp-ulNhwaVQCKCWfZmfVy79frwqXk82ZJPdm_y9ZEd1e2LH8vSHEma5FgHZEGNhmqxGFYGRXiK2r1-Sm08rLj7p7nCxizuVcPsd-bpJeY3qIU-SDy5din8KgAldcleUsl2s3ChzFQtGkM1Ep0ESlMoAKU7RHqglCETxdiaj-Qcp33D5xGCnYog21zW8SH1YnUUypfAvp6VbPj2bEECpxlPZxEIOo1Mt9QlbRNezOsqNA-a9ctVdEp94lB5UYaGWzFqg=&c=pHeluh4FA_wMdoRTjmEcMQt-Uw2xG5r_nbmm8xzqQ0VqthGCqdw23g==&ch=zqP5Aae0OpMjXZ7JXRWDPh2p8GmwJpto7wYlQW3m_QwL_EnRlAm8VQ==) and his family. Afterwards, we went to lunch and discussed what needs to be done to win on January 7. We plan to continue our message of unity across the district and we ask folks to show grace to all the candidates who did not win Friday. We must put our differences aside and work together as a team. Luther will need your prayers, your vote, dollars for the campaign, sign locations, volunteers, and more. You can donate and learn more at his website here: [https://luthercifers.com](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V5zDjyTK3D-qenZtmYE9xZpNE14PhK8W2Un08RaGAszUIz3s8TePyP5zIKiTCMKTCqM2KHYD8mqhdVvtJaoW3WY65keaIuWJt7a1D-ooeK_k6zWE1V-y30-JXgqxTDnBBqFmai0HhjCbDkNoUyqTIcgFsJC824_TvcD9Iic3q_knHSbPejCSzzlgAjFML-qI0I9dkVEBCn2OfdLqvlD_avGJ-rTtXWqqEmEUIEt3OifDNJes83NU2-pD1B4-smvu4-BOlGHB0KTPjQyo6zITENECF8eFI4RRtJGptfZsSIQSYDPy58i2ew==&c=pHeluh4FA_wMdoRTjmEcMQt-Uw2xG5r_nbmm8xzqQ0VqthGCqdw23g==&ch=zqP5Aae0OpMjXZ7JXRWDPh2p8GmwJpto7wYlQW3m_QwL_EnRlAm8VQ==)
| 3 Republicans on the Ballot January 7
---
| We actually have 3 Republican candidates running in the January 7 special elections for the General Assembly. If you have a friend or family member living in one of these districts, please encourage them to vote RED so that we can support Governor Youngkin's efforts to cut taxes, improve schools, keep our streets safe, and more.
[Ram Venkatachalam](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V5zDjyTK3D-qenZtmYE9xZpNE14PhK8W2Un08RaGAszUIz3s8TePyP5zIKiTCMKTQjuo4OFWSyGpmZPnI_R7CwqcyszcvXmwAFbAOFrAUO_u49VLQbPnGdscbuz53r42ftDvQirxEDkF1kO-voiZhCaRD6bE9ESmbbZ5034VI6Xmd9Q2NwUH1By3pjvaxepcqWKR6LCLVOBBV2Fp4hyEhHHZvsSyOfxJAH8kiDbvPUAwk9U16a_J4MNsGXXEsLRIuvHzxVy57pDeS_JTCazFOa4tTmZLOVihfgQQsEEaY1TKTmSw1VercUvJjrtepspEv0jvrPP1Ff0y8TktjfGOR8TT73SRhAqGVcARIL33Yz0uzpo1NW1KcqXQBMeUYbjfUwDeedwschq-B8hBGPc1alvgXLE-yiaTp_eCH9JIK3zjq3I3F5mnDgUcknLivJaEvlGZ92fQ3EWfyM4zZIYf4kevtXXKEmgc&c=pHeluh4FA_wMdoRTjmEcMQt-Uw2xG5r_nbmm8xzqQ0VqthGCqdw23g==&ch=zqP5Aae0OpMjXZ7JXRWDPh2p8GmwJpto7wYlQW3m_QwL_EnRlAm8VQ==): House of Delegates District 26 (Loudoun County - part) [https://ramforva.com/](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V5zDjyTK3D-qenZtmYE9xZpNE14PhK8W2Un08RaGAszUIz3s8TePyP5zIKiTCMKT3F6Ti8N2wjtDZc3pcycLTX27x0bcgahN2dhodjbMlQih6qOWX8KyAU5oFZvQrBDkyfNLPgAnnWHjqvT5S3tptw==&c=pHeluh4FA_wMdoRTjmEcMQt-Uw2xG5r_nbmm8xzqQ0VqthGCqdw23g==&ch=zqP5Aae0OpMjXZ7JXRWDPh2p8GmwJpto7wYlQW3m_QwL_EnRlAm8VQ==)

[Luther Cifers for Virginia Senat](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V5zDjyTK3D-qenZtmYE9xZpNE14PhK8W2Un08RaGAszUIz3s8TePyP5zIKiTCMKTAlm8aQ7In4Pn0pC3OULK2lIgiPlIIBXt0ca97G7CvEa9DzfNJwb2oJCxiQzXysN5VduSFiMLPSh57VDTLha4r18Jm59iHeXzmQUUsK8iaHmNYozwqOhFEjyRD1_s0_WhzZrLWHTH5PiXFIMF5csvETLSwdmLOm-UEUEp5dVmXWvN8ZXoUSbgcmEQMwrYtZZ5fQ0CRuar-qcPZIA2wF_cYWOq-hp7gQ6YFSD6LdtC7lT_He4SiAPsFqh54J5-KH0KZ6kW7xedT8E74t5hLoNr6iEjSxLA0BIvy4GUwAggREVmCwAeapmNUPGLArEvPlej51oMhrNJFfgy8-0dY3sHxQJ9kX1FLcdkFX6bUU5eF90LIKbAqmjxMFIVLNRqvX_KKBm6WAVDsmMTf9HmKWGX8Y7-KLSPvVsh1rdmr6nQvlAZh7uTrSalS11KzaQxqf7EP4oRtJA_eNk=&c=pHeluh4FA_wMdoRTjmEcMQt-Uw2xG5r_nbmm8xzqQ0VqthGCqdw23g==&ch=zqP5Aae0OpMjXZ7JXRWDPh2p8GmwJpto7wYlQW3m_QwL_EnRlAm8VQ==)e: Senate District 10 (Hanover - part, Powhatan, Louisa - part, Goochland, Fluvanna, Appomattox, Buckingham, Amelia, Cumberland, Prince Edward - part), and Henrico - part) [https://luthercifers.com/](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V5zDjyTK3D-qenZtmYE9xZpNE14PhK8W2Un08RaGAszUIz3s8TePyP5zIKiTCMKTO9OG_yV207qI7Y-unaZezX9AFwbuiJrBcbqsppvulTKECdK-06tklugHbwLY_eORz5_iEjLysDUK1Bn0i2IwEA==&c=pHeluh4FA_wMdoRTjmEcMQt-Uw2xG5r_nbmm8xzqQ0VqthGCqdw23g==&ch=zqP5Aae0OpMjXZ7JXRWDPh2p8GmwJpto7wYlQW3m_QwL_EnRlAm8VQ==)
---
| John McGuire Congressional Swearing In Ceremony January 3rd
---
| |
---
| Friends, Come celebrate with us. I will be sworn in as a Member of Congress on Friday, January 3rd, 2025. This is a historic opportunity in our Nations Capitol, and I hope you can make it. [Click here for details.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V5zDjyTK3D-qenZtmYE9xZpNE14PhK8W2Un08RaGAszUIz3s8TePyMGXnCOkJct8MSSmPRdmVFQRDzdYrrXLQqgmB70nNmUJUgSXPTi-r1LdD8M_9COUEX11vKk25GQD6KhI6-fCl5d2t7cYjocdebPjUtTW70AaG5cuWcvZ7h0ti6dsTso55F-gdAOMWgJo2o45VFfdTgs3zMPG6cFLanN5fODgGLAyDvz3zBLCm-fGlx-uMvvWdg==&c=pHeluh4FA_wMdoRTjmEcMQt-Uw2xG5r_nbmm8xzqQ0VqthGCqdw23g==&ch=zqP5Aae0OpMjXZ7JXRWDPh2p8GmwJpto7wYlQW3m_QwL_EnRlAm8VQ==)

On November 5th, through the grace of God, Trump won, we won the US Senate and the House, and John McGuire received the most votes ever in Virginia's 5th district (72,373 more votes than his predecessor received in 2022)! Thank you for your prayers and your vote. We have much work to do. I am looking forward to serving you in VA 05 as a member in the 119th Congress!
---
| For God and Country,
---
|

clean_body: McGuire achives huge VA05 Vote Record | | | | == | == | Virginia Senate District 10 | | | | | | == Team, On Sunday, I attended church in Amelia, County with our new Republican State Senate District 10 Nominee == and his family. Afterwards, we went to lunch and discussed what needs to be done to win on January 7. We plan to continue our message of unity across the district and we ask folks to show grace to all the candidates who did not win Friday. We must put our differences aside and work together as a team. Luther will need your prayers, your vote, dollars for the campaign, sign locations, volunteers, and more. You can donate and learn more at his website here: == | 3 Republicans on the Ballot January 7 | We actually have 3 Republican candidates running in the January 7 special elections for the General Assembly. If you have a friend or family member living in one of these districts, please encourage them to vote RED so that we can support Governor Youngkin's efforts to cut taxes, improve schools, keep our streets safe, and more. ==: House of Delegates District 26 (Loudoun County - part) == ==: Senate District 32 (Loudoun County - part) == : Senate District 10 (Hanover - part, Powhatan, Louisa - part, Goochland, Fluvanna, Appomattox, Buckingham, Amelia, Cumberland, Prince Edward - part), and Henrico - part) == | John McGuire Congressional Swearing In Ceremony January 3rd | | | Friends, Come celebrate with us. I will be sworn in as a Member of Congress on Friday, January 3rd, 2025. This is a historic opportunity in our Nations Capitol, and I hope you can make it. == On November 5th, through the grace of God, Trump won, we won the US Senate and the House, and John McGuire received the most votes ever in Virginia's 5th district (72,373 more votes than his predecessor received in 2022)! Thank you for your prayers and your vote. We have much work to do. I am looking forward to serving you in VA 05 as a member in the 119th Congress! | For God and Country, | State Senator John McGuire Congressman-Elect VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: One small task to get ready for January
body:
There’s just one little thing to do now, so that we are ready for the fight in 2025.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** It's the most wonderful time of the year, and you've worked hard to earn a break. We encourage everyone to take time with family, bask in the knowledge that January 20th is almost here, and take a deep breath of relief.
However, we also know that the left is still fuming and refuses to take time off from their plans to _" defend, defeat, and delay"_ anything that the incoming president plans to do.In a recent email to supporters, the left-wing organization Indivisible has laid out a three-step plan starting in January to take over the trifecta that Republicans rightfully earned and create chaos. The step mentioned above by Indivisible, _" defend, defeat, and delay,"_ continues by saying, _" We won't stop everything but we can stop some things, and we can delay things we can't stop -- using up valuable time they [Republicans] have to do harm. That means peeling off Republicans where we can and stiffening the spines of Democrats to fight back."__
_The left plans to do everything they can to disrupt this presidency, and we cannot let it. So, while we take our time with family and enjoy the season, the fight begins anew in January.

**ACTION ITEM** ************ We need you to help support the incoming Trump Administration's agenda like never before. It's an information war, and you are the soldiers. Please **[sign up on our website](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a880e002/1edb9794a87f681b "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/government-efficiency-poll#supporttrump")** so that you are certain to receive all calls to action regarding President Trump's nominees and agendas.
**Additionally, please send the sign-up link to every Trump voter you know!****** **__** **** ************
---
| | [ TAKE ACTION ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a880e002/1edb9794a87f681d)
---
| **** ******** We must ALL stand up, come January, to the left's unending efforts to _" defend, defeat and delay"_ the agenda you and I both voted for in November.
In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin
---

name: Charles Kelley of Lady A
subject: Help provide needed Christmas meals for service members today
body:
Please give now.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MAKE A MATCHED GIFT*](https://links.e.uso.)
---

[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/gdYehEd-P7JW/UEtKRFEzbWpzU053UHFZdkhzSzdXTTZGR0g4OTFTZjdnUktEU2IzQ3k4Vm1aY25TV0RlVHY1Wk9INUdtMlJIN2diMVZCYm9NSXdOaUFvYWVkN2xkOTBxRmVCanBiRFprdjNVNXFRZ0ZHK1E9S0/ZWZLYkY4QWgrT1BOY0cxajNJM1cyWHozZmlHQS9WU01EeFpXN0NGV2YyUGpBWExzcjVOV1ZEUURHQ3VCdHg4ei9Rb0EzZHNYZ254WHF2MS9pZzl5Z2syZlVpRnJmcHFaS0)
---
Hi USO Supporter,
It's Charles Kelley of Lady A, and today, I'm asking you to **[join me in making a holiday donation to the USO to support our heroes in uniform.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/G49Vhw8Ax~JV/UEtKRFEzbWpzU053UHFZdkhzSzdXTTZGR0g4OTFTZjdnUktEU2IzQ3k4Vm1aY25TV0RlVHY1Wk9INUdtMlJIN2diMVZCYm9NSXdOaUFvYWVkN2xkOTBxRmVCanBiRFprdjNVNXFRZ0ZHK1E9S0/ZWZLYkY4QWgrT1BOY0cxajNJM1cyWHozZmlHQS9WU01EeFpXN0NGV2YyUGpBWExzcjVOV1ZEUURHQ3VCdHg4ei9Rb0EzZHNYZ254WHF2MS9pZzl5Z2syZlVpRnJmcHFaS0)** Let me explain why this is so important.
I'm thankful every day for all the brave heroes who serve our country, and I know the holidays can be particularly tough for those deployed overseas.
While you and I are enjoying the season with our loved ones, they're in a lonely military barracks thousands of miles away from home, just hoping they'll be able to find a secure internet connection and have time to call their families.
The USO is working around the clock to make this season joyful for them, from delivering care packages to providing warm holiday meals. But as a nonprofit, the USO relies on folks like you and me to keep this incredibly important work going.
**Right now, thanks to a match offer from a generous group of donors, all gifts, up to a total of $50,000, will be worth twice as much to help provide holiday meals and other critical support to service members this Christmas and into the new year.**
**[But this offer ends Wednesday, so please, make your tax-deductible gift of $37.50 (becomes $75!) or more to help ensure our heroes can enjoy a warm meal this Christmas.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/G49Vhw8Ax~JV/UEtKRFEzbWpzU053UHFZdkhzSzdXTTZGR0g4OTFTZjdnUktEU2IzQ3k4Vm1aY25TV0RlVHY1Wk9INUdtMlJIN2diMVZCYm9NSXdOaUFvYWVkN2xkOTBxRmVCanBiRFprdjNVNXFRZ0ZHK1E9S0/ZWZLYkY4QWgrT1BOY0cxajNJM1cyWHozZmlHQS9WU01EeFpXN0NGV2YyUGpBWExzcjVOV1ZEUURHQ3VCdHg4ei9Rb0EzZHNYZ254WHF2MS9pZzl5Z2syZlVpRnJmcHFaS0)****
[$37.50 CAN HELP PROVIDE
ONE HOLIDAY MEAL](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[$75 CAN HELP PROVIDE
TWO HOLIDAY MEALS](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-0~g4CN/UEtKRFEzbWpzU053UHFZdkhzSzdXTTZGR0g4OTFTZjdnUktEU2IzQ3k4Vm1aY25TV0RlVHY1Wk9INUdtMlJIN2diMVZCYm9NSXdOaUFvYWVkN2xkOTBxRmVCanBiRFprdjNVNXFRZ0ZHK1E9S0/ZWZLYkY4QWgrT1BOY0cxajNJM1cyWHozZmlHQS9WU01EeFpXN0NGV2YyUGpBWExzcjVOV1ZEUURHQ3VCdHg4ei9Rb0EzZHNYZ254WHF2MS9pZzl5Z2syZlVpRnJmcHFaS0)
---
[$150 CAN HELP PROVIDE
FOUR HOLIDAY MEALS](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[GIVE ANOTHER AMOUNT ](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you and happy holidays!
--Charles Kelley of Lady A
*A generous group of donors is matching all gifts to the USO, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, through December 16, 2024.
**Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.

body:

name: DLCC Membership Team
subject: Here is how we fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| 🛑**There’s no sugarcoating it: Our party faced major setbacks on Election Day. But if you want to keep fighting for our democracy, our rights, our freedoms, and our future, please keep reading.** 👇
---
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers.

Without Congress, these majorities will provide a much-needed check to oppose the worst of the incoming administration.

**Expanding Democratic power in statehouses across the country is the best way to counteract the damage of a second Trump presidency.**
---
We’re committed to building our largest membership team in DLCC history to fight back against the dangerous extremism of Trump and his allies.

As one of our most dedicated supporters, we need you on this team standing alongside us.

Donations from our members each year directly fuel our work to:

✅ Compete in majority-making special elections
✅ Chip away at Republican supermajorities
✅ Identify and flip vulnerable GOP-held seats
_And so much more..._
---

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkhkve625ecgje3bht9olrmkg236q2p5veu20pbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm6pb2chh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcjooilaosjkcl5npvkgrr6e6npmq9i2en7k3958_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm6pb2chh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9oiu1qclrbdj79qfnt2qvuqftvcug5pmhl6fttg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm6pb2chh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z45035vsr070o53pfeuj2chs81cf9kv7lj42hod8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm6pb2chh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu6503mhivgmspe1g89eb0a834ch51kcoonr8im8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshj6epr1chh648d245p25oh4ctj62pj7cdim4p324no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpotfh5jnl9jpmkaofktbrhi3am29kl2sij244i0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm6pb2chh2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5icmvrgj007cgpcid5m7r9ao3gpofanjfh0gba8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm6pb2chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: A mere “toss-up” majority?
body:
I refuse to let all of our hard work be for nothing.

I refuse to let all of our hard work be for nothing.
| Friend – since I last emailed you, this situation has become far more serious.
---
With numerous special elections just around the corner in the new year, our _new_ majority was _already_ going to be facing a razor-thin margin of just 1 seat.
---
But now, with reports indicating that yet another special election will soon be announced, the majority we fought tirelessly for all year long could now be a mere **TOSS-UP!**
---
Trust me, I know just how much time, effort, and resources from hardworking Americans like YOU went into securing such a big victory this November.
---
_That’s why I pulled**$2.5 MILLION** from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest._
---
And now, with everything on the line, I REFUSE to let all of our hard work be for _nothing_.
---
So, before we officially close the books on 2024, I’m looking for **2.5 million PATRIOTS** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of truly ANY amount to help defend our new majority.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any size to match my commitment to DEFEND our new House majority that could soon be a mere TOSS-UP.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvdeekreeooostnsjsv78fq61ffgfmcbuj2mmuo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm6pb2c1h2bs)
---

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9j6ib54g7k18j55fv38cnrpv91fnfm6gvath0j0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm6pb2c1h2bs)
---
[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zardufem630rmcdgr1hk562r53n4qlcu6jqr3t08_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm6pb2c1h2bs)
---

Thank you,
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8mcj3gb4ngei469hi90rtnq1pra4vkdbtnl4sh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm6pb2c1h2bs)
---
Jim Jordan
---
\- - - - Forwarded Message - - - -

**From:** **Jim Jordan**
**Date:** Fri, December 6, 2024
**Subject:** Just 1 SEAT?!
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeaufln02vhr1ef8mdr4v42tjbn1d7iogfflve60_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm6pb2c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Please don’t misunderstand...
---
I don’t want this email to come across as a message of doom and gloom.
---
_After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House _AND_ both chambers of Congress. _
---
But we also must face a glaring reality:
---
**Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT.**
---
Yes, you read that right. _1 seat._
---
I know how hard you fought for this new majority, Friend. I’m right there with you...
---
**Over the course of the election, I transferred _$2.5 million_ from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority.**
---
And now that our new majority could be hanging on by a thread next year, I refuse to let those efforts go to waste.
---
That’s why I have no choice but to reach out before year’s end.
---
I’m asking **_2.5 million patriots_** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of ANY amount to help defend our NEW majority that will soon be cut down to just 1 SEAT.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any size to match my commitment to DEFEND our House majority and SAVE AMERICA.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0g338vt5ldksptfb70r1eq2b1401vnhvn1h0fg8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjm6pb2c1h2bs)
---

---

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmc9sf2r5dlff3hjf1gm8tj6nj7611uaj7pqm0bg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjmeob6cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb4f1blm3tvfvonu3g09jf4iul8rtvvurejkdfro_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjmeob6cjh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrbce3fuegkqgh4bsps7brqabn2ganll1v8f6c6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjmeob6cjh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z48m1r37266sa78090va3i39nm8fjj7ul36er4b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjmeob6cjh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zc15tj4u69hei4u5na1ah3fv4nhdaq5p1un6n3mo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjmeob6cjh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm2eu0vhbt4776jh0mpgapqc4dk8k5l1gc3q78g0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjmeob6cjh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zl779kr9nna5ukjlarquftg2ehp13hm4d0intt78_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkcqb4tjhe6rrfdljkeqjetjnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36ctjm2p34s8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5j6epr1cpie49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z44dcdu0snccu97avg6p754802oahm38sqi1s9ao_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpjmeob6cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo7nkka09596nneaejvp2g58h269v6ihn4umetlg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5j6epr1cpie49fg)
