body:
I will continue to fight this injustice.
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=d191134bc8b845068d0a395fd727aad7&_e=AGSSZie4N8buQlqWt4S7qm2jzqJMppbfJBzzR6ZzDFawqTw6mK-8DqX7P04QqheG48ivA6w7wP2eQODK5LTPOK3N0NwATO_Jw0azZ1Dwd4_n1s1BUsRXZFpI9hRYgEIhaCjdJ_cjzJ5beS8ojC6CxqmqtEHhY9CIM7ippQii8eDVvDLaFepbYfBQ8KBYTsJ6XfgeMsSNMyefq_HwwTkWGMQaJakSz-k9m8wIEKAE03YdsNj5YS3UFjRGHfnf8sMj5q5mixKsOh7FJkn_X1imnxJ0h1LJmJ8auWbvKwhOwB_ihj6PA0bMycFoOWCjdUM-CLfTtAzeBdqVexbjwB4TgPFzLTUazqu2q0dsQHuPthziTFfowxVjLS86XFTxzw8HyKo24qBbTP88ccM3o1AAtSQbXNIF3ii9xtD7wTc-Jw7pDCsWdSJOMe2khN2JGWoa)
---
Dear Peter,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up **_everything_** I own – including my dignity.
---
That’s why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter._
---
Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t!
---
[**But if you can fund my battle to appeal this unjust ruling, please make a contribution of any amount to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund now that I’ve officially appealed this unjust ruling.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=d191134bc8b845068d0a395fd727aad7&_e=AGSSZie4N8buQlqWt4S7qm2jzqJMppbfJBzzR6ZzDFawqTw6mK-8DqX7P04QqheG48ivA6w7wP2eQODK5LTPOK3N0NwATO_Jw0azZ1Dwd4_n1s1BUsRXZFpI9hRYgEIhaCjdJ_cjzJ5beS8ojC6CxqmqtEHhY9CIM7ippQii8eDVvDLaFepbYfBQ8KBYTsJ6XfgeMsSNMyefq_HwwTkWGMQaJakSz-k9m8wIEKAE03YdsNj5YS3UFjRGHfnf8sMj5q5mixKsOh7FJkn_X1imnxJ0h1LJmJ8auWbvKwhOwB8Nh38t5CFFqYts67hd8Lb2EMVUHCxAfi96c2Irw0N5kQgo5v1-zVykmE2sVxSuqSbD0Fwg4zp-1XCCqNz-0gECIAvtKjZ8MQjv8qmuJGli5m20wcyocnnp6pgCQ88pJKvTyUeB1XTrWelvBVdYaj0h)

A confident college student **[tried her best to stump Charlie Kirk](https://substack.com/redirect/e148c4cf-056b-4dfa-a406-52ef8b52a35e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a campus debate with a leading question.
"Do you view democracy as an American value, as something that's very important to this country," she asked. She was clearly expecting him to agree and wanted to get him to defend democracy as the presupposition of her argument. But she instantly crashed and burned.
"No..." Kirk replied. "Where does it say 'democracy' in the Constitution?" **[Watch him completely turn the tables on her.](https://substack.com/redirect/e148c4cf-056b-4dfa-a406-52ef8b52a35e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e148c4cf-056b-4dfa-a406-52ef8b52a35e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e148c4cf-056b-4dfa-a406-52ef8b52a35e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here**
I remember how **the Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.**
And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
* More than 2 million lost jobs
* Stocks plummeting over 20%
* IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling

**We can 't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it.**
That's why I've put together **[a concise guide to help you protect your finances](https://substack.com/redirect/eb71a8b9-fb32-44ae-8357-11b49cbeb86f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during this downturn.
**[Request your free guide now to recession-proof your life](https://substack.com/redirect/eb71a8b9-fb32-44ae-8357-11b49cbeb86f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings.
[Request Your Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/eb71a8b9-fb32-44ae-8357-11b49cbeb86f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Scott Jennings leaves woke colleagues SPEECHLESS with Truth about Trump's Notre Dame visit
CNN Republican pundit Scott Jennings paraded President-elect Donald Trump's early victories this month during a live discussion, and his CNN colleagues actually agreed with him that **[Trump is CRUSHING IT right now.](https://substack.com/redirect/20240d6b-8783-4484-9c46-6a0b0a1406ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"It was striking because he is not the sitting president, he is the president-elect right now and yet here he was meeting with world leaders and really looking quite presidential over the weekend," the CNN host admitted of Trump's visit to Notre Dame.
**[Watch this rare anomaly of CNN coverage here:](https://substack.com/redirect/20240d6b-8783-4484-9c46-6a0b0a1406ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/20240d6b-8783-4484-9c46-6a0b0a1406ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Trump's visit to Paris was widely praised in the media, in a shocking turn of tone towards the President-elect.
World leaders flocked to the event and showed Trump respect and gratitude in an effort to win over the future American leader.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/20240d6b-8783-4484-9c46-6a0b0a1406ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Dec 16 | | | | | | | | | | | A confident college student during a campus debate with a leading question. "Do you view democracy as an American value, as something that's very important to this country," she asked. She was clearly expecting him to agree and wanted to get him to defend democracy as the presupposition of her argument. But she instantly crashed and burned. "No..." Kirk replied. "Where does it say 'democracy' in the Constitution?" Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here I remember how the Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds. And now it looks like history is repeating itself. Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including: More than 2 million lost jobs Stocks plummeting over 20% IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling We can 't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it. That's why I've put together during this downturn. and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings. Trump's visit to Paris was widely praised in the media, in a shocking turn of tone towards the President-elect. The threat is real and immediate: Trump and the Republicans have made clear their intentions to cut Medicaid funding, putting millions of Americans at risk. Such cuts would trigger a devastating and immediate end to health insurance in at least nine states, kicking more than 3 million adults off of Medicaid! _As we work tirelessly to create a more inclusive and equitable society, we need your support to elect Democrats with disabilities and their allies who are committed to ensuring healthcare is recognized as a fundamental human right._ [**By supporting our efforts, you are standing up for a future where healthcare is accessible and affordable for all. Will you chip in to this critical fight to safeguard the health and dignity of every American?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lFbX2zvSPpVYIMuAYbYlfjXND6orG91jEWONVYzQyJ7-63izsbDi2IYQ7dqy_Wh_5ICw-5D-viQnPhwTtuvzQZGxGm_Ovy1Fq9-i5sGAhhVj0rzXyakNL6QCixbMgX4T3jiSYeRsdvXfTzwRQ7czA7n7hJ04xkFHyXBqFpen3L3HxB0sA7xOaDfnTYMeqIznTwREnwcrXpTN7OHx_Y56ZqfCe6EeXnIcEgRkOHbbKVXGEvpSAKa9hLjruJdFaBMaY-GwrbTcEMLl4gtxyPEZrfGE-3psQX8fZxX9X5w5bDNgsYXBh6qP182tUGfCEb5H7Pvr_99Gwn5z4dkbj8NN4hSlz73Ccxga9TrfgZWIamox/4cc/AcfskWryTe2XuUxXEUpplQ/h2/h001.9jebYg9j7GG270oPRk36Clr69OHz1LwSxPKq1IFtADE) **** | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lFbX2zvSPpVYIMuAYbYlfjX1NKy9mw2mxaRrTvZG_OqhXEupozR0-4sm5WJWrLHWLoDqWPj0NsrFr974qFkKktwzn6sJWYrE9n4Le8JDbAKoze07CbqFG4ndMYmKUQnqbb0AifHNPuWt6OlRSi6PGnc63XRwXQROPgB9ZFkZYbe1kFyxRWw-KHVAKrQswMz96r1HBBU2dPvh4G9Z566oh63M54NBLKqZksNu6-RxL9vcVUJuekyYEM84lCKItoetNuxvUzT21xdVahNoCNZWaKTZ_gNbXxOjTrgVQ4bY4Ho-HReIG5yA_TXFYvIxdXQB-XEaABgaM6Jjyvkq1nlySbadjpaDwnOkIVxy-1V3JLcD/4cc/AcfskWryTe2XuUxXEUpplQ/h3/h001.AuseQQgeXeLmzXqz8QJTrk8JAuDmLs1f3LK5I5d-i2I)

****
This is not just a political issue; it’s a fight for the dignity and well-being of our most vulnerable communities.
People with disabilities, low-income families, and seniors are among those who would suffer the most from these proposed cuts.
Medicaid expansion has been instrumental in saving lives and supporting communities by providing coverage for individuals who are unable to afford private insurance options.
**We need leaders who understand these challenges firsthand and who will advocate for policies that protect and expand access to healthcare.**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: This isn't over ... yet
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vshCEMFWN3
American Cornerstone Institute

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to
undermine the Supreme Court...
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oshCEMFWN3

Fellow
Patriot,

This is
Dr. Ben Carson-I'm writing to you personally because your name is
on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the
unborn. And today I need your help.

I know
you're as grateful as I am for the Supreme Court's decision to
overturn Roe. But I'm also concerned that the pro-life movement
will mistakenly think this ruling means the fight is won.

Nothing
could be further from the truth-the fight for life is only just
beginning!

Right
now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the
Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice
democrats and major media outlets to codify abortion-on-demand at
the expense of taxpayers like you.

We cannot
allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority
of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that
abortion should be unrestricted.

We must
stand together to defend a culture of life across America. If we
don't act now, I'm afraid that radicalized idealogues will
continue to seize positions of power and abuse their authority to
advance an anti-life agenda that is bent on the destruction of
the American family.

Today,
I'd like to invite you to join thousands of others who believe
the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to
the pledge I have linked below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64049778:shCEMFWN3:m:3:2627245898:84356DD534D3AC1B0704C0C2A8AE17AA:r

By
signing the pledge, you will join a thriving movement of
principled citizens who are uniting to protect the unborn and
refusing to be silenced by a vocal minority of radicalized
fanatics.

I will do
everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the
spread of the Left's anti-life ideology. Will you take a minute
to stand with me by signing this pledge now?

I'd like
to thank you for joining this critical effort. Together, we can
save thousands of lives from abortion over the next year.

Gratefully,
Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman
American
Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/ishCEMFWN3

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oshCEMFWN3

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/497966903baa536c/?utm_campaign=20241119&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card,
and your checking account.

Imagine all of your money being seized.

_That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me._

I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask
questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...

As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest
legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State —
especially since my own law licenses have been _taken away_ from me!

But there’s one thing I want to make clear...

...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal
Defense Trust.

_THAT’S A LIE. _

The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust,
I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of
course the media and the Democrats will never report that.

And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to
contribute, please don’t. End of story.

name: Tara McGowan, COURIER Newsroom
subject: Help COURIER build a progressive media infrastructure that can fight the right-wing
body:
Trump won because of America’s fractured media ecosystem. COURIER is leading the charge to change that.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98783030/517797553/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmMyNDc5YWEtYzJiYi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MZWbLARG77-HUDvTJW9FXpsoxWUh5UwQ0oeqZeAXM2s=&emci=3e3b4dbe-a1bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c2479aa-c2bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=14016711)
Hey Peter -
It’s Tara McGowan, founder & publisher at COURIER.
Trump didn’t win on policy—he won in large part because of America’s fractured media ecosystem.
**Americans don’t trust legacy media. Local newsrooms have all but disappeared. And more and more voters turn to social media, where the right has a powerful foothold to spread misinformation to the voters who decide elections.**
That’s why I founded COURIER: to rebuild trust in the media and create a strong, progressive alternative to the right-wing misinformation machine.
[**Tonight is our critical mid-month deadline, and we need to raise $3,200 before midnight to stay on track. Can you chip in $25 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98783031/517797554/-593472309?refcode=20241215-EM-MM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmMyNDc5YWEtYzJiYi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MZWbLARG77-HUDvTJW9FXpsoxWUh5UwQ0oeqZeAXM2s=)
Here’s how we’re fighting back:
* **Targeting key battlegrounds:** Our 11 local newsrooms cover battleground states and ‘news deserts,’ delivering the quality local reporting these communities need.
* **Delivering critical local news:** Our reporters focus on issues that matter most to local voters, offering factual, values-driven reporting to combat right-wing disinformation.
* **Meeting voters where they are:** We publish stories directly on platforms like TikTok, Meta, and email—ensuring voters see real news where they’re most vulnerable to lies.

This strategy works. During the last election, COURIER reached millions of voters across social media platforms like TikTok and Facebook.
**But with Trump’s second term looming, our mission is more urgent than ever.**
[**To fund our ambitious plans in the new year, we need your support to make our content freely available to the voters who need it most. Can you chip in $25—or whatever you can—to support COURIER’s mission to build a progressive media alternative?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98783032/517797555/-593472309?refcode=20241215-EM-MM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmMyNDc5YWEtYzJiYi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MZWbLARG77-HUDvTJW9FXpsoxWUh5UwQ0oeqZeAXM2s=)

---|---|---|---
Thank you for standing with us. Together, we can defend democracy from Trump and the far right influencers who enable him.
In solidarity,
Tara McGowan
Founder & Publisher, COURIER

name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: We never like to share bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal
#

We never like sharing bad news with you, but we need to let you know that we fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal last night.
To be honest, this has us a bit worried about our ability to reach our 2024 fundraising goals.
We’re hard at work shaping what our priorities will be for the next four years under the new administration. It’s going to be tough work ahead, but we have the collective power to protect our hard-earned gun safety progress. However, defending this progress is going to take **_a lot_** of resources. Our work to start building those resources started as soon as the election was called for Donald Trump.
So, we’ve crunched some numbers and have set a new goal to receive 1,000 individual contributions by the end of the day today to help us reach the mid-month goal we missed last night.
[**Your support right now would make a HUGE difference. Can we count on you to rush in a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241216-1-b&t=1&akid=9640%2E3935704%2EJkW0z5)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec24.YP__Dn&amount=3&refcode=em241216-1-b&t=20&akid=9640%2E3935704%2EJkW0z5)**

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=9640%2E3935704%2EJkW0z5) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Michelle at United We Dream Action
subject: Immigrants will be the first target
body:
We’re under attack | | | Peter, UWDA’s work for immigrant justice has never been more important as we head into the second Trump era. And let’s just be honest: **Immigrants will be the first target of the new administration.** Trump made it clear during his campaign, with his hateful platform of mass deportations, and his anti-immigrant cabinet picks, that we are under attack. UWDA will lead the charge in defending immigrant rights over the next four years. We’ll be fighting back against any and all anti-immigrant policies, empowering our community with know-your-rights campaigns, training allies on actions to protect immigrants, and building spaces for immigrants to come together and process. I’m not going to lie, it’s going to be hard. We must unapologetically oppose Trump at every turn. But we’re not giving up. **[Right now, we’re gearing up for the fights ahead. We want to start 2025 prepared for anything Trump throws our way. clean_body: We’re under attack | | | Peter, UWDA’s work for immigrant justice has never been more important as we head into the second Trump era. And let’s just be honest: Immigrants will be the first target of the new administration. Trump made it clear during his campaign, with his hateful platform of mass deportations, and his anti-immigrant cabinet picks, that we are under attack. UWDA will lead the charge in defending immigrant rights over the next four years. We’ll be fighting back against any and all anti-immigrant policies, empowering our community with know-your-rights campaigns, training allies on actions to protect immigrants, and building spaces for immigrants to come together and process. I’m not going to lie, it’s going to be hard. We must unapologetically oppose Trump at every turn. But we’re not giving up. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks, Michelle, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today: | |

The truth is, big fights are on the horizon in Ohio. 2025 will be a crucial year as we prepare for key elections that will shape our state’s future and lay the groundwork for success in 2026 and beyond. name: River Gassen
subject: Warm Holiday Wishes from River Gassen
body:
🎄 A Season of Gratitude and New Beginnings | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/riverforcolorado/15daysremaining-8331527?e=3818d77efc)
---
| | | | |
# 🎄 A Season of Gratitude and New Beginnings
---
| To my dear supporters,

As the holiday season surrounds us with its spirit of hope, generosity, and community, I want to take a moment to share my heartfelt gratitude for all your support this year. In November, we made history with the highest margin of support for any Democrat in this district—a testament to our shared vision for our community. Whether you’ve contributed your time, resources, or words of encouragement, your belief in our campaign has meant everything to me.

Your belief in our vision inspired me to keep fighting. Together, we’ve built incredible momentum. From standing up for affordable housing and equitable education to fighting to keep Space Command in Colorado, our shared vision for a brighter future is resonating across this district. I know we can go even further in 2026.

As we look to the new year, we’re looking at ways to kickstart our campaign. This starts with small monthly contributions that we know will add up into success. Your support now will ensure we have the resources to amplify our message, connect with voters, and challenge the status quo.

Would you consider making a contribution today as part of your holiday giving?

---
[Donate Here](https://rivergassenforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=f673db63ed&e=3818d77efc)
| Every dollar helps us stay competitive in this race and bring meaningful change to our community. The sooner we can assemble our war chest - the greater we will be able to multiply it. $20 a month will go a long way right now - especially when we get 100s of supporters chipping in this way.

Contributions made before December 31st will be the showcase of support we demonstrate in the first FEC filing of the 2026 campaign. We need the attention of the DCCC and other organizations to flip this seat - and it starts with you.

Thank you for being part of this journey. Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful holiday season filled with peace, love, and hope.
Warmly,
River Gassen
Democratic Candidate for Colorado’s 5th Congressional District, 2026

---
| | | | | [](https://rivergassenforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=9f86e74ffc&e=3818d77efc)

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Humanity Lost
body:
It’s stunning to me how many people have taken the side of the killer given how cold-blooded his actions were. | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=0b73b9a468&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
| “Guys, defending or justifying shooting a man in the street is a path to hell. Don’t do it.” I posted that on social media and it touched a chord on both sides, getting millions of views and thousands of responses.

I obviously wrote it about the killing of Brian Thompson, the CEO of UnitedHealth. Watching the video of his execution was jarring, like a dystopian scene come to life. It’s stunning to me how many people have taken the side of the killer given how cold-blooded his actions were.

Brian Thompson was the father of two children. Those kids will never see their Dad again.

I’m also sad for Luigi Mangione, a young man radicalized to commit murder who will spend the rest of his life behind bars. A young person becoming a killer is tragic.

Beyond these two lives and families destroyed, I’m sad for what this killing and the reaction to it augur for our society. Amazon has sold over 100,000 green “Luigi” knit hats and the jacket Mangione wore during the shooting has apparently sold out. A demented young man is now an icon to those who feel that the system is rigged against them.
---
|
---
| The first step toward violence is regarding others as less human than you are. To some, a wealthy CEO of a health insurance company is no longer a human being worthy of consideration.

Some would make the argument that UnitedHealth prematurely ended thousands of lives through its business practices. A Zoom was leaked that showed the new UnitedHealth CEO saying that his team should ‘ignore the noise’ and that the company’s practices were sound; one can only guess that it was leaked by an employee on the call. But the practices of a company have nothing to do with the right and wrong of gunning a man down. It’s only when people become figures in a morality play rather than flesh and blood humans that atrocities become subject to argument.

Is this killing a sign of things to come? I fear it is. I have looked into the eyes of a person radicalized by social media yelling obscenities on the street. There was no reason or empathy in those eyes – only hatred. They did not regard their ideological opponents as people, but as enemies to be defeated or conquered.

“The most ferocious fight is never good vs. evil,” someone once told me, “but good vs. good.” People feel that their cause is righteous. Righteousness bleeds into protest which in some cases leads to violence. If you are on the side of justice, what side is your enemy on? And what are you willing to do to ensure that your side wins?

I often think that the antidote to what ails us is to see everyone, including our enemies, as human beings with friends and families. It seems obvious, but it’s becoming less and less the norm in American life.

Is it possible to lower the temperature and raise people’s awareness of our shared humanity? We can only hope so, but the winds are blowing the other direction more and more strongly. The answer is more humanity, not less.

Forward is having an end-of-year [online event](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=c6b011f8d2&e=0f227c2ae3) on Wednesday – [come see](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=767730969f&e=0f227c2ae3) what we’re up to including special announcements and guests! For an in-depth conversation with an economist on the impact of online sports gambling, click on the podcast [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=537f335b01&e=0f227c2ae3).
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=87c4f5a712&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de3fa7d95e&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| | | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&e=0f227c2ae3&c=a846d3d8d9) or [unsubscribe](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&t=b&e=0f227c2ae3&c=a846d3d8d9).
---

Those kids will never see their Dad again. I’m also sad for Luigi Mangione, a young man radicalized to commit murder who will spend the rest of his life behind bars. A young person becoming a killer is tragic. Beyond these two lives and families destroyed, I’m sad for what this killing and the reaction to it augur for our society. Amazon has sold over 100,000 green “Luigi” knit hats and the jacket Mangione wore during the shooting has apparently sold out. A demented young man is now an icon to those who feel that the system is rigged against them. | | The first step toward violence is regarding others as less human than you are. To some, a wealthy CEO of a health insurance company is no longer a human being worthy of consideration. Some would make the argument that UnitedHealth prematurely ended thousands of lives through its business practices. A Zoom was leaked that showed the new UnitedHealth CEO saying that his team should ‘ignore the noise’ and that the company’s practices were sound; one can only guess that it was leaked by an employee on the call. But the practices of a company have nothing to do with the right and wrong of gunning a man down. It’s only when people become figures in a morality play rather than flesh and blood humans that atrocities become subject to argument. Is this killing a sign of things to come? I fear it is. I have looked into the eyes of a person radicalized by social media yelling obscenities on the street. There was no reason or empathy in those eyes – only hatred. They did not regard their ideological opponents as people, but as enemies to be defeated or conquered. “The most ferocious fight is never good vs. evil,” someone once told me, “but good vs. good.” People feel that their cause is righteous. Righteousness bleeds into protest which in some cases leads to violence. If you are on the side of justice, what side is your enemy on? And what are you willing to do to ensure that your side wins? I often think that the antidote to what ails us is to see everyone, including our enemies, as human beings with friends and families. It seems obvious, but it’s becoming less and less the norm in American life. Is it possible to lower the temperature and raise people’s awareness of our shared humanity? We can only hope so, but the winds are blowing the other direction more and more strongly. The answer is more humanity, not less. Forward is having an end-of-year on Wednesday – what we’re up to including special announcements and guests! For an in-depth conversation with an economist on the impact of online sports gambling, click on the podcast . | Andrew Yang Co-Chair, Forward Party | | | Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjvdfipis6oocfusb6h71235pg9esl1s80q7i7f0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge4o72cdh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5si6kv5ghq1n32ac5e2iuoaf9ljrflguuvmi890_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge4o72cdh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6sri9lilukp3e6dke0miba3jk5olraknuevr8ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge4o72cdh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsdo2o91cc5sqd9rvm190nk7kvcu7cglfc4eklj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge4o72cdh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2bbuumelncbbf7hq1ogg5qs1ej1506jkjgragpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge4o72cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpjmeob5c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z577hupbtmahe4k138jfumdvp6us48fn8a4jth38_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge4o72cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze0kbfgdke53binvi75kerf2qr37lnp3putjo780_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge4o72cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Troy Downing
subject: I need your help to take on China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Now is our chance to fight back

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI0MTIxNl9CRC1DTi4xMTAxMTdfdDE1ODc0NTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDEyMTZfQkQtQ04uMTEwMTE3X3QxNTg3NDUxLTI4OTkifQ/EHRwomeu5hsRcqlqdJ0QXg)
---
Peter,

The moment I take my seat in Congress, I’m going to hit the ground running to hold China accountable. From buying up American farmland to stealing our technology, the threats are clear – and I need your voice to help guide my actions.

[**I’ve launched my Defend Against China Survey, and your input is critical. This is your chance to shape the policies I’ll prioritize in my first months in Congress.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI0MTIxNl9CRC1DTi4xMTAxMTdfdDE1ODc0NTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDEyMTZfQkQtQ04uMTEwMTE3X3QxNTg3NDUxLTI4OTkifQ/wQq2vwqzcI6iGHutVrMqDQ)
---
[ RESPOND HERE](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI0MTIxNl9CRC1DTi4xMTAxMTdfdDE1ODc0NTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDEyMTZfQkQtQ04uMTEwMTE3X3QxNTg3NDUxLTI4OTkifQ/1x9hvzJ9w4yXh9BtPb-1vw)

Together, we can take a stand against China’s overreach and defend American sovereignty.

Thank you for standing with me,
Troy Downing

You have to see this, Peter. **In a recent interview, Donald Trump called for the arrest of everyone who served on the House January 6th committee:** _“For what they did, honestly, they should go to jail.”_ Not surprisingly, Trump didn’t mention what they might have done wrong, but that’s because the only thing they did wrong in Trump’s view is to investigate him and expose all of his own misconduct. What’s worse, Trump’s House Republican allies are lining up behind him in support of jailing their colleagues in Congress for performing their duty to uphold the rule of law. **Donald Trump is ready to open the floodgates of political persecution against his adversaries.** That’s why he is packing his cabinet with MAGA loyalists who will do his bidding — like his FBI director nominee Kash Patel, whose only qualification appears to be that he has vowed to go after Trump’s enemies. Last year, Kash Patel referred a tweet of mine to the Department of Justice for a possible criminal investigation. Not surprisingly, the DOJ and FBI declined to act on the baseless and juvenile allegation. **But if Patel is confirmed, he would be able to act on his own bogus complaint against me.** Prosecuting political enemies is the fastest way to dismantle our democracy. **[It’s up to us to speak out as loudly as we can to defend our democracy against Trump’s lawlessness. | | |

| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7ed9b4ef2434ac6b925a54a60b68627&_e=zSJgLu22JNlBAcjunb8v_zK_3dOXsXKwJBqjP3GRzi9F6f6jNyBLnsfJRfb-2N93v9Ccyv06vpLt9hokB11bPBEJ_Jx1QQ-4xh83wJ6R17lyspuNwHDnDVkHYQXAY6THOnhAzqfy018ZVPwLvju2SWCJoVRnxbTPegDCfshFExVkJyNoKHWKKBVJYisnSVDnX6FnzQnvuJ8femojLiHJzh2Jcf2LlAlTfYD7iH5_opGKxEGNAJjsSX8jubLaPHj9wJbp64X52yd8a97l_fgc6N-5dS9fFb1h_b9A7TheTS6MTf7OPhw9_T755lsFec6hlj6Ea02dl5eboiGwfOaHlIGzwoQ_Mr-ThAUT-Rzk-J_9s1fZLUgTHQ-JUPEP014rwlMLpDwG5JsyBqs_ATtJdw%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7ed9b4ef2434ac6b925a54a60b68627&_e=zSJgLu22JNlBAcjunb8v_zK_3dOXsXKwJBqjP3GRzi9F6f6jNyBLnsfJRfb-2N93v9Ccyv06vpLt9hokB11bPBEJ_Jx1QQ-4xh83wJ6R17lyspuNwHDnDVkHYQXAY6THOnhAzqfy018ZVPwLvju2SWCJoVRnxbTPegDCfshFExVkJyNoKHWKKBVJYisnSVDnX6FnzQnvuJ8femojLiHJzh2Jcf2LlAlTfYD7iH5_opGKxEGNAJjsSX8jubLaPHj9DcLPfxDKBO3iAC7vwEFk6J2gyrmeyK0QMq0Sml3Sj7Fkg8jjWx-bGlgw6YHnno7nbbV2E8drH8M9DgOg8-krap88QewR6GxhG3h7ikr-NQ5kD1MAbMDkWqMnRqLPxHkDnFIFd7WYfhxkjl9X_BMyEA%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7ed9b4ef2434ac6b925a54a60b68627&_e=zSJgLu22JNlBAcjunb8v_zK_3dOXsXKwJBqjP3GRzi9F6f6jNyBLnsfJRfb-2N93v9Ccyv06vpLt9hokB11bPBEJ_Jx1QQ-4xh83wJ6R17lyspuNwHDnDVkHYQXAY6THOnhAzqfy018ZVPwLvju2SWCJoVRnxbTPegDCfshFExVkJyNoKHWKKBVJYisnSVDnX6FnzQnvuJ8femojLiHJzh2Jcf2LlAlTfYD7iH5_opGKxEGNAJjsSX8jubLaPHj9wfK6H5SZj3sZgse-0U3EA_i6AJb4LjxNE3C1CqvVDWbXwC5sQQSZ3rJqAdcHX1s4bvnS964R80avAAuzCCS_3kGwqS8eluumIL-5B1hoP2jHXnbqek-AH-Mspy-jmCX8wnD-nEyx8X6nXFxeGnDloQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: I’m not mad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Just disappointed.

| |
---
| | | Listen...

_I 'm not mad. Just disappointed._

I was hoping we've all learned from the last 4 years.

I was expecting Republicans like you to have a point to prove.

I was assuming more red-blooded patriots would've had the guts to give their feedback.

But it hasn't happened yet and there's only so much time to respond now.

**[House Republicans' Official 2025 Agenda Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7vgp8dam3r8r6vi207e4s5831ecrbdo1c1dqc10_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgecpr4c9h2bs "House Republicans’ Official 2025 Agenda Survey") has been re-opened for an extended period just for you and I'm counting on your response.**

Your voice helped bring sweeping victories for Republicans on Election Day and now I need to hear your voice again.

Please don't leave us hanging - you are behind the wheel, and without your guidance, we're driving blind.

_So if you can take just a moment to answer this short survey, we 'd all be eternally grateful._

| BREAKING NEWS: Donald Trump is moving full steam ahead on deporting ALL illegal AND LEGAL IMMIGRANTS Are you terrified yet, Peter? Just take a look at what Trump has said in recent days: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T56ed3a84-43e0-46a7-b891-fa223e4fa1db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| It’s clear that Trump and his unqualified cabinet are showing no mercy on the people who keep America running. Deporting illegal immigrants is horrible to begin with, and ending birthright citizenship is on another level. But with less than a month until his inauguration, we still have time to fight back. ALL OF US need to stand united and do everything we can to derail Trump’s extremist plans that will _not_ make America great again. [That’s why we set a ONE-DAY goal of $100,000 to have the resources for Democrats across the country to fight back against Trump’s mass deportation plans. Will you step up to the plate and rush an emergency donation of $10 or more?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28e3c314-0948-4a09-adf1-70a3397d4039/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: I’m not mad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Just disappointed.

| |
---
| | | Listen...

_I 'm not mad. Just disappointed._

I was hoping we've all learned from the last 4 years.

I was expecting Republicans like you to have a point to prove.

I was assuming more red-blooded patriots would've had the guts to give their feedback.

But it hasn't happened yet and there's only so much time to respond now.

**[House Republicans' Official 2025 Agenda Survey](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7e4irpvbavtp76tjvpf20cnndo0jp9ki83a0lf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge2or1c5h2bs "House Republicans’ Official 2025 Agenda Survey") has been re-opened for an extended period just for you and I'm counting on your response.**

Your voice helped bring sweeping victories for Republicans on Election Day and now I need to hear your voice again.

Please don't leave us hanging - you are behind the wheel, and without your guidance, we're driving blind.

_So if you can take just a moment to answer this short survey, we 'd all be eternally grateful._
| | [**TAKE THE SURVEY NOW**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z9om2lvsq4q6t8kj878ifickjq6dvqnq3jgofdno_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge2or1c5h2bs)
---
| [**EXTENDED DEADLINE: 11:59PM**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ztgpvst71i46e2730oo32j15l4jbrmpks0egk1cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge2or1c5h2bs)
---

Here's to a brighter future for America.

\- Monica De La Cruz (R-TX)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Monica
Subject: Your labor was not in vain.

You did not labor in vain.

The work you put in truly paid off.

And I can't express my gratitude enough.

Last month, you helped make history and we have so much to show for it:

_\- A strong GOP House Majority;
\- A flipped Senate with Republicans back in control;
\- President Trump back in the White House;
\- And most importantly - the opportunity for a better America._

You made your voice heard at the ballot box and you gave us a mandate to turn this country around after years of disastrous leadership under President Biden.

And now the real work begins - _**it 's up to _YOU_ to decide what comes next for our country. **_

Your vision matters more than ever. **[So please, would you do me the honor of sharing your thoughts in the House Republicans' very first Official 2025 Agenda Survey?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ztp1beisv6u2ekk3b3l66ghpkoghrhf6mp5cjil0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge2or1c5h2bs "So please, would you do me the honor of sharing your thoughts in the House Republicans’ very first Official 2025 Agenda Survey?")**
| | [**SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS NOW**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z0ha7elngab9unmi8b7ef8u9qvrplo6f2q11m7p0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge2or1c5h2bs)
---

Biden and the Democrats spent the last 4 years silencing your voice and ignoring your concerns - and you sent them a message they couldn't ignore. So let's show them that we're just getting started and that we will make this country great again.

We're humbly asking all submissions to be completed before 5PM today for official review by House Republicans so time is of the essence. Fill out the Official 2025 Agenda Survey ASAP >>
| [**SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS NOW**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zqa4ere0acbhg93g6pjkmql6kth36boe03qe45g0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge2or1c5h2bs)
---

Thank you for your hard work, dedication, and trust. With your help, we can't fail.

God bless,

| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z20q1ugg5tv6jcao6adqhno3sk60hh8irppgjhs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpge2or1c5h2bs)
---

Congresswoman Monica De La Cruz

clean_body: Just disappointed. | | | | | Listen... I 'm not mad. Just disappointed. I was hoping we've all learned from the last 4 years. I was expecting Republicans like you to have a point to prove. I was assuming more red-blooded patriots would've had the guts to give their feedback. But it hasn't happened yet and there's only so much time to respond now. "House Republicans’ Official 2025 Agenda Survey" has been re-opened for an extended period just for you and I'm counting on your response. Your voice helped bring sweeping victories for Republicans on Election Day and now I need to hear your voice again. Please don't leave us hanging - you are behind the wheel, and without your guidance, we're driving blind. So if you can take just a moment to answer this short survey, we 'd all be eternally grateful. | | | Here's to a brighter future for America. \- Monica De La Cruz (R-TX) \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Monica Subject: Your labor was not in vain. You did not labor in vain. The work you put in truly paid off. And I can't express my gratitude enough. Last month, you helped make history and we have so much to show for it: \- A strong GOP House Majority; \- A flipped Senate with Republicans back in control; \- President Trump back in the White House; \- And most importantly - the opportunity for a better America. You made your voice heard at the ballot box and you gave us a mandate to turn this country around after years of disastrous leadership under President Biden. And now the real work begins - it 's up to YOU to decide what comes next for our country. Your vision matters more than ever. "So please, would you do me the honor of sharing your thoughts in the House Republicans’ very first Official 2025 Agenda Survey?" | | Biden and the Democrats spent the last 4 years silencing your voice and ignoring your concerns - and you sent them a message they couldn't ignore. So let's show them that we're just getting started and that we will make this country great again. We're humbly asking all submissions to be completed before 5PM today for official review by House Republicans so time is of the essence. Fill out the Official 2025 Agenda Survey ASAP >> | Thank you for your hard work, dedication, and trust. With your help, we can't fail. God bless, | Congresswoman Monica De La Cruz | | | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@email.monicaforcongress.org to your address book. Not Sure How? **Team, the holiday season is here, and we're taking this time to show our gratitude for the president and first lady!**

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb957fdf8b0748e8ac76990b6428e9d2&_e=gj6PBOpryAv_HYh4wn17pAZ3WYu7Ypzsw-QgqB7bpNsWJ5QQBpVHrymC-FLfGduI8AQws8DBnajXxJNfcFzmah_TDQohDFJAr-tAZmuX_PfgGoKe8oGC2PCjh2hQB82Gxyd02a4FSRxTcoy_kne4_Y3GhqWbin6IbEuaAhWcyu1kai2XSnfLFBawVTzEpiMGTGu9D7zFnfUyqVSi1FlngcZdfdf4luy8eqVJ01xzsvFRC1z95c-MOCJ1MxTJ24q33X77BlkbmYTM7cp3mCLKmjoRPhhi-HY3lpITHj6eCapQr8QRvkUKM-blwA0myP_-SY6WK58Nr6o6rONKQ8EwzW0JWdWkPTJrLjUpL1ES_m3M-K6gNkRrEfzSJWiPiyKzPDC4I7hKcCT-PARbjd4W5Q%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb957fdf8b0748e8ac76990b6428e9d2&_e=gj6PBOpryAv_HYh4wn17pAZ3WYu7Ypzsw-QgqB7bpNsWJ5QQBpVHrymC-FLfGduI8AQws8DBnajXxJNfcFzmah_TDQohDFJAr-tAZmuX_PfgGoKe8oGC2PCjh2hQB82Gxyd02a4FSRxTcoy_kne4_Y3GhqWbin6IbEuaAhWcyu1kai2XSnfLFBawVTzEpiMGTGu9D7zFnfUyqVSi1FlngcZdfdf4luy8eqVJ01xzsvFRC1z95c-MOCJ1MxTJ24q3Sz-Aaytfsj7BuqwORmgv9NQ7vf69U8UsrYq2TEMi0EqFW3ATSwVwdMQCGgvP10L3kVt-f5U63ZD5yoRcZvNlgR1bEBKu7CgXcWQxBodANOLG9e5ODZilH1-rgpy0-88bzSJ2luljpXQQJDRMXFZ0Lg%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb957fdf8b0748e8ac76990b6428e9d2&_e=gj6PBOpryAv_HYh4wn17pAZ3WYu7Ypzsw-QgqB7bpNsWJ5QQBpVHrymC-FLfGduI8AQws8DBnajXxJNfcFzmah_TDQohDFJAr-tAZmuX_PfgGoKe8oGC2PCjh2hQB82Gxyd02a4FSRxTcoy_kne4_Y3GhqWbin6IbEuaAhWcyu1kai2XSnfLFBawVTzEpiMGTGu9D7zFnfUyqVSi1FlngcZdfdf4luy8eqVJ01xzsvFRC1z95c-MOCJ1MxTJ24q3OGiu0TVEljFT6Ij2RI87ZMPlRA7kYYRm3NyU57J8ftQjDd0Vf8AkWHb704AO-Xnz-gAuHDKvQ2PVpmZSgYp0DWZaRX0B8QNCQY_o3q2k0NjN8dzteoDsAvu7rBA4sR1y2G5fl-NFtua26NIzc8j4dA%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb957fdf8b0748e8ac76990b6428e9d2&_e=gj6PBOpryAv_HYh4wn17pAZ3WYu7Ypzsw-QgqB7bpNsWJ5QQBpVHrymC-FLfGduI8AQws8DBnajXxJNfcFzmah_TDQohDFJAr-tAZmuX_PfgGoKe8oGC2PCjh2hQB82Gxyd02a4FSRxTcoy_kne4_Y3GhqWbin6IbEuaAhWcyu1kai2XSnfLFBawVTzEpiMGTGu9D7zFnfUyqVSi1FlngcZdfdf4luy8eqVJ01xzsvFRC1z95c-MOCJ1MxTJ24q3Tt1EYonGy5OUFFn9EgdwQSeKcW7SZmcL1_5_bhCkVZdJi6orjASGqGTjv4dQMSWlM_GZyPApo6avK4CObdVYNpMTK61RkyUutUHJrMDJY0gCLVZdg9n6zNwOZ4kMJzJPeWR3DN9FUqz4ksLP51yZ4w%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Full Mag News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=eb957fdf8b0748e8ac76990b6428e9d2&_t=-TwcNhYVSv5UbHmeDDUNCWX6bBZ6BN-dZl6djp3WAsYO5cIDC9ZO8cY4e4dxbYX4tL4ykX9iuS-xX8q8C1dxaze814pR7W1y-jLY-N9u0kA3vmuSrZEx9BPpTqDFUrFWZ8aUw_Qq964CswrfA9gxzdDLw8efP2R8z6WQ6xRWy5o%3D)

| | Dear patriot, **President Trump was elected to change this town.** And now, he’s nominating the leaders we need to _**DRAIN THE SWAMP**_ and save America: **Pete Hegseth:** A proven warrior ready to END wokeism in the military. **Tulsi Gabbard:** A former Democrat standing strong against endless wars. **Kash Patel:** The fighter we need to CLEAN HOUSE at the FBI. These are the disruptors who will hold the powerful accountable and restore America’s greatness. But here’s the problem: **RINOs are blocking Trump’s appointees.**
---

---
_Some so-called Republicans are more interested in their _**own careers**_ than keeping their promises to the American people. _ They’re standing in the way of patriots like Pete, Tulsi, and Kash— _leaders ready to fight for our values and deliver the change Trump promised._ This isn’t just about politics; it’s about the future of our country. If **Republicans don’t deliver, this party will end.** __That’s why**House Freedom Fund** is rallying conservatives across America to hold the Senate accountable.__ _**[Will you join us? Together, we can push Trump’s nominees through and show the RINOs that MAGA voters mean business.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znvuq7affqhu2van9tv7hu93itfo52oq6ael8d48_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgeapb6clh2bs)**_ **Matt Gaetz already got taken out by the swamp! We CANNOT afford to lose ANOTHER appointment! ** _**[👉 Join House Freedom Fund and fight for Trump’s nominees!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfmro3fcaoce58vpv1jc52n3232lbdkqcf2tkn8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cpgeapb6clh2bs)**_

clean_body: We have an emergency 24 hours to close the gap. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter, I just got off the phone with our finance team. I really don’t want to put a damper on your Monday morning, but we fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Hitting this goal was the key to keeping us on track for our final year-end fundraising deadline on December 31st, and with so little time to catch up, we need to act fast to close the gap! = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, George * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

These are the disruptors who will hold the powerful accountable and restore America’s greatness. But here’s the problem: **RINOs are blocking Trump’s appointees.**

subject: You won't believe what this MSNBC liberal said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
Friend - Yes, I'm a proud black conservative, and it drives liberals crazy!

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=24a8c978f3444265a4f493c1da59818a&_e=lBk_vqDo2NBtwXtCoM9F1pt3R1lMUbHAh5oSG3c1w7fadagrle9VNcT-61p-xX9Ul7Nzkamik0_37fkq73j9sVv7rGDCIQCd8rkQe_IoVRxAnn4yEFScmKUroDNQO36p0maN3XQmK-_hxwijXHMqPUvkXwdtQw-rYfn9DnNCBbJKyETvi00_389MNBM47wGbeOvTbqjH8Bn_AwfRp_daJF6VK-7Uqc6F3lgZbBlAnsjtrcu-yQF2Qti6hYwtMnLlJOpnCuGholEX9xsGID8bqQvMvLuGXR7OTtVhM2ijoKSwxjcGsl5ClrQF3wxkaa6FMuqbNURDTokgDt5QKrEEsVlyYNmj7zvxxZWN5RI6meb9397aA-bn-LFZP8mgS3pCjTEN-UfycrcSj9spd7XExeGWQ4PyDubJ57U3QMuvC4Fn0V7estW_0mp2hVxuY8gz)

| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=24a8c978f3444265a4f493c1da59818a&_e=lBk_vqDo2NBtwXtCoM9F1pt3R1lMUbHAh5oSG3c1w7fadagrle9VNcT-61p-xX9Ul7Nzkamik0_37fkq73j9sVv7rGDCIQCd8rkQe_IoVRxAnn4yEFScmKUroDNQO36p0maN3XQmK-_hxwijXHMqPUvkXwdtQw-rYfn9DnNCBbJKyETvi00_389MNBM47wGbeOvTbqjH8Bn_AwfRp_daJF6VK-7Uqc6F3lgZbBlAnsjtrcu-yQF2Qti6hYwtMnLlJOpnCuGholEX9xsGID8bqQvMvLuGXR7OTtVhM2ijoKTc-1U2x9MRtXC7TSRSwTp71m7TMhipPmNzWBRq46bsJiiwaG37DiFbtJ5TgO_bhMnCPHdbG8KLn-NHH3GgPm1LUqAM8Tpc-P5LNX7YDqrdOVpmJTfAxcFw9oa7QOejf7SKsLkEoZ9RUtRPp5fVAMkn)
---

Peter, I'm tough. I'm battle-tested. I am ready to take on the liberal media head-on and call them out for their hypocrisy.

My husband is black. My children and grandchildren are black. I am black. Why is it that when I speak out in support of conservative policies, my motives are immediately questioned?

Liberals just can't wrap their heads around the fact that I dare to think differently, that I am not beholden to their political agenda simply because of the color of my skin.

When I became the first woman Lt. Governor of Virginia - of either party - the liberal media just couldn't handle that I was a conservative Republican.

Trust me, I have been called lots of names over the years. But these attacks from the liberal media only embolden me to keep fighting to spread our conservative message.

---
| | | [HELP SPREAD OUR CONSERVATIVE MESSAGE HERE >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=24a8c978f3444265a4f493c1da59818a&_e=lBk_vqDo2NBtwXtCoM9F1pt3R1lMUbHAh5oSG3c1w7fadagrle9VNcT-61p-xX9Ul7Nzkamik0_37fkq73j9sVv7rGDCIQCd8rkQe_IoVRxAnn4yEFScmKUroDNQO36p0maN3XQmK-_hxwijXHMqPUvkXwdtQw-rYfn9DnNCBbJKyETvi00_389MNBM47wGbeOvTbqjH8Bn_AwfRp_daJF6VK-7Uqc6F3lgZbBlAnsjtrcu-yQF2Qti6hYwtMnLlJOpnCuGholEX9xsGID8bqQvMvLuGXR7OTtVhM2ijoKRrGkkuHIAOosBZFu8m4eQeTzHhbHiO8IuUhJ8n0m5mkHpEu4kROSFFs7v4D3sw2nhb8ejRZaO8liE8jr4iQFNGPtWA677daCKeaHIQwwX_rESO0nlYIxECOf893AGcmkqsGTK1GPBZSNj6baB1LQW6)
---

Here's the truth: I used to be a Democrat. I believed that the Democrats were the party that would put average people like me first. Guess what? I was wrong!

Republicans are the ones fighting to lift folks out of poverty and away from being dependent on the federal government -- access to a quality education -- free of indoctrination. Good-paying jobs in the private sector and a safe and secure community are the principles I am fighting for every single day.

Frankly, when I hear liberals on MSNBC attacking me, I know I must be doing something right!
---

I'm Winsome Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.

Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more.

clean_body: Friend - Yes, I'm a proud black conservative, and it drives liberals crazy! | | | | | | | Peter, I'm tough. I'm battle-tested. I am ready to take on the liberal media head-on and call them out for their hypocrisy. My husband is black. My children and grandchildren are black. I am black. Why is it that when I speak out in support of conservative policies, my motives are immediately questioned? Liberals just can't wrap their heads around the fact that I dare to think differently, that I am not beholden to their political agenda simply because of the color of my skin. When I became the first woman Lt. Governor of Virginia - of either party - the liberal media just couldn't handle that I was a conservative Republican. Trust me, I have been called lots of names over the years. But these attacks from the liberal media only embolden me to keep fighting to spread our conservative message. | | | Here's the truth: I used to be a Democrat. I believed that the Democrats were the party that would put average people like me first. Guess what? I was wrong! Republicans are the ones fighting to lift folks out of poverty and away from being dependent on the federal government -- access to a quality education -- free of indoctrination. Good-paying jobs in the private sector and a safe and secure community are the principles I am fighting for every single day. Frankly, when I hear liberals on MSNBC attacking me, I know I must be doing something right! "This is my call to action: Can you chip in $15 to help us spread our positive conservative message?" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Fighting back against the liberal media and the entire Democrat establishment is never easy. Still, with patriots like you on my side, I know we will win in November and beyond. | - Winsome Sears (R-VA) | Immigrant. Marine Veteran. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. "That’s why I’m reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor." This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. |

clean_body: | | | | | What a year it has been, friend. Every victory we have achieved—from winning the House, Senate, and Presidency—has brought us closer to securing the American Dream. Americans delivered a mandate, but our mission is far from over. As we look to the future, we have an incredible opportunity to achieve even more, but it will require a continued commitment from supporters like you. Right now, Tom is just $3,706 away from hitting his year-end goal and he is counting on you to help close the gap and start the New Year off strong. | | | | | | | | With your help, we will head into 2025 with the strength and momentum needed to continue the fight for the future of our great nation. Join us as we write the next chapter of American history—ensuring that everyone has a chance to succeed. Your support will make all the difference. Thank you in advance for your generosity. name: Jim Jordan
subject: A mere “toss-up” majority?
body:
I refuse to let all of our hard work be for nothing.

I refuse to let all of our hard work be for nothing.
| Friend – since I last emailed you, this situation has become far more serious.
---
With numerous special elections just around the corner in the new year, our _new_ majority was _already_ going to be facing a razor-thin margin of just 1 seat.
---
But now, with reports indicating that yet another special election will soon be announced, the majority we fought tirelessly for all year long could now be a mere **TOSS-UP!**
---
Trust me, I know just how much time, effort, and resources from hardworking Americans like YOU went into securing such a big victory this November.
---
_That’s why I pulled**$2.5 MILLION** from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest._
---
And now, with everything on the line, I REFUSE to let all of our hard work be for _nothing_.
---
So, before we officially close the books on 2024, I’m looking for **2.5 million PATRIOTS** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of truly ANY amount to help defend our new majority.
---

With numerous special elections just around the corner in the new year, our new majority was already going to be facing a razor-thin margin of just 1 seat. But now, with reports indicating that yet another special election will soon be announced, the majority we fought tirelessly for all year long could now be a mere TOSS-UP! And now, with everything on the line, I REFUSE to let all of our hard work be for nothing. * **TOP NEWS**

"**Trump deportation plans put spotlight on Starr County, Texas,** " Dallas Morning News' **Aar on Torres **-- "Starr County, a lightly populated stretch of farms and ranchland along the Texas-Mexico border, made a splash last month by supporting a Republican presidential candidate for the [first time in 132 years](https://substack.com/redirect/ac62f08b-2e88-460b-b76f-fb021e5ee34d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

National headlines followed a few weeks later when Texas Land Commissioner **Dawn Buckingham** invited President-elect **Donald Trump** to [build an immigrant detention center](https://substack.com/redirect/c0106379-a8dd-49e2-9cf8-a4ae12fcbd0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on a state-owned 1,400-acre ranch less than a 10-minute drive from Rio Grande City, the county seat.

Trump promised mass deportations during his campaign. Texas' offer to place an immigrant detention center on state-owned near the U.S.-Mexico border indicates that such an effort could have a significant impact on largely rural, largely Hispanic parts of the state.

Residents of Rio Grande City aren't sure what to make of the plans. Many have seen vague reports on the news but lack key details, and city officials also have been kept in the dark about the state's plans.

Some residents, viewing illegal immigration as a security threat, are supportive. Others are opposed, seeing a deportation processing camp as a black eye for the community.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/8310f2c8-4144-4cc1-95a7-8cb25e6f203b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Mindful that the county's median household income is half that of the typical Texas family, still others see a potential source of sorely needed jobs.

"This has been, traditionally, one of the poorest areas in the country," said GOP state Rep. **Ryan Guillen** , who lives in Rio Grande City. "This could increase the type of income for the area as well."

Trump's promise to deport millions of immigrants who lack legal status would require massive detention facilities, and Buckingham said Texas wants to help.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/8310f2c8-4144-4cc1-95a7-8cb25e6f203b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"We are completely united with President Trump to rid our country of illegal, violent criminals," Buckingham said at a recent news conference.

Carrying out a massive number of deportations would require coordination among several federal agencies and a large commitment of law enforcement personnel. Additional detention space also would be a priority.

Most of the 41,000 beds in Immigration and Customs Enforcement detention facilities are already in use, with more than 38,000 people in ICE custody on Nov. 3, according to data compiled by Syracuse University's Transactional Records Access Clearinghouse." Carrying out a massive number of deportations would require coordination among several federal agencies and a large commitment of law enforcement personnel. Additional detention space also would be a priority. Most of the 41,000 beds in Immigration and Customs Enforcement detention facilities are already in use, with more than 38,000 people in ICE custody on Nov. 3, according to data compiled by Syracuse University's Transactional Records Access Clearinghouse." Vice President JD Vance has had **_ENOUGH_** of Democrats and deep-state puppets smearing Pete Hegseth’s good name.
“The effort to tank Hegseth's nomination is one of the most coordinated smear campaigns I've ever seen in DC.” - JD Vance.
The reason Dems want Pete Hegseth gone is because they’re **_TERRIFIED_** of a Defense Secretary who is strong, fearless, and would lead an America-First Military.
As we speak, deep-state bureaucrats are spreading heinous lies about Pete Hegseth; defaming his character and his family in an attempt to tear him **_DOWN_** and make him **_WITHDRAW_** his nomination.

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Trump deportation plans put spotlight on Starr County, Texas,** " Dallas Morning News' **Aar on Torres **-- "Starr County, a lightly populated stretch of farms and ranchland along the Texas-Mexico border, made a splash last month by supporting a Republican presidential candidate for the [first time in 132 years](https://substack.com/redirect/65068625-6841-458b-855c-3bb2aac4f803?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

National headlines followed a few weeks later when Texas Land Commissioner **Dawn Buckingham** invited President-elect **Donald Trump** to [build an immigrant detention center](https://substack.com/redirect/6a58c948-f2aa-47d3-aa76-b7eb7bcdc9bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on a state-owned 1,400-acre ranch less than a 10-minute drive from Rio Grande City, the county seat.

Trump promised mass deportations during his campaign. Texas' offer to place an immigrant detention center on state-owned near the U.S.-Mexico border indicates that such an effort could have a significant impact on largely rural, largely Hispanic parts of the state.

Residents of Rio Grande City aren't sure what to make of the plans. Many have seen vague reports on the news but lack key details, and city officials also have been kept in the dark about the state's plans.

Some residents, viewing illegal immigration as a security threat, are supportive. Others are opposed, seeing a deportation processing camp as a black eye for the community.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/bf764441-b31f-48ae-baf3-c4a856b75e68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Mindful that the county's median household income is half that of the typical Texas family, still others see a potential source of sorely needed jobs.

"This has been, traditionally, one of the poorest areas in the country," said GOP state Rep. **Ryan Guillen** , who lives in Rio Grande City. "This could increase the type of income for the area as well."

Trump's promise to deport millions of immigrants who lack legal status would require massive detention facilities, and Buckingham said Texas wants to help.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/bf764441-b31f-48ae-baf3-c4a856b75e68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"We are completely united with President Trump to rid our country of illegal, violent criminals," Buckingham said at a recent news conference.

Carrying out a massive number of deportations would require coordination among several federal agencies and a large commitment of law enforcement personnel. Additional detention space also would be a priority.

Most of the 41,000 beds in Immigration and Customs Enforcement detention facilities are already in use, with more than 38,000 people in ICE custody on Nov. 3, according to data compiled by Syracuse University's Transactional Records Access Clearinghouse."
