($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Trump deportation plans put spotlight on Starr County, Texas, " Dallas Morning News' Aar on Torres -- "Starr County, a lightly populated stretch of farms and ranchland along the Texas-Mexico border, made a splash last month by supporting a Republican presidential candidate for the . National headlines followed a few weeks later when Texas Land Commissioner Dawn Buckingham invited President-elect Donald Trump to on a state-owned 1,400-acre ranch less than a 10-minute drive from Rio Grande City, the county seat. Trump promised mass deportations during his campaign. Texas' offer to place an immigrant detention center on state-owned near the U.S.-Mexico border indicates that such an effort could have a significant impact on largely rural, largely Hispanic parts of the state. Residents of Rio Grande City aren't sure what to make of the plans. Many have seen vague reports on the news but lack key details, and city officials also have been kept in the dark about the state's plans. Some residents, viewing illegal immigration as a security threat, are supportive. Others are opposed, seeing a deportation processing camp as a black eye for the community. Mindful that the county's median household income is half that of the typical Texas family, still others see a potential source of sorely needed jobs. "This has been, traditionally, one of the poorest areas in the country," said GOP state Rep. Ryan Guillen , who lives in Rio Grande City. "This could increase the type of income for the area as well." Trump's promise to deport millions of immigrants who lack legal status would require massive detention facilities, and Buckingham said Texas wants to help. "We are completely united with President Trump to rid our country of illegal, violent criminals," Buckingham said at a recent news conference. Carrying out a massive number of deportations would require coordination among several federal agencies and a large commitment of law enforcement personnel. Additional detention space also would be a priority. Most of the 41,000 beds in Immigration and Customs Enforcement detention facilities are already in use, with more than 38,000 people in ICE custody on Nov. 3, according to data compiled by Syracuse University's Transactional Records Access Clearinghouse." Trump promised mass deportations during his campaign. Texas' offer to place an immigrant detention center on state-owned near the U.S.-Mexico border indicates that such an effort could have a significant impact on largely rural, largely Hispanic parts of the state.

Residents of Rio Grande City aren’t sure what to make of the plans. Many have seen vague reports on the news but lack key details, and city officials also have been kept in the dark about the state’s plans.

Some residents, viewing illegal immigration as a security threat, are supportive. Others are opposed, seeing a deportation processing camp as a black eye for the community.

Mindful that the county’s median household income is half that of the typical Texas family, still others see a potential source of sorely needed jobs.

“This has been, traditionally, one of the poorest areas in the country,” said GOP state Rep. **Ryan Guillen** , who lives in Rio Grande City. “This could increase the type of income for the area as well.”

Trump’s promise to deport millions of immigrants who lack legal status would require massive detention facilities, and Buckingham said Texas wants to help.

“We are completely united with President Trump to rid our country of illegal, violent criminals,” Buckingham said at a recent news conference.

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) | TOP NEWS “Trump deportation plans put spotlight on Starr County, Texas, ” Dallas Morning News' Aarón Torres — “Starr County, a lightly populated stretch of farms and ranchland along the Texas-Mexico border, made a splash last month by supporting a Republican presidential candidate for the . National headlines followed a few weeks later when Texas Land Commissioner Dawn Buckingham invited President-elect Donald Trump to on a state-owned 1,400-acre ranch less than a 10-minute drive from Rio Grande City, the county seat. Trump promised mass deportations during his campaign. Texas' offer to place an immigrant detention center on state-owned near the U.S.-Mexico border indicates that such an effort could have a significant impact on largely rural, largely Hispanic parts of the state. Residents of Rio Grande City aren’t sure what to make of the plans. Many have seen vague reports on the news but lack key details, and city officials also have been kept in the dark about the state’s plans. Some residents, viewing illegal immigration as a security threat, are supportive. Others are opposed, seeing a deportation processing camp as a black eye for the community. » Mindful that the county’s median household income is half that of the typical Texas family, still others see a potential source of sorely needed jobs. “This has been, traditionally, one of the poorest areas in the country,” said GOP state Rep. Ryan Guillen , who lives in Rio Grande City. “This could increase the type of income for the area as well.” Trump’s promise to deport millions of immigrants who lack legal status would require massive detention facilities, and Buckingham said Texas wants to help. » “We are completely united with President Trump to rid our country of illegal, violent criminals,” Buckingham said at a recent news conference. Carrying out a massive number of deportations would require coordination among several federal agencies and a large commitment of law enforcement personnel. Additional detention space also would be a priority. Most of the 41,000 beds in Immigration and Customs Enforcement detention facilities are already in use, with more than 38,000 people in ICE custody on Nov. 3, according to data compiled by Syracuse University’s Transactional Records Access Clearinghouse." name: Katherine Clark
subject: When women succeed, America succeeds

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98792660/517828569/1680197594?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTFhM2QxOC1kMmJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pONR5CAEniPSnaP-Uo4DaNbjAK4g5wyaHvYVRtQ7ky0=) Peter, my commitment to advancing women’s rights is stronger than ever. I first decided to run for Congress because I’ve lived through the challenges of being a working mom. Those experiences have fueled my work to defend women’s reproductive freedom, expand women’s health care, ensure every woman has a fair shot at success, and give women the voice they deserve. **But those same ideals are now under attack by Donald Trump and his allies. ** The GOP’s decades-long assault on reproductive rights has resulted in a wave of suffering that has been felt by women nationwide. Trump’s Vice President-elect, JD Vance, has mocked women for not being able to have children. And Trump’s nominee for Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth, believes that women shouldn’t serve in combat roles in the military. Not to mention Project 2025 and the extreme right wing’s plans to dismantle reproductive healthcare access for women nationwide. **I don’t want to live in a world where women aren’t treated as equals, Peter, and it’s not one I want future generations to live in, either.** That’s why my colleagues and I are committed to building a future where women are given the respect they deserve. That starts with giving women a seat at the table, and I’m proud that House Democrats are going to be swearing in more women than ever before. But there’s much more work to be done. [_**This fight can’t be won without you, Peter. That’s why I’m asking: Will you stand with me and my Democratic colleagues in the fight to advance women’s rights by signing my petition today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98792663/517828572/1690078517?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTFhM2QxOC1kMmJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pONR5CAEniPSnaP-Uo4DaNbjAK4g5wyaHvYVRtQ7ky0=&emci=c501c402-cdbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9a1a3d18-d2bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=30620316) | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98792666/517828574/1690078517?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTFhM2QxOC1kMmJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pONR5CAEniPSnaP-Uo4DaNbjAK4g5wyaHvYVRtQ7ky0=&emci=c501c402-cdbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9a1a3d18-d2bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=30620316)

body:
As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84648?refcode=em20241216-8692&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8692%2E614464%2Ekv9SpX)
Peter,
As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022.
However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia.
Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone!
Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth.
**[That’s why I’m asking you to invest in my campaign and Lucas Kunce’s today as we build the strongest foundation possible. Even $5 or $10 makes a big difference!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84648?refcode=em20241216-8692&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8692%2E614464%2Ekv9SpX)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84649?refcode=em20241216-8692&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=8692%2E614464%2Ekv9SpX) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84649?refcode=em20241216-8692&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=8692%2E614464%2Ekv9SpX) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84649?refcode=em20241216-8692&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=8692%2E614464%2Ekv9SpX) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84649?refcode=em20241216-8692&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=8692%2E614464%2Ekv9SpX) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84649?refcode=em20241216-8692&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=8692%2E614464%2Ekv9SpX) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84649?refcode=em20241216-8692&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=8692%2E614464%2Ekv9SpX) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84648?refcode=em20241216-8692&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8692%2E614464%2Ekv9SpX)

Thank you,
Abigail

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ce62f641100d404eb5f22ba17a1ec0a7&_e=zPvei-f9EeuY3zoTPZf9gFUqJZ02bLT_oU4s33AXU4dE9RhPYgqtdiaDBe9ittRIl2XtERlXpY6lrYVsP7x1MDIBx1fspWoVoTJTkyp4Z7qI7xIrqNEvBb-L06rqCeG0Qdkz1KzNRIXjskDJIFH8XuLVm4FecTjP-UgAyOg4WUauVEitb1BD_BAynuXmXzXFCPFelOpPdHXvMG5YlNXH_T6SniA6_Y_hz5drEkY5J2Ll6ZpFoYfpF8ubBHoZX2gBlF_dEukiBcm5PHjE45jBPjtaMPzVldQ25QaWB6x5cc_getD_xxCJ4cm63RuHgsS34lQOh_c2ZWK7nxCor4pCiSILy3lnM0p_7wH02AOwVqwEe-zG3yocF0CywzLRr7AG3gqiTABv4ZAuLlTgaoXDdA%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ce62f641100d404eb5f22ba17a1ec0a7&_e=zPvei-f9EeuY3zoTPZf9gFUqJZ02bLT_oU4s33AXU4dE9RhPYgqtdiaDBe9ittRIl2XtERlXpY6lrYVsP7x1MDIBx1fspWoVoTJTkyp4Z7qI7xIrqNEvBb-L06rqCeG0Qdkz1KzNRIXjskDJIFH8XuLVm4FecTjP-UgAyOg4WUauVEitb1BD_BAynuXmXzXFCPFelOpPdHXvMG5YlNXH_T6SniA6_Y_hz5drEkY5J2Ll6ZpFoYfpF8ubBHoZX2gBGqUdQw0xKChisDIwPjKTK9n6HwVlbdj9RjYUKka-Aky7QA5fbs5LIHU8Ap9-YQvA3NBmBlZF1NEoP4XFiJdQQTHWbGLbW4Rh6VxErq7av0xQiE7gwO-o7wUCK9ASJhn61ggZdzPFoInlJMJb4xyAiA%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ce62f641100d404eb5f22ba17a1ec0a7&_e=zPvei-f9EeuY3zoTPZf9gFUqJZ02bLT_oU4s33AXU4dE9RhPYgqtdiaDBe9ittRIl2XtERlXpY6lrYVsP7x1MDIBx1fspWoVoTJTkyp4Z7qI7xIrqNEvBb-L06rqCeG0Qdkz1KzNRIXjskDJIFH8XuLVm4FecTjP-UgAyOg4WUauVEitb1BD_BAynuXmXzXFCPFelOpPdHXvMG5YlNXH_T6SniA6_Y_hz5drEkY5J2Ll6ZpFoYfpF8ubBHoZX2gBSc0ou9nN42xlcUixWJfG3Xz8ouqb-uNCK2QwgIDwAqGnrPCKn2mLDGemx_lK8ZiUue0b1SYSV11HxE0G0JiZCugq2bj2xGehJVpiKfQG7T4s-vUM3jeAanj2AnE2cGDf3JkeFiP_bnyr4VfRcEEyFQ%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ce62f641100d404eb5f22ba17a1ec0a7&_e=zPvei-f9EeuY3zoTPZf9gFUqJZ02bLT_oU4s33AXU4dE9RhPYgqtdiaDBe9ittRIl2XtERlXpY6lrYVsP7x1MDIBx1fspWoVoTJTkyp4Z7qI7xIrqNEvBb-L06rqCeG0Qdkz1KzNRIXjskDJIFH8XuLVm4FecTjP-UgAyOg4WUauVEitb1BD_BAynuXmXzXFCPFelOpPdHXvMG5YlNXH_T6SniA6_Y_hz5drEkY5J2Ll6ZpFoYfpF8ubBHoZX2gBUv4hYVRHyy2DTcG6pVQrDArmrik18pH_oBTNljFXgQIpusnZiG6GgrPWz6DFanMSHw1b8VarpCXCkBTs6ocnDLOgwh1ouyWfPTRRrA1SSik-yR2C6byG1gkF_ATMZSqEiEPYJl0jvm20R5_jleKGOA%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Time really is running out
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Hi friend,
Time really is running out. We’re halfway through December, just 9 days from Christmas and the start of Hanukkah, and just 3 weeks away from my “Meet the Whips” Happy Hour at Federal House on January 6, 2025 from 5-7 pm .
Chief Deputy Whips Vaughn Stewart and Melissa Wells will join me to celebrate the new year and discuss the 2025 Legislative Session. We also want to hear about the issues that matter most to you and your family.
As we say goodbye to 2024, I can promise that Melissa, Vaughn, and I are ready for anything that comes our way in the new year. Together, we’ll continue to fight for the rights of all Marylanders .
If you’d like to join us, click here [http://bit.ly/JazzJan6] or visit bit.ly/JazzJan6 [http://bit.ly/JazzJan6] . If you prefer to contribute by check or money order, mail your donation to Friends of Jazz Lewis, c/o Rice Consulting, 17 W Courtland St, Ste 210, Bel Air MD 21014.
Hope to see you there,
Jazz

name: DNC HQ
subject: Our records show you haven’t gotten your very own Democratic Member Card before. We’d love to change that this year.
body:
We’re gearing up to release our Official 2025 Democratic Member Card, but first, we need your input.
---
Derek, **We’re getting ready to release our Official 2025 Democratic Member Card, but first, we want to hear from you!** Our records show you haven’t had a chance to get a member card before, and we’d love to change that this year. But the first step is sharing your feedback. Here’s what we have on file for you: _**Democratic National Committee 2025 Member Card Record**_ **Name:** Derek
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Previous Member Card Holder:** No ❌
**Suggested Action:** Share Your Input On This Year’s Designs
**[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241216_2400_so&t=1&akid=2411%2E22930333%2E3lIuss)** As a key member of this grassroots team, your input is extremely valuable as we choose this year’s design. [**So we’re asking: Can you take a few seconds to tell us which member card design is your favorite? The sooner we hear from you, the sooner we’ll be able to get the winning design ready to print and ship:**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241216_2400_so&t=2&akid=2411%2E22930333%2E3lIuss) [](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241216_2400_so&t=3&akid=2411%2E22930333%2E3lIuss)

[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241216_2400_so&t=5&akid=2411%2E22930333%2E3lIuss)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241216_2400_so&t=6&akid=2411%2E22930333%2E3lIuss)
Thank you in advance for sharing your thoughts, and for everything you’re doing.
The Democrats
[**Don’t forget — after you cast your vote on your favorite member card design, make a $3 donation to reserve your card ahead of time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?refcode=em_20241216_2400_so&amount=3&refcode2=2411_22930333_3lIuss&akid=2411%2E22930333%2E3lIuss)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=em_20241216_2400_so&refcode2=2411_22930333_3lIuss&akid=2411%2E22930333%2E3lIuss)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Israel War Update
subject: Syria has Fallen, So What’s Next?
body:
Syria has fallen, but we are still far from seeing the last of the hostages returned.

[View Email In Browser](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9FcZ/?__vbtrk=MjY1NTYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1NTYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "View Email In Browser")
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Fd0/?__vbtrk=MjY1NTYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1NTYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Headline") Fellow Supporter of Israel: Syria has fallen, but we are still far from seeing the last of the hostages returned. Syria has fallen, but we are still far from seeing the last of Jewish bloodshed as a result of the war started by barbarians on October 7, 2023. Syria has fallen and the so-called ceasefire has too. Our brave soldiers must fight to secure Israel’s borders, rid the region of emboldened attackers all over the Middle East, and adapt to the escalating threats from Syria, but Israel doesn’t have enough supplies to properly win this war. **[Can you support our IDF sons and daughters with just $36 as they are forced to continue fighting for the Survival of the Promised Land?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Fd0/?__vbtrk=MjY1NTYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1NTYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Can you support our IDF sons and daughters with just $36 as they are forced to continue fighting for the Survival of the Promised Land?")** The bloody battlefields on our Northern and Southern borders, the attacks from Yemen, threats from Syria and direct attacks to and from the Head of the snake in Iran exact tremendous costs of life. We are in the fight for our lives against once again against enemies to whom our annihilation is their raison d'etre and the “ceasefire” appears unlikely to last. Yet, now, as in 1948, our State and our way of life are on the line... and our "Hagana," our IDF will not rest until our enemies get the message that we are not going anywhere. But they need bulletproof vests. They need Med kits. They need heavy winter coats and other emergency supplies that we simply don’t have the funds to provide them. **[That’s why we’re asking you to support the Israel Emergency Fund with a gift of any amount to ensure the Israel can effectively prevent complete chaos in the Middle East.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Fd0/?__vbtrk=MjY1NTYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1NTYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "That’s why we’re asking you to support the Israel Emergency Fund with a gift of any amount to ensure the Israel can effectively prevent complete chaos in the Middle East.")** What Israel has overcome since October 7, 2023, has been nothing short of miraculous but the body count is rising. The brave IDF fighters require our support more than ever. They need supplies, clothes, food, and other necessities that we provide to them as Winter comes once again and the wars rage on. The latest developments in Syria increase the burden to the IDF and our security forces. **[Your gift of any amount - $100, $50, even $25 - can provide medical, tactical, and other support to our tireless IDF soldiers.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Fd0/?__vbtrk=MjY1NTYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1NTYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Your gift of any amount - $100, $50, even $25 - can provide medical, tactical, and other support to our tireless IDF soldiers.")** Can they count on you today? clean_body: Exclusive 24-Hour Offer: Pre-Order Your 2025 Membership Card Now and Keep Your Streak Alive | | | | Dear Friend, This is Julia from House GOP Membership Services. We're auditing our members, and I noticed you are on track to have one of the longest membership streaks in House GOP history! I talked to House Leadership about this extraordinary circumstance and as a small token of our appreciation, we are offering you "EARLY ACCESS to PRE-ORDER your 2025 membership card." | | | "Generic Button" | | | "Generic Button" This is your chance to pre-order your 2025 Membership and keep your streak alive. By renewing now, you'll not only maintain your status as a sustained Republican Member, but you'll also be one of the first to receive your new membership card. We've just emerged from a historic presidential election, and the stakes are higher than ever. The Left is regrouping, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters to stay vigilant and keep pushing forward. "Renew your membership TONIGHT and let us know you're committed to fighting for our values and our country." | | | "Generic Button" | | | "Generic Button" Thank you, and God Bless America, Julia, House GOP Membership Office | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Budget Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: We’ll be honest with you »
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Falling behind right now could leave our candidates in the states without the critical resources they need to defeat their Republican opponents in upcoming special elections. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Earlier this year, with the support of this grassroots team, we crushed our fundraising goals. The funds we raised made a difference at our ballot level on Election Day – but we will be honest with you: **Since the top-of-ticket losses last month, our fundraising has taken a turn for the worse. ** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsOpbiH4z4INAYfLFgFMiGKluwFkSI-FIFj_tOVeSwTNCIYiz1laiADhEaby7fxlLoJcXpPnt8OpaWifiYXCdCbFIP4KCSY1Iqt3QucnbYdRq0e0IDzKf9p1lvOrqKSMwY_uA8eN_bu3qvW-Ht_QpiI3ngYLik0jQYHNGRHy_zBvf81UecLWgTe2_VkrwSgMXjWhqHZO_O2ewsfK_N6hnya6yEmD77i2-Jvm8O1dC5RrgQNf-1rtk80p3hAGXXM3eDGtQ4Rkanp2BqodAeVoMZCVFU3M0-rjB4VTAO_4nhQOuVLu40R0ifpTO-A_NNB8CsGYmO1ud6WEUCFxYr5ljw0zy6JsL1ovT7f84BdhR4-Tf17B78xqcW2cjaNkdbAa-k/4cc/1M-WEgeDQ8CEKfTRlBWR9A/h0/h001.d0Oxx2TK1TXdlRmTEyDLDaERvzjjuKOYMvGDcyQ_bBw) [Can you make a quick contribution of $7 or more to help state Dems get back on track?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsOpbiH4z4INAYfLFgFMiGKluwFkSI-FIFj_tOVeSwTNCIYiz1laiADhEaby7fxlLoJcXpPnt8OpaWifiYXCdCbFIP4KCSY1Iqt3QucnbYdRq0e0IDzKf9p1lvOrqKSMwY_uA8eN_bu3qvW-Ht_QpiI3ngYLik0jQYHNGRHy_zBvR4tZILp3wQo1QP7Dz3nVx_HgKyBseCujVIBK10HnTnwOIFYYvVU_b4n_UonREdZz4gTyEahFA0FnE8fn9URUTvCc89_baPhu5hVYMNoC9v1xn5Pru4zDZF_rvWppgkAW1aTwhk6IuVG6-6t0aQOm0BsWOEok0NtNUeV3ocS8-g3YporM2QTvqK3eSoTAFMd88iMcb2uKTJglgeeBakrVdE/4cc/1M-WEgeDQ8CEKfTRlBWR9A/h1/h001.jVrty2G_IRobTo-_-uRYvJPwhhaUOTHZLImtaQM4ASI) Fundraising might have slowed to a trickle, but _state Democrats have not stopped fighting for our freedoms and against extreme Republicans_. **In fact, we are just _weeks away_ from our next special elections – three races in Virginia. ** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Falling behind right now could leave our candidates in states like Virginia without the critical resources they need to defeat their Republican opponents, and open the door to MAGA extremists to expand their power in statehouses.
These upcoming races could set the stage for state Dems in 2025. **With a Republican trifecta in Washington set to take power next month, the stakes in the states have never been higher.**
[We’re relying on you to step up with a $25 or even $7 donation ahead of these key elections to help us regain our momentum and secure victories for state Dems in places like Virginia and beyond → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsOpbiH4z4INAYfLFgFMiGKluwFkSI-FIFj_tOVeSwTNCIYiz1laiADhEaby7fxlLoJcXpPnt8OpaWifiYXCdCbFIP4KCSY1Iqt3QucnbYdRq0e0IDzKf9p1lvOrqKSMwY_uA8eN_bu3qvW-Ht_QpiI3ngYLik0jQYHNGRHy_zBvdD7HLVX2R8GTCE4V0gzyeF0znrPSIPnK7dsdjFLKuoXlc64QZ5k3tqw3OVwxphXNKW6bx0mM5vhfoJfmNpN-IbytAfPTZ5ZuTQuqUJQSf1JgSGBMXnY8ARgmHcTLhaJHG8KtFGZ3ELePgaufSllhes-sVQPHYvWsJ5nFlgEaQ7MDm5CX-I3RycNNDsxJUcKhThyvFX2paK6rMtU5hqqspM/4cc/1M-WEgeDQ8CEKfTRlBWR9A/h8/h001.XRxqoCNzOzWnAAHG8M5Ddwta7Tx1F1EGs_URdHbCf9g)

Fundraising might have slowed to a trickle, but state Democrats have not stopped fighting for our freedoms and against extreme Republicans. name: Brad Finstad
subject: This has to stop
body:
| | | |
---

I recently sent a letter urging Minnesota State University officials to demand the resignation of Professor Kevin Parsneau. Why? Because his comments on Facebook were appalling. When asked about the suspected killer of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, Parsneau said he would be “disappointed” if the suspect wasn’t a serial killer. Let that sink in. Unfortunately, this isn’t an isolated incident. Just last year, college presidents at some of our nation’s top universities couldn’t even answer whether calling for genocide against Jews constitutes as bullying and harassment. And just months ago, the Left’s violent rhetoric fueled two assassination attempts on President Trump. This kind of extremism has no place in our communities, classrooms, or political discourse. I’m fighting back against the radical Left and their dangerous rhetoric, and I appreciate your support as we call it out for what it is. Thank you,[****](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ-7sBGIy40Agg7L4k3A4zErowdLR5KGijB99ak4wBe3zU2u5GpWIKJ0QzhmM)

Brad Finstad Minnesota's 1st Congressional District

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Enough Is Enough: We Need Action Against Gun Violence
disclaimer_text: paid for by the NRA, will stop at nothing to block sensible gun reform
body:
Sensible gun control will save lives.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vrfyc-ohsqkl-kyd76rh7/)
---
# **We Need Action Against Gun Violence**
---
|
---
| | | | folks, Today, we woke up to yet another school shooting—another senseless tragedy caused by gun violence. Madison, Wisconsin joins the growing list of communities devastated by a loss that should never have happened. This is a tired story, one that’s written far too often. Families torn apart. **_Futures stolen._** And the heartbreak only deepens each time it happens. D.C. politics have failed us. Senators like Ted Cruz, bought and paid for by the NRA, will stop at nothing to block sensible gun reform. They’ve proven time and time again that the safety of our children and our communities comes second to the interests of gun lobbyists. **_But that does not mean we are powerless._** Real change can start _now_ —at the local level. Ballot initiatives, state-level bills, and grassroots activism have the power to make a difference where Washington has failed. Together, we can chip away at the influence of special interests and demand the gun control measures that will save lives. Our thoughts are with the families and community impacted by today’s tragedy, but thoughts and prayers alone will not end this epidemic of violence. It’s time to act. It’s time to demand better. [**_Let’s take back the power and fight for meaningful, life-saving change—starting in our local communities. Join us to stand against gun violence, demand sensible reform, and protect the lives of future generations._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vrfyc-ohsqkm-kyd76rh8/)
---
Thank you for your attention on this pressing matter, -No Dem Left Behind Team
---

---

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: A stunning figure:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/I39iBbjg46kKVWxmPoBmAQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpQvGbP0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZ1eqbGBnhp4U8FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | Peter, Given the dialogue around the election, here’s a stunning figure: In 2024, the House majority was decided by just _7,309_ votes across _three districts_ out of 148 million votes cast nationwide. That’s less than the population of Monmouth, Illinois! Yet, the post-election autopsies online and in some corners of the Capitol seem convinced that Democrats’ problems exclusively boil down to “identity” politics. I think many of these people need to get offline and around real people who want to get to know each other and rally around each other’s challenges. And remember that our best days are when we work together to solve problems, not rip each other apart over our differences. We mustn’t omit vulnerable people because an opposing party vilified them in an election. We mustn’t create scapegoats out of issues that affect entire communities. Democrats need to focus on lifting all ships, not sinking an innocent few who only dare to be themselves. [**If you agree, sign my petition today demanding that Democrats continue to protect all communities, no matter how vulnerable.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/J1Clp1Qndv2Zb_TbNiOmtw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpQvGbP0RqaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb25uZXR3b3JrLm9yZy9mb3Jtcy9sZXRzLWZpZ2h0LWZvci1mcmVlZG9tLWFuZC1saWJlcnR5LWZvci1hbGwtcHJvdGVjdC12dWxuZXJhYmxlLWNvbW11bml0aWVzL1cDc3BjQgpnV6psYGeGnhTwUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAGw~~) | **[Add Your Name](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/J1Clp1Qndv2Zb_TbNiOmtw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpQvGbP0RqaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb25uZXR3b3JrLm9yZy9mb3Jtcy9sZXRzLWZpZ2h0LWZvci1mcmVlZG9tLWFuZC1saWJlcnR5LWZvci1hbGwtcHJvdGVjdC12dWxuZXJhYmxlLWNvbW11bml0aWVzL1cDc3BjQgpnV6psYGeGnhTwUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAGw~~)**
---
I am honored every day to fight for freedom and liberty in the U.S. Congress. And by freedom, I mean freedom to make your own decisions about your healthcare and your life. And by liberty, I mean liberty to your own self determination and identity.
Always grateful to have you by my side,
-Eric

These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

body:
I served as Florida’s Chief Financial Officer with Ron DeSantis

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=426149daaebd4a10bec3b98c6f9255ca&_e=eJiuT2JnkArEOcqbT3ha7q5L5hu7H6yr9CDB0hPpjNx1YWmjZOBxEpFI-RGc1BtjXwtQP1IGbK57TjCeAuRHj7L_vHSHcUV4T5oRh7QWo-KOTzNVm5Kv030fSqiw89EIAJGG12I2R5z7DQhekPMVgAklgREkl-1ybMZwSV1VrQTDeg8zJbSPQh6usWalFPZTwMojaqz9yhowU7ZqbcA1pHmD2543PzbL0phv5neV6wgdMS0DRIC-xbRvzBxMwX1Zsq2xuruqZMTVj886t-um7ujNZJzIsaZHV7ivLLA7NCg%3D)

| | Fellow Patriot, my name is Jimmy Patronis.
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=426149daaebd4a10bec3b98c6f9255ca&_e=eJiuT2JnkArEOcqbT3ha7q5L5hu7H6yr9CDB0hPpjNw53wlmMog7LrED_b1MGnAufvUoQcqVET2_6z9PEBsTWIUicniRzvCM3ujkf5JZFQxOPcTajkIGHP-Zja9WyChcAJuXGt7VWNiLDB7N9jVY4UVCL_DF7XZl2zoAQ8CSInDRE9qKlW8QASoRu1SflHGRaxQ2weaeNO-yhngEkJjfC5h3U6RhTNQtBd_xiexdSNJQYEOGd2gQe7dJt_EkFlkiY8fUukYaGi3XvSoI253_8g%3D%3D)
---
I served as Florida’s Chief Financial Officer with Ron DeSantis, and I was proud to be a part of the team that helped make our state the strongest in America. **With our House Majority razor-thin, we need to make sure Matt Gaetz’s replacement is a fierce ally of President Trump and will vote to pass his MAGA agenda. As a day one supporter of President Trump, I have decided to resign from my statewide office to run for Florida's 1st Congressional District and be a steadfast conservative voice for this country.** **[Democrats are seeing this Special Election as an opportunity to tighten the majority and ruin Trump’s plans to restore America. That’s why I need you on my team, and why I need you to fuel this fight.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=426149daaebd4a10bec3b98c6f9255ca&_e=eJiuT2JnkArEOcqbT3ha7q5L5hu7H6yr9CDB0hPpjNx1YWmjZOBxEpFI-RGc1BtjXwtQP1IGbK57TjCeAuRHj7L_vHSHcUV4T5oRh7QWo-KOTzNVm5Kv030fSqiw89EIAJGG12I2R5z7DQhekPMVgD62mwHkW-y1ASPBO0GYHb9dCUtcQHffbzycbGCjZ1QKYXHuuOpAm-Zfd7A3bgGLEolsvgCE9ggNA4LQfp7fGke95j2khrtNKp51TmnlD2NnMsiq06-6lZ8aYurzQpBC4YsCAMrh4sdYQcU684BfGAU%3D)**
---
[**HELP SEND JIMMY TO CONGRESS**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=426149daaebd4a10bec3b98c6f9255ca&_e=eJiuT2JnkArEOcqbT3ha7q5L5hu7H6yr9CDB0hPpjNx1YWmjZOBxEpFI-RGc1BtjXwtQP1IGbK57TjCeAuRHj7L_vHSHcUV4T5oRh7QWo-KOTzNVm5Kv030fSqiw89EIAJGG12I2R5z7DQhekPMVgFZo4ZRWn_BWr6dLtPFmMzR9y_8OnXouNicWQSvIi5Qpo2UkCf3DE7uLs4brHXmNwUSebT16kFKRyqw9Co9kgZ5Msjky7jp0wIHnlogHi-p7fYzQj3YV9qGZwAVNng6O2neNDPSadJGs8OmXPov49MI%3D)
---
President Trump trusts me to enact his America FIRST agenda in Congress because he knows I’m 100% MAGA. That’s why President Trump FULLY endorsed me in this race.

We must get our message to voters, and if you’re a proud Trump voter, I need you to step up and make sure we hold onto this seat. [**Can you chip in a donation to support my America-First campaign for Congress?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=426149daaebd4a10bec3b98c6f9255ca&_e=eJiuT2JnkArEOcqbT3ha7q5L5hu7H6yr9CDB0hPpjNx1YWmjZOBxEpFI-RGc1BtjXwtQP1IGbK57TjCeAuRHj7L_vHSHcUV4T5oRh7QWo-KOTzNVm5Kv030fSqiw89EIAJGG12I2R5z7DQhekPMVgDsjJ36zycZ2v3rXPwGCXTknZ617WP86kWEWy67iaPMr7SeyOiK_kBRV9dLK-1-MXVGnJsUq11SFyfIZHx--hwTT4gepJl2W7rNSvXQ-Cfzt4xP7_xsdWVlpgjNbWov4NeM4hI_0vQOGzuX-XGXHLjM%3D) [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=426149daaebd4a10bec3b98c6f9255ca&_e=eJiuT2JnkArEOcqbT3ha7q5L5hu7H6yr9CDB0hPpjNx1YWmjZOBxEpFI-RGc1BtjXwtQP1IGbK57TjCeAuRHj7VyLCToiQXySz_UqQDf6Ua5i1dCPYr5tf_fAAi0nUZvECU5lDbT0OryF8f-TPMOz_tnPFmQC3XCCBw7h_7GFXGB5YQ0BqUvCOmQ1KYG0eiwALoJpdDWHjYIPLlMXVMTdVX8ui_WEmsD56FhfGFE52dY9EZzm9zpEJ1V9pomy6oSRjfKp5N5JSzuW8tpdOZJgw%3D%3D)

Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College released an online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a8078c3014564f5885dceee9cb99aec5&_e=LSoTNNuxvuSnQl0vGRJP_mHqEu_iS-W-A7ivYeRF3y-CKtJ7TJiZYUdTs1sXEnac5pLT52p8bjH55NoFWsY-TaaXxW05cvh71bQdDQnO7DS2aTX0-rqL06KF0qRSXT5iXteKhvZI3IuB9tjM-56Uu_2LeW8Vcmr893utz2Beo7zmtPtfvMIhcr1aKMr-9HNj8PG53LwRZKNWYin6auDpsHKLERR3DXdEAIBJsrMvuhs52UV-v2t8xw3_wbtNcBvSwmfNoAcYePcJrMZf6OG87bgld7182fnl0huAkW2b69ysyAolyKVbD3l3bT0asbbNZCdkvL5MINXvoJCIVRkdeoEY0fCyb8JRr5R8KFzFcwbxfh8elwR9hkzLl5ojib6P7NxlHzLamexQ_2-uU_w8pA%3D%3D)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Democrats just flipped another House seat in California from red to blue! 🎉 THE HILL : “Final House race decided one month after Election Day” CNN: “Democrats’ flip in California concludes final unresolved US House race” MSNBC: “Rep.-elect Adam Gray's House win spells trouble for GOP's slim majority” But that’s not all. With two more House Republicans joining the Trump administration — and Matt Gaetz resigning 👋 — the next Congress will start with 217 Republicans and 215 Democrats. That’s the slimmest House majority in history. But as long as Republicans hold that majority, the things we care about most — the Affordable Care Act, Social Security, and more — will be under threat. The first $41,300/$15,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to the DNC. The next $3,300/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Harris for President’s Recount Account. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting **info@kamalaharris.com**.The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

body:
Just disappointed.

| |

| | | Listen...

_I 'm not mad. Just disappointed._

I was hoping we've all learned from the last 4 years.

I was expecting Republicans like you to have a point to prove.

I was assuming more red-blooded patriots would've had the guts to give their feedback.

But it hasn't happened yet and there's only so much time to respond now.

From: Monica
Subject: Your labor was not in vain.

You did not labor in vain.

The work you put in truly paid off.

And I can't express my gratitude enough.

Last month, you helped make history and we have so much to show for it:

_\- A strong GOP House Majority;
\- A flipped Senate with Republicans back in control;
\- President Trump back in the White House;
\- And most importantly - the opportunity for a better America._

You made your voice heard at the ballot box and you gave us a mandate to turn this country around after years of disastrous leadership under President Biden.

clean_body: Just disappointed. | | | | | Listen... I 'm not mad. Just disappointed. I was hoping we've all learned from the last 4 years. I was expecting Republicans like you to have a point to prove. I was assuming more red-blooded patriots would've had the guts to give their feedback. But it hasn't happened yet and there's only so much time to respond now. "House Republicans’ Official 2025 Agenda Survey" has been re-opened for an extended period just for you and I'm counting on your response. Your voice helped bring sweeping victories for Republicans on Election Day and now I need to hear your voice again. Please don't leave us hanging - you are behind the wheel, and without your guidance, we're driving blind. So if you can take just a moment to answer this short survey, we 'd all be eternally grateful. | | | Here's to a brighter future for America. \- Monica De La Cruz (R-TX) \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Monica Subject: Your labor was not in vain. You did not labor in vain. The work you put in truly paid off. And I can't express my gratitude enough. Last month, you helped make history and we have so much to show for it: \- A strong GOP House Majority; \- A flipped Senate with Republicans back in control; \- President Trump back in the White House; \- And most importantly - the opportunity for a better America. You made your voice heard at the ballot box and you gave us a mandate to turn this country around after years of disastrous leadership under President Biden. And now the real work begins - it 's up to YOU to decide what comes next for our country. Your vision matters more than ever. "So please, would you do me the honor of sharing your thoughts in the House Republicans’ very first Official 2025 Agenda Survey?" | | Biden and the Democrats spent the last 4 years silencing your voice and ignoring your concerns - and you sent them a message they couldn't ignore. So let's show them that we're just getting started and that we will make this country great again. We're humbly asking all submissions to be completed before 5PM today for official review by House Republicans so time is of the essence. Fill out the Official 2025 Agenda Survey ASAP >> | Thank you for your hard work, dedication, and trust. With your help, we can't fail. God bless, | Congresswoman Monica De La Cruz | | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@email.monicaforcongress.org to your address book. Not Sure How? Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. , , , , | Paid for by Monica for Congress PO Box 4605 McAllen, Texas 78502 https:/// |

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: Our 2024 Wrapped
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98797573/517844314/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmE2NjAzYS1kZGJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PozKvGMTSufzKvJKcXxz4FMyUk6Vu48_jNd5d0yjwCM=) As the 118th Congress comes to a close, I’m reflecting on everything we’ve achieved together to improve the lives of our community. Though the outcome of the presidential election was not what we wanted, we’ve made real progress that we should all take pride in — and work hard to protect. One of the accomplishments I’m most proud of is **passing a law** in this deeply divided Congress — ensuring that the Grand Ronde Tribe here in Oregon receives the land compensation they are owed by the federal government. My team and I also secured **over $14 million** in federal funding for critical community projects across OR-06. From improving access to clean drinking water in Independence to expanding broadband in Sherwood, these investments are already making a difference in people’s lives. Altogether, I’ve worked across the aisle to **introduce 21 bills and cosponsor 155 more** — addressing key issues like expanding access to mental health care, supporting Oregon’s farmers, and making housing more affordable for working families. [_**My approach is simple: I put people over politics and solutions over empty sound bites, and that will be true no matter who the president is. If that resonates with you, I’d love your support. Together, we’ve accomplished so much this term, and I know that together, we can defend what we’ve achieved and keep fighting for a better future. Can you donate today to help us keep pushing for progress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98797574/517844315/-1905085255?refcode=email_121624_2024-wrapped&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmE2NjAzYS1kZGJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PozKvGMTSufzKvJKcXxz4FMyUk6Vu48_jNd5d0yjwCM=) | | [Donate Now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98797575/517844316/-1905085255?refcode=email_121624_2024-wrapped&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmE2NjAzYS1kZGJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PozKvGMTSufzKvJKcXxz4FMyUk6Vu48_jNd5d0yjwCM=)

Peter, While we didn’t get the results we were hoping for at the top of the ticket, there’s no denying the MAJOR momentum we’ve been building here in the Peach State. Right now, it’s more important than ever that we’re staying united against Donald Trump’s Project 2025 and continuing to connect with voters in every corner of the state. Peter, our ability to keep Georgia blue and secure yet another Senate victory in 2026 relies on it. That’s why we’re reaching out to our top supporters to build up our Voter Engagement Fund — to give our team on the ground the resources they need to keep pushing Georgia blue, changing minds one conversation at a time. Hey there, we just wanted to bump this for you. The housing crisis is impacting everyday families across the country. The New Democrat Coalition is working on winning common-sense solutions that will tangibly address this crisis, but we need broad grassroots support to get the job done. **[Will you sign on and endorse the Affordable Housing Action Plan today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98797887/517845266/1562382639?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjZjN2Y3Ni1kZWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKW8B3EFFGtqSCOoBxDgcX4rLJaQXikvljUGzmmmoNY=&emci=992170a9-7db6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9b6c7f76-debb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=13891387)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98797888/517845268/1562382639?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjZjN2Y3Ni1kZWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKW8B3EFFGtqSCOoBxDgcX4rLJaQXikvljUGzmmmoNY=&emci=992170a9-7db6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9b6c7f76-debb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=13891387)

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Nikki Budzinski** <info@nikkibudzinskiforcongress.com>
Date: Tues, Dec 10, 2024
Subject: Our path foward
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98797889/517845269/-822722586?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjZjN2Y3Ni1kZWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKW8B3EFFGtqSCOoBxDgcX4rLJaQXikvljUGzmmmoNY=)

Hey there, I hope you’re doing well.
The next House session is around the corner and my team and I are doing everything we can to craft an agenda that centers the everyday working families of the 13th District.
I’m honored to serve as the New Democrat Coalition’s upcoming Vice-Chair, leading on good-faith, bipartisan policy that advances innovative, inclusive, and forward looking policies. At the top of our list for this upcoming session is addressing the housing crisis that is affecting every corner of this country.
**[Earlier this year we released our Affordable Housing Action Plan that would address the lack of affordable housing nationwide and offer solutions that will deliver the relief to allow people to stay in safe, secure, and affordable housing. Will you endorse the New Dem Coalition’s Affordable Housing Action Plan today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98797890/517845270/1562382639?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjZjN2Y3Ni1kZWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKW8B3EFFGtqSCOoBxDgcX4rLJaQXikvljUGzmmmoNY=&emci=992170a9-7db6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9b6c7f76-debb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=13891387)**
[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98797891/517845271/1562382639?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjZjN2Y3Ni1kZWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKW8B3EFFGtqSCOoBxDgcX4rLJaQXikvljUGzmmmoNY=&emci=992170a9-7db6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9b6c7f76-debb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=13891387)
---
This plan addresses affordable housing directly and offers solutions to expand and strengthen low-income housing tax credits, promote and fund job training programs, and pass legislation that would stabilize rates of eviction.
These policies are favored on both sides of the aisle and we can’t let partisan politics get in the way of making an impact on this crisis.
**[We could use more support in 18326 — will you add your name and endorse our Affordable Housing Action Plan today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98797893/517845272/1562382639?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjZjN2Y3Ni1kZWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKW8B3EFFGtqSCOoBxDgcX4rLJaQXikvljUGzmmmoNY=&emci=992170a9-7db6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9b6c7f76-debb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=13891387)**

clean_body: | = Hey there, we just wanted to bump this for you. The housing crisis is impacting everyday families across the country. The New Democrat Coalition is working on winning common-sense solutions that will tangibly address this crisis, but we need broad grassroots support to get the job done. | Thanks for your support, — Nikki HQ \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Nikki Budzinski <info@nikkibudzinskiforcongress.com> Date: Tues, Dec 10, 2024 Subject: Our path foward To: dpwillis67@gmail.com = Hey there, I hope you’re doing well. The next House session is around the corner and my team and I are doing everything we can to craft an agenda that centers the everyday working families of the 13th District. I’m honored to serve as the New Democrat Coalition’s upcoming Vice-Chair, leading on good-faith, bipartisan policy that advances innovative, inclusive, and forward looking policies. At the top of our list for this upcoming session is addressing the housing crisis that is affecting every corner of this country. This plan addresses affordable housing directly and offers solutions to expand and strengthen low-income housing tax credits, promote and fund job training programs, and pass legislation that would stabilize rates of eviction. These policies are favored on both sides of the aisle and we can’t let partisan politics get in the way of making an impact on this crisis. Thanks for all you do, — Nikki | **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

Cracking and packing congressional districts in order to gerrymander away the competition is legal (according to the MAGA Supreme Court), but it shouldn’t be. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98798076/517845892/-488448398?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGU5ZTc3Mi1kZmJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DTk3SQhpzAc9s90Df1JGaUgUIWS2CKPzT7NW8VpQYPI=)

Peter, North Carolina Republicans gerrymandered congressional districts and changed the course of our nation’s history. Wiley recently spoke with Lawrence O'Donnell on MSNBC to explain how this happened: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98798077/517845893/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGU5ZTc3Mi1kZmJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DTk3SQhpzAc9s90Df1JGaUgUIWS2CKPzT7NW8VpQYPI=) By gerrymandering 3 more districts in their favor, the North Carolina GOP flipped each of these districts red — including Wiley’s. Those three flipped seats in North Carolina _made_ the difference between having a Speaker Jeffries and two more years of MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson. Now, Republicans have a razor-thin House majority to push Donald Trump’s extreme agenda, and voters are left disenfranchised by an unfair system. **Cracking and packing congressional districts in order to gerrymander away the competition is legal (according to the MAGA Supreme Court), but it shouldn’t be.** This shady tactic gives the party in power an unfair advantage, and it’s time to put an end to partisan gerrymandering. **[Wiley is leading the fight for fair redistricting. I will keep this brief.

Democrats will be more motivated than ever to win back the Senate and oust the ring leader from their Senate seat... _**aka me.**_

So I’m looking for donors to invest just a few dollars a month over the next cycle so we can **build the warchest early – since I know they will make me their target.**

I will keep this brief. | Fellow American - we had SO much success in the 2024 Election Cycle. But as we look back at what worked and what didn’t, my team keeps coming back to one tactic:investing early. I will keep this brief. Democrats will be more motivated than ever to win back the Senate and oust the ring leader from their Senate seat... aka me. So I’m looking for donors to invest just a few dollars a month over the next cycle so we can build the warchest early – since I know they will make me their target. Thank you for being such a strong member of our team as we continue to look forward. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. # **[NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=0d8b934d07&e=5bd167f239)**

| [ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=1b66f7d799&e=5bd167f239 "The Past Shifts, The Present Stakes, and The Future Battleground States | The Latino Vote Ep 68")
---
The Past Shifts, The Present Stakes, and The Future Battleground States
The Latino Vote Podcast Episode 68
| Chuck & Mike say **'adiós' to 2024** as they turn their focus to the upcoming 2026 election cycle, exploring the critical races that will shape the future of American politics. From Senate battles in Georgia and New Mexico to pivotal House districts **with significant Latino populations** , they break down the numbers, trends, and strategies needed to win. Once again, **Latinos will determine these key battleground races!**
---
|
---
|
# [SUBMIT YOUR NOMINATIONS FOR OUR FIRST ANNUAL AWARD!](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=37ceacb387&e=5bd167f239)
---
| Next week, **on the final episode of the Latino Vote Podcast this year** , Chuck Rocha & Mike Madrid will hold a contest for the 'Best & Worst Moments in Politics of 2024. '🏆

But we need your help:
👉 What are your picks for the best and worst moments of the year?
👉 Got ideas for what to name our annual awards?

Rules:
❌ No Donald Trump or Kamala Harris—think outside the box!
✅ Hot takes welcome: standout races, Latino voting trends, surprises in Congress?

To submit your nominations, either **click the button below** or [tweet us ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=ba7a9b1ead&e=5bd167f239)[@TheLatino_Vote](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=756b9b508e&e=5bd167f239)
We might just use your idea. Let’s wrap up the year in style!
**The deadline to make your nominations is tomorrow, Tuesday at 11:59 p.m. PT.**
---
| [CLICK HERE TO SUBMIT YOUR ANSWERS!](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=3b2e869559&e=5bd167f239 "CLICK HERE TO SUBMIT YOUR ANSWERS!")

|

[](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=9360f62395&e=5bd167f239)

An insightful investigation of how and why the two major political parties have failed to appeal to the Latino vote—the second largest ethnic voting group in the country—and the impact it will have on American democracy and politics for decades to come.

body:
We can’t afford to let the Left take this opportunity to slow down Trump’s agenda.
This could bet ugly
|

| | |
Friend,

**The Left has found its first opportunity to cause chaos during Donald Trump 's Presidency: buying the FL-1 and FL-6 House seats in the upcoming Special Elections. **

Democrats are attempting to flip these open seats and infiltrate **RED** Florida with **BLUE** liberals.

Friend, it's safe to say that our America First legislative agenda will be in grave danger if Nancy Pelosi and her liberal billionaires take these seats.

And they're not going down without a fight: the Left will spend BIG to take these seats because they know how important they are!

Friend, we can't afford to let the Left take this opportunity to slow down Trump's agenda. If we have any shot at winning this thing, we need to catch up to the Left's endless cash reserve.

#
Friend of Life,

As we celebrate the miracle of Christ's birth, we're reminded that unexpected pregnancies can bring about love and joy beyond anything we can imagine. Yet, thousands of preborn children are at risk every day. Many women facing unplanned pregnancies feel alone and fearful, but your support can offer them hope.

This Christmas, you can help spread the truth that **children are blessings, not burdens.** We're looking for caring, pro-life people like you to step forward and donate $100 or more to give preborn children at risk of abortion their very first Christmas.

What better gift can you give this Christmas than the gift of life itself?

And, when you give a gift of $100 or more today, we'll send you a beautiful etched glass Christmas mug for free as our heartfelt thanks for your support. Each time you hold this mug, you will be reminded of the children who will experience their first Christmas because of you. [ ](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=b7309049a21d461883ecaeced72b52ab&_e=kXXn8aMH8HakyC4WmPY0woU-YpFMRVXId5cBKjNHGY2G446NhH6fN8ElkZfpwZRzisxdf4v7ZyX-5pSoCBU-wlYmLcxXNcAGNMysLcavQODPc2_eapnfua0u28rBs_c_L50q4cqZ9flHcCq2pUBFhBB7Js6HtMIeooMFkjQmA3qd_PczJ7tAn72Mzr3x4azDLKEo1LegwPvjYlEFXSCepcGr1V83FyKrTFSVbonJ4PzETGCAZseApN1E_LULD8XmYHNXulQ-crNY7wy2u3Z_6E6ci39d0rBKAwm2EtROaSnv_Pb_Vow4mYMSOw6NNTRYDKXrEsdgZCZr_6sFFRyDmjAaDGaq83BHP1gOgaQ3JG0%3D)
Please stand with us for life this Christmas. Every donation helps reach those who need to hear that life is precious. Your generosity will help change hearts and save lives currently at risk this Christmas season.

Click below to make your gift and secure your exclusive mug in time for Christmas. **[https://give.liveaction.org/give-hope-this-christmas/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=b7309049a21d461883ecaeced72b52ab&_e=kXXn8aMH8HakyC4WmPY0woU-YpFMRVXId5cBKjNHGY2G446NhH6fN8ElkZfpwZRzisxdf4v7ZyX-5pSoCBU-wlYmLcxXNcAGNMysLcavQODPc2_eapnfua0u28rBs_c_L50q4cqZ9flHcCq2pUBFhBB7Js6HtMIeooMFkjQmA3qd_PczJ7tAn72Mzr3x4azDLKEo1LegwPvjYlEFXSCepU3eB0qNwV2I-S8tRXYtKcBDBwwiARsNX1OK7fjMH-cgdjpJUWIMBZzjqVM28EKWM_IMxjc0XRccM0os7t3OjLYmBfKqDqqd-u96-z9LMcFrGoaW24qwhEhKk5mbKGZC7I-KyP1hJo45VEzaPJ2oFzg%3D)**

For Life,

Liz Urban
**Donor Service Manager**

name: Amanda Chase
subject: What happened Friday night? There's more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Special Election in Senate District 10
| | |
---
|
# LUTHER CIFERS WINS THE REPUBLICAN NOMINATION
---
|
# What happened? Updated
---
|
# THANK YOU TO MY SUPPORTERS

---
| Greetings!, It's usually days after an election and the dust settles that you learn more information. Late last night I sent you just the facts. Now we are learning more.
Make no mistake. The politicians and lobbyists wanted anyone but me. No surprise there. Their fingers were crossed that either Adams or Gannon would emerge from the choregraphed political theatre, in which everyone had a part or role to play. Make no mistake it was 6 to 1, and I was the one to beat.
Leadership wanted a senator who would be 'more controllable" by the Republican Senate caucus and one the political establishment would accept. They know that I'm anything but a rubberstamp for the political establishment.
Senate Minority Leader Ryan McDougle told its members to stay out of this senate race. He knew that I would return and work with the new Republican Senate Caucus under his leadership. If half of my supporters, who told me they were going to show up on Friday to vote for me had shown up, we would have won on the first ballot. For whatever reason, many didn't show up.
Nonetheless, Senators Mark Obenshein and Bryce Reeves showed up at the Republican Mass Meeting to see how things were going. Reeves was heard by several people of good standing on the way out saying, his work here was done now that Amanda Chase was out of the race.
In addition, Delegate Tom Garrett, who endorsed Cumberland County Board of Supervisor Bryan Hamlett, was actively working behind the scenes to form a coalition with the lesser known candidates. The goal was to get behind any candidate that was not Adams first and second, not Chase. When the momentum was behind Cifers, they lined up behind Cifers.
By having more candidates in the race, it ensured more rounds of voting and more opportunities for lesser known candidates to prevail, which is essentially what happened.
Instead, the Republican Senate Caucus essentially got a "wild card," a candidate who is politically unknown in Virginia.
They don't know if he will work with them or act independently. They were banking on Gannon or Adams.
The people who showed up to participate in the Republican Mass meeting were initially extras in a play until after the first round of voting.
Voting had just started for round 2 when Jean Gannon withdrew from the race, and endorsed Adams.
The proverbial masks came off and the people were ticked. They realized they had been played and turned their ire against Adams, who was the clear designated beneficiary of Jean's withdrawal. The plan backfired. And the remaining voters lined up behind Cifers who finished 2nd in the second round. Here's some background.
Duane Adam's campaign was run by Chris Leavitt of Red Maverick Media, who ran Ed Gillespie's campaign for Governor in 2017, along with Chris and Diana Shores. He was also endorsed by Dominion Energy, Congressman Bob Good, and Bishop EW Jackson. All of those endorsements fell short at the beginning of round 2 when voter's realized they had been played by Gannon and Adams.
As a result, while Adams came in first on the first round of voting, he lost votes with every round thereafter.
Jean Gannon's campaign was run by Mike Young, who is the Managing Director of [FP1 Strategies, LLC.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q-TJ4f-BWPkH4Q40ba0_7c6t0meZKxxGmdA7p1UebFEOyfTncgh-EZ5lNcqbSGItOmayMFu7eH-yIQ4bUCQlh-wn4LWmZTfcQ-TP5IARkrOxa2S-9KzPrFbHJf24jlX4aFJtoePXiJZcOJpocxiAKA==&c=Db1_RRJhcC6xeUBiqEQrnKkJJcVH8gbXF48xDonJAvkWMMdJMnzVDg==&ch=4DkARJrsyU6X0NUAZWCLWj27vSFiS2CQjwaVp58lNC443uN61vR_vQ==) Gannon received the endorsement of Never Trumper Super PAC, American's For Prosperity, who paid for mailers and doorknockers for her campaign, did not give Gannon the support she needed to beat Adams or me.
Jean Gannon was used as a cat's paw and then kicked to the curb. She withdrew from the race and threw her support behind Duane Adams, which visibly ticked off her supporters. Jean was willing to do anything to make sure I didn't win the race, even throwing the race to Duane Adams.
In Jean's own campaign speech, she states that initially she didn't want to run for office, which is correct. But what she didn't say is that she was convinced by the establishment to run in a play to ensure I didn't win. Her role was to take votes away from me, so that Adams could win. If she didn't prevail ahead of Adams on the first round, she was going to back Adams.
Duane Adam began circulating a preprinted flyer that stated Jean Gannon was now endorsing him, which signaled to voters that this was a pre-orchestrated play between the Adam's campaign and the Gannon campaign.
Gannon supporters were clearly shocked and then outraged that Gannon had withdrawn from the race and clearly made some type of a deal in advance with the Adam's campaign.
Jean Gannon was witnessed by many to storm out the door and leave the mass meeting. It was at this point that the remaining voters gained a determination to support anyone but Duane Adams.
So why was Jean Gannon ticked? Why did she storm off? She felt like she had to "make a deal with the devil" to keep me from winning. She was probably also ticked that John McGuire, who had asked her to run, in the end left her hanging.
Under the radar, Jean Gannon was initially asked by John McGuire to run. When she didn't get much traction, he tried to find another candidate, even his own brother Rusty McGuire, who ultimately declined. McGuire was upset with me for endorsing Congressman Bob Good over him and quietly worked behind the scenes to support anyone but me.
In the end, I believe that McGuire quietly got behind Luther Ciphers, when it was clear Jean Gannon was not getting traction across the district.
Instead of getting Duane Adams, the political establishment got Luther Cifers, who was not their guy.
Cifers is a political unknown. Will he think independently or will he go along with the caucus and be a rubberstamp for them?
Clearly, McGuire wanted to give them someone they couldn't control.
This was still a proxy race between Good and McGuire. McGuire could not let Bob Good's guy, Duane Adams, win, but he couldn't do it with me, because I didn't support his run for Congress. Now you know the rest of the story.
Will Cifers be able to be controlled by the Republican Senate Caucus?
Time will tell. They will do their best to win him over.
---

---
| |
---
In case you missed it, 972 registered voters participated in Friday's Republican Mass meeting, which took 3 rounds before political newcomer Luther Cifers emerged as the winner.
Ultimately, 589 voters who stayed until the 3rd round of voting chose our Republican nominee, Luther Cifers at 1:22am.
He is our Republican nominee who will take on Democrat nominee Jack Trammell in the January 7 Special Election to fill the vacancy left by Congressman-elect John McGuire.
Please mark your calendar for Tuesday, January 7 for voting at your regular polling location.
For more information about Luther Cifers, please click the link here:
---
| [Visit Luther Cifers's Website](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q-TJ4f-BWPkH4Q40ba0_7c6t0meZKxxGmdA7p1UebFEOyfTncgh-EUs16qK62g8Ow84BKIbZkb6XQAorr7dKh1_Wj6j58Vn0j0J12tBm5F2Xw2bFrLjWxnaG1fXMqS8elTCE6g-VQVMecpUqFDf1qg==&c=Db1_RRJhcC6xeUBiqEQrnKkJJcVH8gbXF48xDonJAvkWMMdJMnzVDg==&ch=4DkARJrsyU6X0NUAZWCLWj27vSFiS2CQjwaVp58lNC443uN61vR_vQ==)
---
Campaign finance reports are due Wednesday, January 15 and will cover campaign money from July 1 through December 31, of each of the campaigns. I will be releasing those reports along with other findings.
Thank you to the volunteers who ran the Republican Mass meeting. While I'm not a fan of party processes that suppress voter turnout, I do appreciate the volunteers who worked hard to make the best of a very long night.
As many of you know, while I was in the Virginia Senate, I was the one Republican vote in the Virginia Senate to put an end to these types of elections beginning July 1 of this past year.
I believe you should be able to vote at your local polling location and then leave. Many of you have expressed you agree with me. It shouldn't take all day to cast a vote.
Thankfully, now these party processes to choose our Republican nominee will be the exception instead of the rule, as they are limited just to Special Elections.
Out of 11 counties, 972 voters in round 1, 748 voters in round 2 and 589 voters in round 3 chose our nominee.
I'm thankful this special election is the exception and not the rule. And to me that is a huge win.
I want to thank 171 of my supporters for showing up on Friday, including one gentleman who was still recovering from heart surgery. Now that's commitment.
To those who donated, I want to thank you for your financial support. I couldn't have done this without you.
To my campaign team that was run by committed volunteers, thank you for donating your time and treasure.
Many of you have asked, "what's next for me?" My team and I are looking at our options. I'm not leaving politics. So stay tuned.
Right now we are going to enjoy time with our families for the holidays. Merry Christmas!
Finally, we are in the process of gathering our 4 by 8s campaign signs and metal posts. Please email Craig at craig@chaseforva.com and we will coordinate pick up. Many thanks.
For God & Country,
---
|
---
Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023
---
|
# "The world is run by those who show up."
---
|

---

---|---|---|---

Luther Cifers | 2ND PLACE 210 | FIRST PLACE 330 | WINNER 332
