clean_body: Special Election in Senate District 10 | | | | LUTHER CIFERS WINS THE REPUBLICAN NOMINATION | What happened? Updated | THANK YOU TO MY SUPPORTERS | Greetings!, It's usually days after an election and the dust settles that you learn more information. Late last night I sent you just the facts. Now we are learning more. Make no mistake. The politicians and lobbyists wanted anyone but me. No surprise there. Their fingers were crossed that either Adams or Gannon would emerge from the choregraphed political theatre, in which everyone had a part or role to play. Make no mistake it was 6 to 1, and I was the one to beat. Leadership wanted a senator who would be 'more controllable" by the Republican Senate caucus and one the political establishment would accept. They know that I'm anything but a rubberstamp for the political establishment. Senate Minority Leader Ryan McDougle told its members to stay out of this senate race. He knew that I would return and work with the new Republican Senate Caucus under his leadership. If half of my supporters, who told me they were going to show up on Friday to vote for me had shown up, we would have won on the first ballot. For whatever reason, many didn't show up. Nonetheless, Senators Mark Obenshein and Bryce Reeves showed up at the Republican Mass Meeting to see how things were going. Reeves was heard by several people of good standing on the way out saying, his work here was done now that Amanda Chase was out of the race. In addition, Delegate Tom Garrett, who endorsed Cumberland County Board of Supervisor Bryan Hamlett, was actively working behind the scenes to form a coalition with the lesser known candidates. The goal was to get behind any candidate that was not Adams first and second, not Chase. When the momentum was behind Cifers, they lined up behind Cifers. By having more candidates in the race, it ensured more rounds of voting and more opportunities for lesser known candidates to prevail, which is essentially what happened. Instead, the Republican Senate Caucus essentially got a "wild card," a candidate who is politically unknown in Virginia. They don't know if he will work with them or act independently. They were banking on Gannon or Adams. The people who showed up to participate in the Republican Mass meeting were initially extras in a play until after the first round of voting. Voting had just started for round 2 when Jean Gannon withdrew from the race, and endorsed Adams. The proverbial masks came off and the people were ticked. They realized they had been played and turned their ire against Adams, who was the clear designated beneficiary of Jean's withdrawal. The plan backfired. And the remaining voters lined up behind Cifers who finished 2nd in the second round. Here's some background. Duane Adam's campaign was run by Chris Leavitt of Red Maverick Media, who ran Ed Gillespie's campaign for Governor in 2017, along with Chris and Diana Shores. He was also endorsed by Dominion Energy, Congressman Bob Good, and Bishop EW Jackson. All of those endorsements fell short at the beginning of round 2 when voter's realized they had been played by Gannon and Adams. As a result, while Adams came in first on the first round of voting, he lost votes with every round thereafter. Jean Gannon's campaign was run by Mike Young, who is the Managing Director of == Gannon received the endorsement of Never Trumper Super PAC, American's For Prosperity, who paid for mailers and doorknockers for her campaign, did not give Gannon the support she needed to beat Adams or me. Jean Gannon was used as a cat's paw and then kicked to the curb. She withdrew from the race and threw her support behind Duane Adams, which visibly ticked off her supporters. Jean was willing to do anything to make sure I didn't win the race, even throwing the race to Duane Adams. In Jean's own campaign speech, she states that initially she didn't want to run for office, which is correct. But what she didn't say is that she was convinced by the establishment to run in a play to ensure I didn't win. Her role was to take votes away from me, so that Adams could win. If she didn't prevail ahead of Adams on the first round, she was going to back Adams. Duane Adam began circulating a preprinted flyer that stated Jean Gannon was now endorsing him, which signaled to voters that this was a pre-orchestrated play between the Adam's campaign and the Gannon campaign. Gannon supporters were clearly shocked and then outraged that Gannon had withdrawn from the race and clearly made some type of a deal in advance with the Adam's campaign. Jean Gannon was witnessed by many to storm out the door and leave the mass meeting. It was at this point that the remaining voters gained a determination to support anyone but Duane Adams. So why was Jean Gannon ticked? Why did she storm off? She felt like she had to "make a deal with the devil" to keep me from winning. She was probably also ticked that John McGuire, who had asked her to run, in the end left her hanging. Under the radar, Jean Gannon was initially asked by John McGuire to run. When she didn't get much traction, he tried to find another candidate, even his own brother Rusty McGuire, who ultimately declined. McGuire was upset with me for endorsing Congressman Bob Good over him and quietly worked behind the scenes to support anyone but me. In the end, I believe that McGuire quietly got behind Luther Ciphers, when it was clear Jean Gannon was not getting traction across the district. Instead of getting Duane Adams, the political establishment got Luther Cifers, who was not their guy. Cifers is a political unknown. Will he think independently or will he go along with the caucus and be a rubberstamp for them? Clearly, McGuire wanted to give them someone they couldn't control. This was still a proxy race between Good and McGuire. McGuire could not let Bob Good's guy, Duane Adams, win, but he couldn't do it with me, because I didn't support his run for Congress. Now you know the rest of the story. Will Cifers be able to be controlled by the Republican Senate Caucus? Time will tell. They will do their best to win him over. | | In case you missed it, 972 registered voters participated in Friday's Republican Mass meeting, which took 3 rounds before political newcomer Luther Cifers emerged as the winner. Ultimately, 589 voters who stayed until the 3rd round of voting chose our Republican nominee, Luther Cifers at 1:22am. He is our Republican nominee who will take on Democrat nominee Jack Trammell in the January 7 Special Election to fill the vacancy left by Congressman-elect John McGuire. Please mark your calendar for Tuesday, January 7 for voting at your regular polling location. For more information about Luther Cifers, please click the link here: | == Campaign finance reports are due Wednesday, January 15 and will cover campaign money from July 1 through December 31, of each of the campaigns. I will be releasing those reports along with other findings. Thank you to the volunteers who ran the Republican Mass meeting. While I'm not a fan of party processes that suppress voter turnout, I do appreciate the volunteers who worked hard to make the best of a very long night. As many of you know, while I was in the Virginia Senate, I was the one Republican vote in the Virginia Senate to put an end to these types of elections beginning July 1 of this past year. I believe you should be able to vote at your local polling location and then leave. Many of you have expressed you agree with me. It shouldn't take all day to cast a vote. Thankfully, now these party processes to choose our Republican nominee will be the exception instead of the rule, as they are limited just to Special Elections. Out of 11 counties, 972 voters in round 1, 748 voters in round 2 and 589 voters in round 3 chose our nominee. I'm thankful this special election is the exception and not the rule. And to me that is a huge win. I want to thank 171 of my supporters for showing up on Friday, including one gentleman who was still recovering from heart surgery. Now that's commitment. To those who donated, I want to thank you for your financial support. I couldn't have done this without you. To my campaign team that was run by committed volunteers, thank you for donating your time and treasure. Many of you have asked, "what's next for me?" My team and I are looking at our options. I'm not leaving politics. So stay tuned. Right now we are going to enjoy time with our families for the holidays. Merry Christmas! Finally, we are in the process of gathering our 4 by 8s campaign signs and metal posts. Please email Craig at craig@chaseforva.com and we will coordinate pick up. Many thanks. For God & Country, | Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023 | "The world is run by those who show up." | RESULTS BY ROUND | | Voting begin time: | ROUND 1 9pm | ROUND 2 11pm | ROUND 3 12:16am ---|---|---|--- Amanda Chase | THIRD PLACE 171 | THRID PLACE 95 | dropped Jean Gannon | 124 | withdrew and endorsed Adams | dropped Luther Cifers | 2ND PLACE 210 | FIRST PLACE 330 | WINNER 332 Alex Cheatham | 3 | dropped | dropped Duane Adams | FIRST PLACE 395 | SECOND PLACE 322 | 257 Brian Hamlett | 65 | dropped | dropped Shayne Snavely | 4 | dropped | dropped TOTAL VOTES | 972 | 748 | 589 | | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. opponents — as the director of the F.B.I.

It’s clear what Donald Trump’s plan is: to put his partisan allies in

subject: MassGOP Blasts Sanctuary Policies Following Arrest of Iranian National Tied to Fatal Drone Strike on U.S. Service Members
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BpuiGP7auCl9vSPT9PCGX5RBX6-s0oXdIf2Q42Gj1C4rSzZ9o0HYCrHDzbTQILTizcSiH1cK97L-byWZqo6YVaZwDlaOxx3koi5qrtt86VSM6ltbkid5iYat9J5cLjwHLx0OK0DJoy2x5HCkQ6fnFQ==&c=Dpqt5i-duteAWzmwHbZIttn3nst9h-IKWliqKCupMfWePlmrgOOUNw==&ch=-VjKDylPsQnfeqZeX8wvJ1sgs6CQHZMpwsBWgKtlBbqpyLY6krCyKw==)
---
| MassGOP Blasts Sanctuary Policies Following Arrest of Iranian National Tied to Fatal Drone Strike on U.S. Service Members
---
---
| Boston, MA- This afternoon, federal officials announced the arrest of an Iranian national in Natick Massachusetts for export violations and providing material support to Iran. These charges are tied to a fatal drone strike that killed three U.S. service members and injured over 40 others. One of the individuals responsible sought sanctuary in Massachusetts.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale responded to the disturbing arrests, stating:
"The language used by Massachusetts Democratic leaders in describing our state as a sanctuary to the international community and that they won't cooperate with federal authorities, sends a dangerous signal to bad actors around the world. It tells them that Massachusetts is a safe haven where they can evade prosecution from the United States federal government."
"It's time for the Healey-Driscoll Administration to stand with the people of Massachusetts and declare that our state will no longer serve as a sanctuary for criminals whether they're here legally or illegally. For the safety and security of our communities, Massachusetts must send a clear message: there is no sanctuary for international criminals in our Commonwealth," Carnevale concluded.
###
---
---

name: Voter Action Project
subject: No "off" years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121624_2&amount=25]
Team,
2025 is considered an "off year" for elections, but the reality is that there are a number of important elections on the ballot:
* Three special elections (so far) to fill vacancies in the U.S. House of Representatives

* Two special elections to fill vacancies in the U.S. Senate
* Two Governorships in Virginia and New Jersey, who will have the power to appoint judges

* All 100 seats in Virginia’s House of Delegates

* All 80 seats in the New Jersey General Assembly

* State Supreme Court seats in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin -- where legal challenges to mail-in voting have been heard and continue to be brought forward

* 10 major Mayoral races in big cities
And those are just the highlights. You can bet that opponents of voting rights are already targeting these races after their victories in 2024. We've got to match their efforts, which is why we have our goal of raising $50,000 from grassroots donors in December to help mobilize voters for these special elections and defend voting rights when state legislative sessions start in just a few weeks.
Team: Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us prepare for these important elections, fight for voting rights in state legislatures, and so much more >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121624_2&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121624_2&amount=25]

body:
The consequences of Democrats winning back the House would be unthinkable.
We know you’re probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!
| |
---
| | | **URGENT UPDATE ABOUT SPECIAL ELECTION TO FILL MATT GAETZ 'S SEAT:**
__First:__ Florida Governor Ron DeSantis announced a Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz.

__Then:__ Democrats were over the moon at the prospect of flipping a key Republican seat.

__Now:__ Early voting is about to begin in FL-01 and we urgently need your support to win key races like this!
| | [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=be5cafa2bd194213ae3c5104e102b255&_e=z8QyXKgS32NS7p_XmfntKQlPLJ885F3nakrlrwkAVOhr3zC1jT99yWy_DKW4mKQhlnzoHv3E8zV9K_UoaVzbAk5TSlVEb3e603XkjQHEEHfhE6PFOkSC6UtufdjdSFz9d5W-3unh6jY9HxqcgVtBGqShtBDQLFkkzNX0_6KRHiUtO6ckUYnHc52HdhKYmqzNnJRZGNISWIORm_yG5pduss88VCbHNacsTSYPKb0sa72LVyvuIcK8HG15WkanzMjSIbJm32PpK6vyV0DUPTaqSF21GBnFVuiyFjggyagLv5ub8pzx8zbaGDy5QQmaLrNx2STseRDR2xir__wli9ZfB8qQjihqGFvSPv84GwXrPFRiocg47mkT9jaYuDRxIJ1hWTd5RF8VpdNcWd32wgSabA%3D%3D "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---

Do not forget this:

Republicans are BARELY hanging onto the House Majority. **If Democrats flip even one or two of these Special Elections, our Republican Trifecta could come CRASHING DOWN.**

The consequences of Democrats winning back the House would be unthinkable. They'd have the power to bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt - despite his historic mandate!

**_[That's why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks - before early voting begins - to help fill Matt Gaetz's seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump's agenda.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=be5cafa2bd194213ae3c5104e102b255&_e=z8QyXKgS32NS7p_XmfntKQlPLJ885F3nakrlrwkAVOhr3zC1jT99yWy_DKW4mKQhlnzoHv3E8zV9K_UoaVzbAk5TSlVEb3e603XkjQHEEHfhE6PFOkSC6UtufdjdSFz9d5W-3unh6jY9HxqcgVtBGqShtBDQLFkkzNX0_6KRHiUtO6ckUYnHc52HdhKYmqzNnJRZGNISWIORm_yG5pduss88VCbHNacsTSYPKb0sa72u3RIGys3I0w7tzh4gQwvOWp_4kSfgbq9eGTmdlmz5YUklQarTtbYy6PItTcqLeggq3CGioiwi-dmx3Bh81WTBK6D2Jq_1eX31frBOTeMLrFJDLnMtz7pDU4h2MZbcS44TEh9C4LQy9uspFs9lfOzIV5xAHchbSFoEDeEN4HPTPw%3D%3D "That’s why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks – before early voting begins – to help fill Matt Gaetz’s seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump’s agenda.")_**

We know you're probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!

_Can you please help us? _
| [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=be5cafa2bd194213ae3c5104e102b255&_e=z8QyXKgS32NS7p_XmfntKQlPLJ885F3nakrlrwkAVOhr3zC1jT99yWy_DKW4mKQhlnzoHv3E8zV9K_UoaVzbAk5TSlVEb3e603XkjQHEEHfhE6PFOkSC6UtufdjdSFz9d5W-3unh6jY9HxqcgVtBGqShtBDQLFkkzNX0_6KRHiUtO6ckUYnHc52HdhKYmqzNnJRZGNISWIORm_yG5pduss88VCbHNacsTSYPKb0sa71AAtaH1d7m2Woskwh0FxdERp8HrH6IV2inmqR75_pO1MnFp5FK2uqFJjP6Lm399H_G4z59UBA93hmD6p1cUinML4sQIvF_reBiHMf6gzlxP46DgRfe_3T7gLhDaMBgn9_WZT_i2RhlgS4u9xzraFp0ypbBaCZCRmRB-RQnRvHUvA%3D%3D "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW")

Thank you for all you do,

**HOUSE REPUBLICANS**
Sent via Team Scalise

| |

| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=be5cafa2bd194213ae3c5104e102b255&_e=z8QyXKgS32NS7p_XmfntKQlPLJ885F3nakrlrwkAVOhr3zC1jT99yWy_DKW4mKQhlnzoHv3E8zV9K_UoaVzbAk5TSlVEb3e603XkjQHEEHfhE6PFOkSC6UtufdjdSFz9d5W-3unh6jY9HxqcgVtBGqShtBDQLFkkzNX0_6KRHiUtO6ckUYnHc52HdhKYmqzNnJRZGNISWIORm_yG5pduss88VCbHNacsTSYPKb0sa731DAZnP157zfD5_1bETAM8jdQ4Ug2P6d3IYVGbf6QGNkLrjQSYjoYxh5fA2LvCidBvez89_PNWAX3bPY8ofHVo8_AfhThhDjQGI9US0IfES7MG6-YWgV8hizDO08AabE7Q3K_qgDfw1ma4HOv6KSFw_1x3jH_anCWEIrUkM-ollA%3D%3D "Majority Leader Survey")

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=be5cafa2bd194213ae3c5104e102b255&_e=z8QyXKgS32NS7p_XmfntKQlPLJ885F3nakrlrwkAVOhr3zC1jT99yWy_DKW4mKQhlnzoHv3E8zV9K_UoaVzbAk5TSlVEb3e603XkjQHEEHfhE6PFOkSC6UtufdjdSFz9d5W-3unh6jY9HxqcgVtBGqShtBDQLFkkzNX0_6KRHiUtO6ckUYnHc52HdhKYmqzNnJRZGNISWIORm_yG5pduss88VCbHNacsTSYPKb0sa73_ibdbFpnw3p_RV3DENaVgYZBxhJ2iy1vQYu_OYIWZxeS7QvbMIv9w6kEfdK9NF2I5EPD1IX-sNB7Xgqrh0Bg0lllOXQi15cXqKaOw14xgJ2XO1NNjYAtD7sMrSd_myn6k6FBnzkHP9Ryk8t0NWRsMwU45YX0RQ8a7ThBwso11MA%3D%3D "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_

### The Merritt Parkway Has Become More Dangerous After Police Decrease Traffic Law Violation Enforcement
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---

December 16, 2024
I have been driving the Merritt Parkway for twenty-eight years, from my home in Fairfield to my ophthalmology office in Rocky Hill. The speed limit is fifty-five miles per hour but for all practical purposes, the police officers tolerated any speed under seventy miles per hour.
I have never received a speeding ticket nor been pulled over for any reason. I consider myself a cautious driver, but I knew exactly where the police stationed themselves, after the bridges near Exit 46 and Exit 57 along with the end of Heroes' Tunnel. But not anymore.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c6ffb67e-6bc6-451d-a0cf-6e864f443b2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Heroes' Tunnel on the Merritt Parkway
It appears that the state police have abandoned enforcing the traffic regulations as they are rarely seen. The result is aggressive driving that endangers everybody.
Last week, while I was driving in the right lane, I saw a car rapidly approaching me in my rearview mirror with the intention of passing. The problem is that there was a car to my left leaving little room to pass. I quickly veered to my right and this speeder barely missed sideswiping me. He then cut off a car in the left lane and proceeded to weave in between lanes while I witnessed the brake lights of other cars flashing to avoid an accident. This car was going over 100 miles per hour.
I witness crazy drivers on the Merritt daily. They have no regard for our traffic rules, speed limits and apparently for their lives or the lives of others.
Frustrated, I contacted the chief officers of the State Police Department. I was amazed at how quickly they responded but disappointed in the actual statement which I partially quote:
"_In response to the increased number of fatal motor vehicle accidents you mentioned, we have already taken proactive steps to heighten our efforts during critical hours in specific locations throughout our patrol areas. Our troopers will continue to focus our efforts on ensuring the safety of all residents._
_Your concerns will certainly be shared with Troopers from Troop I-Bethany and Troop G-Bridgeport which cover areas of Route 15. I believe that this knowledge paired with our ongoing efforts to address and mitigate such dangerous behavior will go a long way._
_Please know that keeping our roads safe is a collaborative effort. We encourage you and other residents to remain proactive in sharing your concerns. If you witness any such behavior in the future, we urge you to immediately call 9-1-1 so that we can respond promptly and effectively._ "
There is no acknowledgement as to whether my observation is accurate. Has there actually been a decision not to have police officers enforce the traffic laws on the Merritt Parkway?
Furthermore, it is very difficult to call 911 when driving (plus it is illegal to speak on a cell when driving) and even if I did so, the answering individual would immediately ask me the make and license plate number of the offending vehicle which is difficult to ascertain while swerving out of the way.
Connecticut's Police have been unfairly buffeted by political forces and this may be the culprit. For example, car jackers and other violators of the law are routinely given little or no bail and police officers may question whether there is any wisdom in risking their lives if prosecutors and judges will not enforce our laws.
Police officers have been accused of disproportionately giving more tickets to Blacks and may be reluctant to pull anyone over lest they be accused of racism and suffer disciplinary action. But it my experience, virtually every aggressive driver on the Merritt Parkway is a young or middle-aged white male.
It may well be that there is data indicating that enforcing traffic laws on the Merritt Parkway is more dangerous than the present free-for-all. The Merritt is quite narrow and police officers risk their own lives standing on the side of the road while giving in a ticket.
Furthermore, unknown to most citizens, enforcing traffic laws is one of the most dangerous activities a police officer can engage in, second only to investigating a domestic violence compliant. Many miscreants are armed and have outstanding warrants. Multiple police officers have lost their lives to these desperate felons. To a police officer, there is no such thing as a "routine" speeding stop.
But whatever the reason, it is unfair to the drivers of the Merritt Parkway to be placed at risk. The technology exists to place cameras at strategic locations, determine who is speeding and capture their license plate numbers. Assuming our prosecutors and judges enforce our laws (and that is a big "if'), the Merritt Parkway could once again be a safe place to drive without risking the lives of our police officers.

---

clean_body: The Merritt Parkway Has Become More Dangerous After Police Decrease Traffic Law Violation Enforcement | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more The Merritt Parkway Has Become More Dangerous After Police Decrease Traffic Law Violation Enforcement | | | Dec 16 | | | | | | | | | | | | December 16, 2024 I have been driving the Merritt Parkway for twenty-eight years, from my home in Fairfield to my ophthalmology office in Rocky Hill. The speed limit is fifty-five miles per hour but for all practical purposes, the police officers tolerated any speed under seventy miles per hour. I have never received a speeding ticket nor been pulled over for any reason. I consider myself a cautious driver, but I knew exactly where the police stationed themselves, after the bridges near Exit 46 and Exit 57 along with the end of Heroes' Tunnel. But not anymore. | | ---|---|--- Heroes' Tunnel on the Merritt Parkway It appears that the state police have abandoned enforcing the traffic regulations as they are rarely seen. The result is aggressive driving that endangers everybody. Last week, while I was driving in the right lane, I saw a car rapidly approaching me in my rearview mirror with the intention of passing. The problem is that there was a car to my left leaving little room to pass. I quickly veered to my right and this speeder barely missed sideswiping me. He then cut off a car in the left lane and proceeded to weave in between lanes while I witnessed the brake lights of other cars flashing to avoid an accident. This car was going over 100 miles per hour. I witness crazy drivers on the Merritt daily. They have no regard for our traffic rules, speed limits and apparently for their lives or the lives of others. Frustrated, I contacted the chief officers of the State Police Department. I was amazed at how quickly they responded but disappointed in the actual statement which I partially quote: "In response to the increased number of fatal motor vehicle accidents you mentioned, we have already taken proactive steps to heighten our efforts during critical hours in specific locations throughout our patrol areas. Our troopers will continue to focus our efforts on ensuring the safety of all residents. Your concerns will certainly be shared with Troopers from Troop I-Bethany and Troop G-Bridgeport which cover areas of Route 15. I believe that this knowledge paired with our ongoing efforts to address and mitigate such dangerous behavior will go a long way. Please know that keeping our roads safe is a collaborative effort. We encourage you and other residents to remain proactive in sharing your concerns. If you witness any such behavior in the future, we urge you to immediately call 9-1-1 so that we can respond promptly and effectively. " There is no acknowledgement as to whether my observation is accurate. Has there actually been a decision not to have police officers enforce the traffic laws on the Merritt Parkway? Furthermore, it is very difficult to call 911 when driving (plus it is illegal to speak on a cell when driving) and even if I did so, the answering individual would immediately ask me the make and license plate number of the offending vehicle which is difficult to ascertain while swerving out of the way. Connecticut's Police have been unfairly buffeted by political forces and this may be the culprit. For example, car jackers and other violators of the law are routinely given little or no bail and police officers may question whether there is any wisdom in risking their lives if prosecutors and judges will not enforce our laws. Police officers have been accused of disproportionately giving more tickets to Blacks and may be reluctant to pull anyone over lest they be accused of racism and suffer disciplinary action. But it my experience, virtually every aggressive driver on the Merritt Parkway is a young or middle-aged white male. It may well be that there is data indicating that enforcing traffic laws on the Merritt Parkway is more dangerous than the present free-for-all. The Merritt is quite narrow and police officers risk their own lives standing on the side of the road while giving in a ticket. Furthermore, unknown to most citizens, enforcing traffic laws is one of the most dangerous activities a police officer can engage in, second only to investigating a domestic violence compliant. Many miscreants are armed and have outstanding warrants. Multiple police officers have lost their lives to these desperate felons. To a police officer, there is no such thing as a "routine" speeding stop. But whatever the reason, it is unfair to the drivers of the Merritt Parkway to be placed at risk. The technology exists to place cameras at strategic locations, determine who is speeding and capture their license plate numbers. Assuming our prosecutors and judges enforce our laws (and that is a big "if'), the Merritt Parkway could once again be a safe place to drive without risking the lives of our police officers. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Joseph Bentivegna 541 Cromwell Avenue, Rocky Hill, CT 06067 ? ?

name: Virginia Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: [1] Message for local Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
In just 22 days, polls will close in three special elections in Virginia. These special elections mark one of the first opportunities to regain momentum after the GOP secured a federal trifecta. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| ** 🫏 IMPORTANT MESSAGE FOR local DEMOCRATS 🫏 **
---
🛑**If you’re committed to fighting back against MAGA extremism and electing state Democrats in special elections, please keep reading. We need your help today. 👇**
In just 22 days, polls will close in three special elections in Virginia.

These special elections mark one of the first opportunities to regain momentum after Republicans secured a federal trifecta on Election Day. ❌
---
But right now, we’re trailing behind our December fundraising goal 😬

[](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsOpbiH4z4INAYfLFgFMiGKluwFkSI-FIFj_tOVeSwTNDlQb1HQt9jF30XTim7L3OIaXuMPKcFwI9LrRVQAGB6_8HhLTwTrY7r5ukXE3sJgHyG9onN_0IqEUeEbjpzbk4WEY5cKI0C4d2KQ4xd1IGOlEtsw5Bpv1Bea93FV6SGInNmBrXFwNj378FRHjEtRv_tbWDZBOYjTYkskkq_w3CigP37bPYH5uwQh12MnmJs9TvRTsyWEws5xnNthHansiO3L-nnqVdppwKFPj4oc-63hmuE7Ewn2D0ZF9jsEFC66Ym2O50bGI_ELrjQ6d2isnifGT4JZME8MOuCrcpiH0AV4gcQs1WMVB8PonH77UYbn9G2VvxWO4rxHic-rDUKGcdbBNUVVgs7Z8yxtxNxBDkQ738nve7qZ4MVqp15vsOzBUhgPhpjSDhGDgxevJSSTe5MCw_kevBGbJ5JtBruJze8J11SXbekPIp7t-PaAX-M9FVsIwYZAU4QPXnCqor-mefp7MgpRqqJfmHoXgayuhaNYvJdEsfcVLtfnXp0QwRGip33jSckHm0Y-mS6wCZheYc1vjuCgGoM-ly0N8DL7Qv91KhD1_GbYg3_8XOMwj1jpKGfNLGVfE1DnDFk7D0nmgplD7J9kM7nUIP6IuwKy47h7/4cc/Hj_9jiOQRmmPAdJ6yzf9xA/h0/h001.dGRRP8rdgu0qbyjBnjg-guJ6PKmwaBnoGcewOeuXcE4)

_...and if we fall short, we risk leaving our candidates vulnerable to GOP attacks._

clean_body: In just 22 days, polls will close in three special elections in Virginia. These special elections mark one of the first opportunities to regain momentum after the GOP secured a federal trifecta. | | | | | ---|--- | 🫏 IMPORTANT MESSAGE FOR local DEMOCRATS 🫏 🛑If you’re committed to fighting back against MAGA extremism and electing state Democrats in special elections, please keep reading. We need your help today. 👇 In just 22 days, polls will close in three special elections in Virginia. These special elections mark one of the first opportunities to regain momentum after Republicans secured a federal trifecta on Election Day. ❌ But right now, we’re trailing behind our December fundraising goal 😬 ...and if we fall short, we risk leaving our candidates vulnerable to GOP attacks. If everyone reading this email donated $7 right now, we wouldn’t have to send another email this year! But we know that not everyone can donate – so we’re calling on just 11 Democrats in your commmunity to step up today. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Let’s hit the ground running. body:
Tell us: Do you support the ERA?
| | |
---
| | **_BREAKING FROM THE NEW YORK TIMES: _
Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand calls for the immediate certification of the Equal Rights Amendment**
---
As Donald Trump's second term in the White House threatens the future of gender equality and reproductive freedom, Kirsten is fighting tirelessly to safeguard our rights. **But she needs to know if grassroots supporters like you have her back, and your response is still missing:**
---
**Do you support the Equal Rights Amendment?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98800732/517855214/-549781852?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5660-su-nd&code=jtk5660-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWNmMmQxOC1lOWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAE6yMBZBJD10TXgInnyO2enCDtXr91uVLtK4AUH_fg=&emci=89bc24fb-71b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=59cf2d18-e9bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=7659029)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98800733/517855215/-549781852?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5660-su-nd&code=jtk5660-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWNmMmQxOC1lOWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAE6yMBZBJD10TXgInnyO2enCDtXr91uVLtK4AUH_fg=&emci=89bc24fb-71b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=59cf2d18-e9bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=7659029)
---
**It hasn't been an easy time, friend:** Donald Trump was once again elected president — throwing the future of our most fundamental freedoms into frightening uncertainty.
The GOP have already shown us how far they're willing to go to limit reproductive rights. In red states across the country, they've passed abortion ban after abortion ban — all while threatening to pass a _nationwide_ abortion ban if they regained power. Now, they've done exactly that, and we need to do everything we can to keep them from making good on their threat.
Certifying the Equal Rights Amendment is our __best__ chance at stopping the GOP and restoring access to abortion before Donald Trump takes office and enacts his dangerous agenda.

**That's why we need to send a clear message that Democrats are standing behind Kirsten and supporting the ERA, but we're still waiting to hear from another 127 supporters before midnight — including you. So please, tell us before midnight:**
**Do you support the Equal Rights Amendment?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98800734/517855216/-549781852?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5660-su-nd&code=jtk5660-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWNmMmQxOC1lOWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAE6yMBZBJD10TXgInnyO2enCDtXr91uVLtK4AUH_fg=&emci=89bc24fb-71b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=59cf2d18-e9bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=7659029)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Our healthcare system isn’t broken, it’s fixed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Heartbreaking. Frustrating. Maddening. That’s the only way to describe the flood of stories I’m seeing from Americans who were denied medical insurance claims.

Healthcare is a human right.

No one should be denied the care they need, especially not in the wealthiest nation in the world.

Yet millions of Americans are uninsured, underinsured, or struggling to meet rising treatment costs while private healthcare companies rake in billions in profit every year.

We don't need to accept the high insurance company denial percentage as a matter of course. That’s why I reject their PAC and lobbying money. It’s why I’m fighting for Medicare For All.

But I need to show my colleagues that the people are with me.

Will you take action and tell Congress to guarantee healthcare for all Americans? [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/medicare-for-all-petition-2024?contactdata=cZHJ4cZukYysAQJ0p4C/yljXJTaydRpCKn7SxrgrYlUqhY56QRysmWnN87Cc/cEN34Jp0GXxfJKyL05kl9ZTmoKuWiX7L1Wnx08Og13/Bk+zZCFxbZ5H+jYeAA4OpewzXWSN4x3+vKHNA5xpDjLgeg==]

https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1866873038781944073 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1866873038781944073]

Nearly two-thirds of Americans [https://thehill.com/policy/healthcare/5029971-health-care-government-gallup/] support a single-payer healthcare system. The public understands that access to quality, affordable healthcare is a basic human right. Nobody should have to risk bankruptcy to get the care they need.

Sign if you agree: It’s time to listen to the American people and establish universal healthcare. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/medicare-for-all-petition-2024?contactdata=cZHJ4cZukYysAQJ0p4C/yljXJTaydRpCKn7SxrgrYlUqhY56QRysmWnN87Cc/cEN34Jp0GXxfJKyL05kl9ZTmoKuWiX7L1Wnx08Og13/Bk+zZCFxbZ5H+jYeAA4OpewzXWSN4x3+vKHNA5xpDjLgeg==]

Thank you for your activism and everything you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

Wait! One more thing–

Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.

If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20241216-medicare-for-all&amount=3]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20241216-medicare-for-all]

Santa Clara, CA 95051

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Connecticut Elections 2024 - A Scorecard 🙂
body:
Same Day Registration Has Been Weaponized | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=21b16946ab)
---
|
---
[](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=5f90fdee52&e=8763c56857)
| | | | |
---
|
# 2024 Voter Trends and the Path Forward for Connecticut
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | _**By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator**_
---
| As the 2022 candidate for Secretary of the State in Connecticut, I’ve closely analyzed the trends and developments shaping our elections. Today, I’m sharing key insights from a comprehensive scorecard on the 2024 general election. These data points underscore both our challenges and opportunities as we work to improve the integrity and efficiency of our electoral process.
Connecticut ranked fifth among 50 states shifting rightward toward the Republican Party in 2024, with a notable nine-point swing in favor of Donald Trump. While this marks significant momentum, it’s tempered by a loss of five seats in Hartford—a clear reminder that success on the national stage doesn’t automatically translate locally. We must act strategically and refuse to take anything for granted.Several takeaways demand immediate attention:
**1\. Early Voting’s Limited Impact—A Silver Lining for Republicans** During my campaign, I cautioned that early voting would not impact voter turnout despite Democrats touting it as a transformative measure. This prediction proved accurate. Connecticut spent millions of dollars to implement early voting, yet we didn’t see a single additional voter at the polls. Instead, we shifted the days on which people voted, 40% of the electorate voted early but the overal turnout was 71% compared to 74% turnout in 2020, **we went down 3pts in voter turnout!**!
Ironically, early voting may have benefitted Republicans more than Democrats. While we await detailed turnout data segmented by party affiliation, early observations show low turnout in traditional Democratic strongholds like New Haven and Hartford, sometimes dipping into the mid-40% range. Republican voters appear to have taken better advantage of early voting, as it required in-person participation and offered a more secure alternative to mail-in ballots, which have inherent risks. Additionally, absentee voting declined as a proportion of overall voting, reinforcing the preference for in-person methods.
Moving forward, we must reassess the scope of early voting. To limit expenses and reduce the strain on part-time registrars across Connecticut’s 169 towns, I propose:
• **Seven Days of Early Voting for General Elections:** This should accommodate voters while keeping costs manageable.
• **One Day of Early Voting** for Primaries and Municipal Elections: Given their smaller scale, a single day of early voting would balance accessibility and efficiency.
By making these adjustments, we can preserve the benefits of early voting while ensuring it remains cost-effective and practical for our state.
**2\. Same-Day Registration Concerns** This system has been weaponized, particularly in college towns, where transient student voters significantly impact local races. Many of these voters participate once and then leave the community—sometimes even casting absentee ballots in their hometown elections later. This trend is alarming and speaks to the broader issue of voter residency requirements.
Opportunities for ReformThese patterns reveal an urgent need for reform. We should consider:
**• Cut-off Times for Same-Day Registration:** Limiting registration to no later than noon or 2 p.m. would help local registrars properly vet voters.
•**Stricter Residency Requirements** : Common-sense measures, like those implemented in states such as Georgia, could address loopholes created by transient voters.
• **More Secure ID Standards** : Allowing college IDs as voter identification is risky, given how easily they can be tampered with or recreated.
We cannot afford to let these trends shape our elections. I urge you to take action by engaging with your legislators, submitting your testimony to the General Assembly, or voicing support for common-sense reforms. Together, we can build a more muscular, resilient electoral system for Connecticut.

Friend, I’m proud to protest for human rights alongside fellow democratic socialist Zohran Mamdani. As a New York State Assemblymember, Zohran introduced first-in-the-nation legislation to stop NY charities from funding Israeli war crimes, and last November he led a hunger strike in front of the White House demanding a permanent ceasefire. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJqlNR6rXIP7wquZneRZn0Vnigeety8ZNfO_iLHaB28awGu3unkoTLAPo2uTtKkZ-1tDPtGYkGZwNdKHHY53GnqVnUFpeMXLVdGVOFy1fA7f88Far4dVep8Rouzoh48bT9E3xxm4pYKkhqP0YQ0DEJl1hdJuR2tHM2uMTC4kJ1CUo6uF3XN5k_ffYxlWIdTlIN3GvZ_vVZG63QxwzOMhnjmER9wD-0P8F9I7hZa6o9ZBFF4F-GbFV13CbxCeyU0-PUMAFweBBQmKEMmNZg7Ql_uj1LBmF9rSiAwHaqKDjImvA2NRPU8VyQUlG8gj0vaaGzNDGGMN7PhDYuotWJvgnEHg/4cc/bYgnGgcvS1WMcLc1JLr4Zw/h1/h001.77NaiJc1CZJlN-OngNoReqTdapotpxZatAW5kZyp9no) **Now Zohran is running for mayor of New York City** , with a bold vision including fast and free buses, freezing rent for more than two million rent stabilized tenants, and universal free childcare for every young resident. Zohran and I are both committed to helping working families thrive, including pushing back against corporate grocery stores’ price gouging. He recently proposed a plan to start nonprofit city-owned grocery stores that sell groceries at much more affordable prices, saying: **“The job of city government isn’t to tinker around the edges while one in four children across our city go hungry.”** That’s the kind of energy we need at all levels of government, and because **the mayor of NYC represents more people than the vast majority of U.S. senators do** , this position plays a huge role in national politics. Zohran has already started a door-to-door canvassing operation in preparation for the June 2025 Democratic primary election. He doesn’t take any money from corporate PACs and needs grassroots donations to help show strong early support for his visionary campaign. Throughout his career Zohran has fought for the working class, including hunger striking alongside taxi drivers to achieve more than $450 million in transformative debt relief, winning over $100 million in the state budget for increased subway service and a successful fare-free bus pilot, and organizing New Yorkers to defeat a proposed dirty power plant.
As Zohran said, **“This campaign is for every person who believes in the dignity of their neighbors and that the government's job is to actually make our lives better.”** We deserve a government that works for the people, not just billionaires.
Meanwhile, NYC’s current mayor has praised Trump, sent police to attack pro-Palestine student protesters, and will face a trial in the spring after being indicted for corruption. And a potential NYC mayoral candidate is currently working with Trump’s lawyer to defend Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu from the International Criminal Court’s charges of war crimes. In response to this news, Zohran said: “We need a mayor focused on the cost of living crisis, not defending a genocide.”
In this time when dehumanization endangers our communities and lawmakers are trying to criminalize protesters for exercising their First Amendment rights, we need more elected leaders who will stand up for our rights and see everyone as worthy of life and of dignity.

clean_body: We’re pushing for transformative changes that help everyday families not only survive, but thrive. | | | Friend, I’m proud to protest for human rights alongside fellow democratic socialist Zohran Mamdani. As a New York State Assemblymember, Zohran introduced first-in-the-nation legislation to stop NY charities from funding Israeli war crimes, and last November he led a hunger strike in front of the White House demanding a permanent ceasefire. Now Zohran is running for mayor of New York City , with a bold vision including fast and free buses, freezing rent for more than two million rent stabilized tenants, and universal free childcare for every young resident. Zohran and I are both committed to helping working families thrive, including pushing back against corporate grocery stores’ price gouging. He recently proposed a plan to start nonprofit city-owned grocery stores that sell groceries at much more affordable prices, saying: “The job of city government isn’t to tinker around the edges while one in four children across our city go hungry.” That’s the kind of energy we need at all levels of government, and because the mayor of NYC represents more people than the vast majority of U.S. senators do , this position plays a huge role in national politics. Zohran has already started a door-to-door canvassing operation in preparation for the June 2025 Democratic primary election. He doesn’t take any money from corporate PACs and needs grassroots donations to help show strong early support for his visionary campaign. | Note: People can donate up to $2,100 to Zohran’s campaign, and if you’re a New York City resident, the first $250 of your donation to Zohran will be matched 8 times thanks to the city’s public campaign finance program. Throughout his career Zohran has fought for the working class, including hunger striking alongside taxi drivers to achieve more than $450 million in transformative debt relief, winning over $100 million in the state budget for increased subway service and a successful fare-free bus pilot, and organizing New Yorkers to defeat a proposed dirty power plant. As Zohran said, “This campaign is for every person who believes in the dignity of their neighbors and that the government's job is to actually make our lives better.” We deserve a government that works for the people, not just billionaires. Meanwhile, NYC’s current mayor has praised Trump, sent police to attack pro-Palestine student protesters, and will face a trial in the spring after being indicted for corruption. And a potential NYC mayoral candidate is currently working with Trump’s lawyer to defend Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu from the International Criminal Court’s charges of war crimes. In response to this news, Zohran said: “We need a mayor focused on the cost of living crisis, not defending a genocide.” In this time when dehumanization endangers our communities and lawmakers are trying to criminalize protesters for exercising their First Amendment rights, we need more elected leaders who will stand up for our rights and see everyone as worthy of life and of dignity. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Zohran for NYC. | | | | | | | | | Thank you for continuing to build a better world for all people. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Larry P. Arnn
subject: 2025 is a critical year
body:
A new birth of freedom

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=417404c1439b4a96823a543a1712ad76&_e=hW5-shSFeWPyMBJ_sin7eN_hzgPWrqcwUO-gaP8YpOUvqYRCBh3DFDFtVgC02uWXJz-XM0Or0ZRu8MbJ5MnSsHZ7qhoxqY0-hoh0VzgH9MU4nMqOSv4rPkaxWgWuIERU2fws-ToACSjlyrWuoaLfFeOwTCvt21s3SIG9Za-SlEiv-TOYMHyAlYLIa2LN21fXa0ENVfKNLAFLhnB8F3cLaij5s92ypEjemSuOG3ZwTJhIh0blmovb6uAgapTXFFYmSLpoqHtgCmldX8xTWwYZq3lzBGzkbsRixIMNZJuWYelTR52VD7qOx2pNdrtZUkdQ8j-PwP82woVYEuUkt25-Y9fHxyHR2ky7kQs5t5vwITiZBe9yL1LS_5PbwUPPFqAf)
---
| |
Dear Peter,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=417404c1439b4a96823a543a1712ad76&_e=hW5-shSFeWPyMBJ_sin7eN_hzgPWrqcwUO-gaP8YpOUvqYRCBh3DFDFtVgC02uWXJz-XM0Or0ZRu8MbJ5MnSsHZ7qhoxqY0-hoh0VzgH9MU4nMqOSv4rPkaxWgWuIERU2fws-ToACSjlyrWuoaLfFeOwTCvt21s3SIG9Za-SlEiv-TOYMHyAlYLIa2LN21fXa0ENVfKNLAFLhnB8F3cLaij5s92ypEjemSuOG3ZwTJgo3lSrfSfNCFWYFFe-ao2Pn_FZJ27wJcwhOO0XZFAhj5mZp65akPPZaG77eAo5gcYiUROP4X2LP43YdentvY631e4MyJ9kvf8HdUoMgSfI0iMXaKvOqnviQDaHVJdgsdfwPRn37h24Kre4MWswmbMz)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=417404c1439b4a96823a543a1712ad76&_e=hW5-shSFeWPyMBJ_sin7eN_hzgPWrqcwUO-gaP8YpOUvqYRCBh3DFDFtVgC02uWXJz-XM0Or0ZRu8MbJ5MnSsHZ7qhoxqY0-hoh0VzgH9MU4nMqOSv4rPkaxWgWuIERU2fws-ToACSjlyrWuoaLfFeOwTCvt21s3SIG9Za-SlEiv-TOYMHyAlYLIa2LN21fXa0ENVfKNLAFLhnB8F3cLaij5s92ypEjemSuOG3ZwTJgGA4BlVXmhb8jfy3yXgjPskjGCJ56NLetOipQmXbUDNoEEQsxbKjubztl7x5BmSubsRuj3qMoZwNE2myeNAVJBfTXOjH2tTThURpaGDynz5jb2Kq_ZX25uQ10Ld8-ay29rQzegyu118rmUS_9cyKY4)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we’ve made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed—because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** —as it does all its work—while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters’ contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=417404c1439b4a96823a543a1712ad76&_e=hW5-shSFeWPyMBJ_sin7eN_hzgPWrqcwUO-gaP8YpOUvqYRCBh3DFDFtVgC02uWXJz-XM0Or0ZRu8MbJ5MnSsHZ7qhoxqY0-hoh0VzgH9MU4nMqOSv4rPkaxWgWuIERU2fws-ToACSjlyrWuoaLfFeOwTCvt21s3SIG9Za-SlEiv-TOYMHyAlYLIa2LN21fXa0ENVfKNLAFLhnB8F3cLaij5s92ypEjemSuOG3ZwTJgHKDFQyk7U777QiBGZcJgGgM7qlvCD5hqGW9G-ddC-11RjcX1FfLxwTEk9e4DJfEhU4zotM8VdmegwgNdB7ZtDWzH5gclgUdNhIK1dExB4aMVP5B3z4m7f7SyK999Rqwxt2pqttGQ4dZpXw0KgnIHC)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=417404c1439b4a96823a543a1712ad76&_t=n_bZpcbuT9mzmD3vX-FWlDQjpENjRhMu1uPw-ZE_lNcykzXHwqITP_iXz-aPgrwHqK--0huc8eXr2TOrvlCcUi-bGWW1hlP4vta9RMSNfAIwCkl8n5RPGtNntnK_kU9v)

---

name: Sarah McBride
subject: December 31st
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Can I count on you?
#
$28.15.
**$28.15 is our campaign’s average email donation this month, and I’m incredibly proud of this number.**
Grassroots contributions from emails like this one helped us build a strong, historic, barrier-breaking campaign — a campaign that centers bold Democratic policies that lift up working people.
But here’s why I still need your help today.
**On December 31st, we’re facing our final FEC fundraising deadline of 2024.**
This will be the first time our numbers will go public since winning our election. It also comes just days before the new Congress is sworn in and I officially become Delaware’s representative in the House.
We have the opportunity to show how strong our movement has grown since Election Day and raise the resources to fight back against the GOP’s Project 2025 agenda.
[**To keep us on track to post the strongest FEC report possible, we need to raise $5,000 before midnight. Can you pitch in $28.15 — our average contribution amount for December?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241216-1?refcode=em20241216-1624&amount=28.15&refcode2=1624_21716_GRiv94&akid=1624%2E21716%2EGRiv94)

Thank you for everything,
Sarah McBride

name: Team AOC
subject: Slower
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Our philosophy is to never try to scare you into donating. Too many politicians treat their grassroots supporters like an ATM machine by sending relentless, panicky emails.
We’re determined to rise above that and treat our supporters with respect. Part of that respect is being honest and transparent when our fundraising dips and then politely asking if you can [chip in](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241216.pqjnkU&refcode=em20241216-7758-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7758%2E2526796%2EZd1AXP).
We run community efforts year-round, like the recent Turkey Drive for Thanksgiving and the Toy Drive for the upcoming holidays. Doing this work year-round means we have to budget a bit differently than campaigns typically do.
We expected a dip in our fundraising after the election, but it’s slower than we had planned for.
**To be fully transparent, so far this month we’ve raised $273,916.58 less than we raised in the first half of November**.
[So we want to ask, will you make a $5 donation today to help us catch up on our fundraising for the month so far? Your donation will help us continue our deep community organizing efforts and prepare to fight back against the incoming Trump Administration.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241216.pqjnkU&refcode=em20241216-7758-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7758%2E2526796%2EZd1AXP)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241216.pqjnkU&refcode=em20241216-7758-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=7758%2E2526796%2EZd1AXP)**
No matter what, we’re glad you’re here.
Thanks for being part of this movement,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241216?refcode=em20241216-7758-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=22&refcode2=7758_2526796_Zd1AXP&akid=7758%2E2526796%2EZd1AXP)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241216-7758-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=23&akid=7758%2E2526796%2EZd1AXP)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=7758%2E2526796%2EZd1AXP) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=7758%2E2526796%2EZd1AXP) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=7758%2E2526796%2EZd1AXP)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=7758%2E2526796%2EZd1AXP)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=7758%2E2526796%2EZd1AXP)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Pelosi vs AOC via Our Revolution
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Don't let Pelosi stop AOC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is so close to becoming the top Democrat on
the powerful House Oversight Committee — a key role in Congress that our
movement needs to take on Trump’s next administration.

On the other side, Pelosi is working to defeat AOC and elect a corporate
Democrat. Corporate Democrats are again banding together to try and stop a
powerful progressive opposition to Trump.

House Democrats will vote TOMORROW and we need to let them know that AOC
is the advocate the people need leading the Oversight committee. This vote
is extremely tight and could come down to just a few representatives.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: AOC was poised to take this role until Pelosi got involved…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

It’s time for Democratic Party leadership to pass the torch to the next
generation, and that includes making Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez the top
Democrat on the House Oversight Committee.

The Congressional Progressive Caucus, led by Justice Democrats’ own Reps.
Greg Casar, Pramila Jayapal, and Ilhan Omar, voted overwhelmingly to
endorse AOC as ranking member of the Oversight Committee.

Like Greg said, “If Democrats want to retake the majority, AOC is who we
want leading Oversight to hold Trump accountable. When Democrats retake
the majority, AOC is who we want chairing this key committee — holding
CEOs, Wall Street, and mega-corporations accountable.”

Reports indicated AOC was in a prime position to take on this role until
news broke that former House Speaker Rep. Nancy Pelosi is getting
involved:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241216?refcode=em20241216-36237&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36237_1203867_hGkBup&akid=36237%2E1203867%2EhGkBup ]The New Republic: Former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi is reportedly
working behind the scenes to tank Alexandra Ocasio Cortez’s bid to become
ranking member on the House Oversight Committee.

Instead of supporting AOC, Pelosi is reportedly working to quash her bid
for this influential role and pushing for a 15-year incumbent to win it.

This election made clear that the Democratic Party needs to usher in a new
era, led by new leaders who actually understand and speak to the
priorities of everyday people. It cannot be led by career politicians
clinging to their old ways, ideas, and agendas that brought us here.

While we demand the Democratic establishment learn from its mistakes and
promote proven, bold leaders like AOC to key roles like this, we’re not
wasting any time working to find even more working-class progressives to
challenge out-of-touch incumbents for their seats in 2026.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241216?refcode=em20241216-36237&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36237_1203867_hGkBup&akid=36237%2E1203867%2EhGkBup ]Help Justice Democrats continue to support Squad members like AOC and
build our bloc in Congress by making a grassroots donation today!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241216?refcode=em20241216-36237&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36237_1203867_hGkBup&akid=36237%2E1203867%2EhGkBup ]Contribute $5

The number of working-class, progressive candidates we’re able to recruit
and elect to Congress depends directly on how much we raise from emails
like this one. Thanks for anything you can give to fuel our fight for
change.

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241216-36237-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36237_1203867_hGkBup&akid=36237%2E1203867%2EhGkBup

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36237%2E1203867%2EhGkBup

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

name: Larry P. Arnn
subject: A new birth of freedom
body:
2025 is a critical year

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=15bbb8c863c04d9c87b1a4835ef5328a&_e=1CNiuw3Dbux-5iQ1d6L6wGvmhE_gEUMQMhLV5MR4WyTcsZv3K2TB05Qcvtos7C5S1qG7lOBfDmCsRya3yXboyVApDncRqqFu69ONBXrNjZXetojRRlUZe9NPMbFFNpUkG7JA-TILA_hy3V25h7E0PiNZSfb2Voer0ci3bIxne9R95Ofg7teF-qfgtsy1kgphCwvCw-oE81-wgcyVl5m7EJtzmzZ-zJtmg2o1M8fauBykMy-eWZBdEQaDuzJMxAMYJiRvTx0aM7F9rXFvpP2-Qx5ibKv5eWdZ5OooYKUtJuPprHwzTHjcY7PYKTqaeF1K6vDPn4Gd61lgBNhDSK4MKYoCKm_IR25NAsiaEnF7g09o5dW5nwbz0cXVSVMKemkyehr_mVgSxByMA8SnLcJ8iA%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Peter,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=15bbb8c863c04d9c87b1a4835ef5328a&_e=1CNiuw3Dbux-5iQ1d6L6wGvmhE_gEUMQMhLV5MR4WyTcsZv3K2TB05Qcvtos7C5S1qG7lOBfDmCsRya3yXboyVApDncRqqFu69ONBXrNjZXetojRRlUZe9NPMbFFNpUkG7JA-TILA_hy3V25h7E0PiNZSfb2Voer0ci3bIxne9R95Ofg7teF-qfgtsy1kgphCwvCw-oE81-wgcyVl5m7EJtzmzZ-zJtmg2o1M8fauBxRZ3QesPFBWTIB3S9US3-OHB3hTsdf31vM0ZkHoYjnaeJgBRnq-3I2kk-VF3KR9nWY4KpbD_NQPvf50OCEfmCgzNd-TmlLa6tliCqvVixMFUXOetkJcJaBmhTjze-oiLEjmt30r7MLIwlLZJogd92v68HJcmTdXzgy3eqxcTWqDw%3D%3D)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=15bbb8c863c04d9c87b1a4835ef5328a&_e=1CNiuw3Dbux-5iQ1d6L6wGvmhE_gEUMQMhLV5MR4WyTcsZv3K2TB05Qcvtos7C5S1qG7lOBfDmCsRya3yXboyVApDncRqqFu69ONBXrNjZXetojRRlUZe9NPMbFFNpUkG7JA-TILA_hy3V25h7E0PiNZSfb2Voer0ci3bIxne9R95Ofg7teF-qfgtsy1kgphCwvCw-oE81-wgcyVl5m7EJtzmzZ-zJtmg2o1M8fauBxm31s5jtn_BWU3jnLAnKig09kFImKOlOKVcrAgRq_aPrLxAZF58HtQkvLhxkN1b3y1IE61te9awitFy9TIZT6pCX5J1Ld4P0GT7jo-QMVp711brkgVHEVs1UoZkhQ6i_UnvzJe9mb8Xcz9YiyxQWFdILco4JyD5xumvojR8imUNw%3D%3D)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we’ve made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed—because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** —as it does all its work—while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters’ contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=15bbb8c863c04d9c87b1a4835ef5328a&_e=1CNiuw3Dbux-5iQ1d6L6wGvmhE_gEUMQMhLV5MR4WyTcsZv3K2TB05Qcvtos7C5S1qG7lOBfDmCsRya3yXboyVApDncRqqFu69ONBXrNjZXetojRRlUZe9NPMbFFNpUkG7JA-TILA_hy3V25h7E0PiNZSfb2Voer0ci3bIxne9R95Ofg7teF-qfgtsy1kgphCwvCw-oE81-wgcyVl5m7EJtzmzZ-zJtmg2o1M8fauBzEPSKOC0LlDpxnOoEo2l5W-eI6KQKOYl8SI6kqa3ZPnGjBN4eOIODgk-hG8MIHG_bddZ_M30ur48bVMHQje4kA5TC4gTXY-_M0GDc75KhJhzZtuMCs4AUqQ8R_9sqix_2F_HjkjHMHznHtixOLsxBVV-dfXxuAR5WqXwAxzQhd-w%3D%3D)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=15bbb8c863c04d9c87b1a4835ef5328a&_t=gJdXjto-EGnUXZcI4zCxsSNXeBNAZj_-lwMrXkdHSNhfs2HyJqQOfD48J6KBrCQaWz7iB-JBJuALvhgxebys0DHfCPoAwDbk3CSU_uZ7FunhhhnMsTd6Rv1-IS7gQY-B)

---

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: All of us have a role to play right now
body:
This is what’s happening...
---
Derek, As you read this email, Trump and his allies are preparing for their first 100 days in office. They’re getting ready to roll out their disastrous Project 2025 agenda. But something else is happening right now, too. Across the country, Democrats are stepping up. Since Election Day, thousands of people have chipped in to help us build the strongest possible Party. Today’s the day they need you to join them. The truth is that all of us have a role to play right now. Trump and his allies are hoping we don’t have the energy to fight back and hold them accountable in their first 100 days. We have to prove them wrong. But it’s going to take a strong team to do it. That’s why we’re turning to you in this moment. [**Will you please make a $3 contribution to help us build the strongest possible Democratic Party?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241216_2405_fr&refcode2=2413_22930333_SWux7z&akid=2413%2E22930333%2ESWux7z) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241216_2405_fr&refcode2=2413_22930333_SWux7z&akid=2413%2E22930333%2ESWux7z)**

body:
It's a great time to tune in

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_remind&n=1)
---
Monday, December 16, 2024 |
### December Statewide Call
Join us Tonight December 16th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. We'd love it if you helped us celebrate our biggest year yet. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgERVNyuzV5ZB37lp0k_9LCD4c4dp9LvodX0R2gcnEudc7A&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_remind&n=2) This month, we're focused on organizing. You can make a difference in your local area and we want to help. Connecting with your neighbors with calls and in person events builds a network. It's these networks across the state and country that are going to support candidates that run outside the traditional political system. That's what's going to get us out of the political rut we're in. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgERVNyuzV5ZB37lp0k_9LCD4c4dp9LvodX0R2gcnEudc7A&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_remind&n=3 "PA December call link") [PA December call link](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgERVNyuzV5ZB37lp0k_9LCD4c4dp9LvodX0R2gcnEudc7A&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_remind&n=3)
---
If your interests are more focused on the state party, we have plenty of needs. You can make us all stronger by getting involved in one of the following ways.
* Communication
* Candidate Research
* Candidate Support
* Fundraising
* Website management
* Convention planning
* Merch development
* and more

Or maybe you have ideas we haven't thought of yet, please let us know.
* * *
### Forward Party Year-end Call
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_remind&n=4)
2024 was a banner year for the Forward Party. We grew more than ever and ran more than 125 candidates across the country. With hundreds of volunteers and thousands of hours of hard work, we helped propel a host of new forward-thinking officials into office, and we're ready to celebrate them and look to the year ahead.
You can hear from the National Forward Party on Wed 12/18 at 7:15pm
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_remind&n=5 "National Year-end call link") [National Year-end call link](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_remind&n=5)
---
* * *
### Support our 2025 Efforts
As we wrap up 2024, we hope you'll take a moment to consider supporting our work financially in 2025. Even a small donation helps us do more especially if you'll make that gift recurring. When we can count on money coming we can take on bigger projects. In 2025, we'd like to hold our biggest convention yet, introduce State specific Forward Merch, Support candidates across the state, and reduce our reliance on the Nation Forward Party to become more self-sufficient as a state party. All these things will require money. Thank you to the people who have donated in the past!
**With PA Forward Party, every donor is a Mega-donor!**
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_remind&n=6 "Become a Mega-donor")[Become a Mega-donor](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_remind&n=6)
---

| | Did you catch Val’s email, Peter? Val’s highest priority in Congress is to make real change for Oregonians — whether it be defending reproductive rights, bringing prices down and wages up, and expanding access to affordable, quality healthcare. **Now, she wants to hear what your priorities are.** [**Will you take just a moment to tell Val what issues matter most to you and your loved ones?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98803435/517864952/-1069160189?refcode=AU_VAH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjMyZTJhYy1mNWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tx4ynMHXiEl_TaS42QNhtE_H3Lx8IXYWGePvmDHOkko=&emci=1e6a14ad-ddbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0632e2ac-f5bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9636579) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98803436/517864953/-89868724?refcode=AU_VAH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjMyZTJhYy1mNWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tx4ynMHXiEl_TaS42QNhtE_H3Lx8IXYWGePvmDHOkko=&emci=1e6a14ad-ddbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0632e2ac-f5bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9636579)
