_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Val Hoyle
Date: Wed, Dec 4, 2024
Subject: The road ahead_
Standing up for hardworking Oregonians has always been my top priority, team.
I’ve fought hard to raise wages, lower prices, and strengthen workers’ rights — and thanks to the support of people like you who helped me win reelection in Oregon’s 4th District, I’ll continue that fight for the next two years.
But as Donald Trump prepares to reenter the White House, I wanted to reach out to you before the holidays to ensure I’m also fighting for your priorities during the second Trump administration.
Protecting our shared interests is more important now than ever, Peter, so please: **[Will you take a moment to share your thoughts about the road ahead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98803437/517864954/-89868724?refcode=AU_VAH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjMyZTJhYy1mNWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tx4ynMHXiEl_TaS42QNhtE_H3Lx8IXYWGePvmDHOkko=&emci=1e6a14ad-ddbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0632e2ac-f5bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9636579)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98803438/517864955/-89868724?refcode=AU_VAH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjMyZTJhYy1mNWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tx4ynMHXiEl_TaS42QNhtE_H3Lx8IXYWGePvmDHOkko=&emci=1e6a14ad-ddbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0632e2ac-f5bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9636579)

Your responses will help me best serve you in the weeks and months ahead. Thank you.
— Val

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Sign this to rebuild and rebrand the Democratic party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241216-4592-footer&t=1001&akid=4592%2E420207%2Ep5RVI9 ]Pramila Jayapal

Peter, Democrats
have work to do to rebuild our party around a bold, populist, working
class agenda. And our next DNC chair must be ready to lead that
all-hands-on-deck effort.

That’s why I’m proud to stand alongside my colleagues Reps. Greg Casar,
Maxwell Frost, and Chris Deluzio in outlining four core principles for the
next DNC chair.

This is going to be a longer email, but I hope you’ll take the time to
read it. [ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20241216_DNC_chair_petition_resend?source=em20241216-4592&akid=4592%2E420207%2Ep5RVI9 ]And if you agree the next DNC chair should reflect these
principles, add your name to our petition today.

We believe the next DNC Chair must:

1. Reform, restructure, and rebrand the party.

* Rebuild our party from the ground up, committing to a 50-state
strategy that builds power through the state parties, is year-round
rather than transactional, and that respects all voters within our big
tent.

* Create an authentic Democratic brand that offers a clear alternative
and inclusive vision for how we will make life better for the 90% who
are struggling in this economy, take on the biggest corporations and
wealthiest individuals who have rigged the system, expose Trump’s
corporate favoritism and create a clear contrast with Republicans.

* Undertake an immediate assessment of the effectiveness of Democratic
political consulting practices and businesses, and terminate those who
have been ineffective and detrimental to the success of our candidates
and party. Expand the diversity of DNC consulting partners, focusing
on bringing in more consultants to have a demonstrated understanding
of populist policies that benefit poor and working class people of
every race and geography.

* Undertake a deep analysis of the communications ecosystem to
understand where voters get their information, and build an up-to-date
operation that targets voters in new ways that will reach, persuade
and move them.

* Bring in new leaders and encourage more voices to join party
leadership by dedicating seats for leaders of major allied
organizations and other key partners.

2. Embrace grassroots donors and reject special interest and dark money.

* Restructure and reform the DNC’s fundraising approach and apparatus to
ensure we prioritize fundraising from the 7 million+ grassroots donors
who contributed to our campaigns this year, rather than Big Money and
dark money donors who do not share our values. The Chair should
identify structural reforms to prevent their undue influence and
appoint a committee to outline options for state committees to limit
or eliminate dark money in primaries.

* Reinstate the 2008 DNC ban on corporate PAC donations and specifically
push to ban SuperPAC spending in Democratic primaries.

* Make significant financial reforms that bring transparency to the DNC
budget.

3. Rebuild our multiracial working-class base.

* Address the fundamental danger to Democrats receiving a shrinking
share of the vote of poor and working-class Americans of all races in
every presidential race since 2012.

* Make rebuilding our multiracial poor and working-class base the top
priority by launching new efforts to engage with multiracial
low-income and working-class voters in all 50 states.

* Prioritize a ten-year plan to invest in reaching and turning out young
people, including on college campuses with appropriate tactics,
strategy and communications infrastructure.

* Expand efforts to recruit working-class candidates which will further
the goal of rebuilding our multiracial, low-income, and working-class
base.

* Invest in showing our commitment to real populism versus Trump’s faux
populism through lifting up working-class voices and issue-based
campaigns that take on corporate concentration and monopoly power at
the expense of working people.

4. Show recent, demonstrated experience of turning around organizations,
building large coalitions and winning elections.

* Demonstrate clear recent victories and experience in winning elections
and building powerful organizations with a shared, coalition party
that wins through addition not exclusion.

* Embrace economic populism, multiracial coalition building and
grassroots organizing, and be able to articulate how they are
connected to building political power and winning elections for
Democrats.

* Present a clear strategy to help win upcoming statewide elections in
New Jersey, Ohio, and Virginia, as well as local elections across the
country.

* Invest in and coordinate with rank-and-file Democrats and grassroots
organizations who lead party-building efforts and campaigns in
communities across the United States.

These principles will be critical to revitalizing our party and building a
working class coalition that can win in the long term. It’s not going to
be easy, but together our people-powered movement can get it done.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20241216_DNC_chair_petition_resend?source=em20241216-4592&akid=4592%2E420207%2Ep5RVI9 ]Peter, if
you’re with me in this fight, please sign on to our petition calling on
the next DNC chair to do what’s needed to rebuild our party for the
working class.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20241216_DNC_chair_petition_resend?source=em20241216-4592&akid=4592%2E420207%2Ep5RVI9 ]Add your name

In solidarity,

Pramila Jayapal

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241216-4592-footer&t=1002&refcode2=4592_420207_p5RVI9&akid=4592%2E420207%2Ep5RVI9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4592%2E420207%2Ep5RVI9

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.
clean_body: [ ]Pramila Jayapal Peter, Democrats have work to do to rebuild our party around a bold, populist, working class agenda. And our next DNC chair must be ready to lead that all-hands-on-deck effort. That’s why I’m proud to stand alongside my colleagues Reps. Greg Casar, Maxwell Frost, and Chris Deluzio in outlining four core principles for the next DNC chair. This is going to be a longer email, but I hope you’ll take the time to read it. [ ]And if you agree the next DNC chair should reflect these principles, add your name to our petition today. We believe the next DNC Chair must: 1. Reform, restructure, and rebrand the party. Rebuild our party from the ground up, committing to a 50-state strategy that builds power through the state parties, is year-round rather than transactional, and that respects all voters within our big tent. Create an authentic Democratic brand that offers a clear alternative and inclusive vision for how we will make life better for the 90% who are struggling in this economy, take on the biggest corporations and wealthiest individuals who have rigged the system, expose Trump’s corporate favoritism and create a clear contrast with Republicans. Undertake an immediate assessment of the effectiveness of Democratic political consulting practices and businesses, and terminate those who have been ineffective and detrimental to the success of our candidates and party. Expand the diversity of DNC consulting partners, focusing on bringing in more consultants to have a demonstrated understanding of populist policies that benefit poor and working class people of every race and geography. Undertake a deep analysis of the communications ecosystem to understand where voters get their information, and build an up-to-date operation that targets voters in new ways that will reach, persuade and move them. Bring in new leaders and encourage more voices to join party leadership by dedicating seats for leaders of major allied organizations and other key partners. 2. Embrace grassroots donors and reject special interest and dark money. Restructure and reform the DNC’s fundraising approach and apparatus to ensure we prioritize fundraising from the 7 million+ grassroots donors who contributed to our campaigns this year, rather than Big Money and dark money donors who do not share our values. The Chair should identify structural reforms to prevent their undue influence and appoint a committee to outline options for state committees to limit or eliminate dark money in primaries. Reinstate the 2008 DNC ban on corporate PAC donations and specifically push to ban SuperPAC spending in Democratic primaries. Make significant financial reforms that bring transparency to the DNC budget. 3. Rebuild our multiracial working-class base. Address the fundamental danger to Democrats receiving a shrinking share of the vote of poor and working-class Americans of all races in every presidential race since 2012. Make rebuilding our multiracial poor and working-class base the top priority by launching new efforts to engage with multiracial low-income and working-class voters in all 50 states. Prioritize a ten-year plan to invest in reaching and turning out young people, including on college campuses with appropriate tactics, strategy and communications infrastructure. Expand efforts to recruit working-class candidates which will further the goal of rebuilding our multiracial, low-income, and working-class base. Invest in showing our commitment to real populism versus Trump’s faux populism through lifting up working-class voices and issue-based campaigns that take on corporate concentration and monopoly power at the expense of working people. 4. Show recent, demonstrated experience of turning around organizations, building large coalitions and winning elections. Demonstrate clear recent victories and experience in winning elections and building powerful organizations with a shared, coalition party that wins through addition not exclusion. Embrace economic populism, multiracial coalition building and grassroots organizing, and be able to articulate how they are connected to building political power and winning elections for Democrats. Present a clear strategy to help win upcoming statewide elections in New Jersey, Ohio, and Virginia, as well as local elections across the country. * Invest in and coordinate with rank-and-file Democrats and grassroots organizations who lead party-building efforts and campaigns in communities across the United States. These principles will be critical to revitalizing our party and building a working class coalition that can win in the long term. It’s not going to be easy, but together our people-powered movement can get it done. [ ]Peter, if you’re with me in this fight, please sign on to our petition calling on the next DNC chair to do what’s needed to rebuild our party for the working class. [ ]Add your name In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal Contribute to Pramila Jayapal:

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Today’s tragedy in Madison, Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
Just days after we remembered the 26 lives lost at Sandy Hook Elementary School, another school and community has been subjected to the terror of a mass shooting—this time, in Madison, Wisconsin. Currently, it’s being reported that two people died—one student and one teacher—and at least six others were injured.
My heart goes out to those who were senselessly killed and injured, their families, and the entire Madison community who will now feel the impact and trauma of this shooting for years to come.
Students deserve to be safe in their schools. But in our country, gun violence is the **number one** killer of children. This is a frightening and devastating statistic, and it’s one that we are working everyday to change here at GIFFORDS.
Next month, our new Congress will be sworn in and a new presidential administration will take office. I will be doing everything I can to urge our newly elected officials to treat gun violence like the public health crisis that it is.
I hope you will join me in this critical fight.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

**GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to GIFFORDS PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241216-2-b&t=1&akid=9647%2E3935704%2Es48w8Y)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=9647%2E3935704%2Es48w8Y) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Friend,
If you’ve followed Lateefah’s career at any point over the three decades, you know that whether she’s working with young women and children, people with disabilities, or our immigrant communities, she refuses to leave anyone behind. That commitment drives everything she does.
Like us, she understands the harsh realities that working families face in this economy. But she also understands that our voices are stronger when used together.
This season is about giving — and about standing together to ensure our loved ones and neighbors are safe, supported, and valued. Congress hasn’t even started yet, but Lateefah is already fighting for you and yours. But she can’t continue this vital work without you on her side.
As we push toward our mid-month goal, your support is more critical than ever. Will you chip in today to help Lateefah stand up for our communities? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=x_121624_midmonth]

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Justice for All? Or just some?
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Fvd/?__vbtrk=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – History was made. President Trump’s overwhelming victory proves one thing: the American people are ready for **bold leadership** and **fearless action**.
But there’s a dark cloud that we cannot ignore.
**The men and women who stood up on January 6th, 2021, have been targeted relentlessly by a corrupt system desperate to crush their voices.**
These patriots deserve our gratitude—not persecution.
**__[That’s why I’m demanding immediate action: a full pardon for every American wrongfully prosecuted for standing up for what they believed in.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Fvd/?__vbtrk=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Fvd/?__vbtrk=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
These aren’t criminals—they’re **citizens**. **Fathers**. **Mothers**. **Veterans**. **Neighbors**. _**The very fabric of our great nation.**_
They gathered at the Capitol to exercise their rights, **_and now they need us to exercise ours_**.
This is more than a petition— _**_[it’s a fight for our freedom](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Fvd/?__vbtrk=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**_. A fight against a government that thinks it can silence you.

What was done to those brave men & women on that day proves one thing:
The Deep State doesn’t just want to silence you... **They want to erase you**. They want to watch you sit in prison, and smear anybody who would stand up to them over it.
I won’t be silenced, and I will _**never**_ stop fighting for what’s right. I’m reaching out to you, Friend, because I know... _**you feel the same**_.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Fvd/?__vbtrk=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_For Freedom_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Fvd/?__vbtrk=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Fvd/?__vbtrk=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY1NjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| |
---

If you do not wish to receive future emails from me, please [click here](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=265645&trkid=563530587&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Hirono HQ
subject: It’s never too late to plan ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter — November’s elections may now be in the rearview mirror, but with Trump about to take office and Republicans about to gain control of the Senate and the House, it’s never too early to begin thinking about the next election cycle and begin forming a winning strategy. One important way we can ensure our campaign has what it needs to continue playing a key role in fighting back against MAGA extremism, promoting Mazie’s progressive agenda, and flipping the Senate blue is by building a strong base of sustaining donations. **If Mazie can count on you to make a small monthly donation, that will go a long way toward sustaining her campaign for years to come.** **[Will you start a monthly contribution of any amount today? name: History Facts
subject: Why don't we eat these breakfast foods anymore?
body:
Some of our favorite morning dishes have been around for thousands of years: In fact, researchers believe the earliest variations of pancakes and porridges were first eaten as far back as the Stone Age. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1ap2fkzc8e4ie8v8rfxdl2n7adfd8xm5nnw4jrqknujsy3q554x8z68i69374mjdrgafme87tby155bn9uoc8vsl3r33bmf07uaonwhfff7vt8zv3wzhvtd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=solxe2&__onlt=h)

body:
We’re still about $2,200 short of our mid-month goal.
#
Derek, I need to keep it real with you.
With so much $$$ being spent to flip PA red this year, we’ve gotta hit our goals every month to keep this seat 🔵.
But with the holidays coming up, I know yinz + youse won’t be checking your email next week — **and we’re still about $2,200 short of our mid-month goal.** 😱
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241216?refcode=em20241216-9695&refcode2=9695_434096_krTNLi&akid=9695%2E434096%2EkrTNLi)
That’s why we’re trying to raise as much as we can before the holidays to make up for it.
**Derek, can I count on you to help me keep fighting for PA in the Senate?**
[**Pitch in $5 or anything you can before midnight to help us reach this goal. I can’t do it without you!!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241216?refcode=em20241216-9695&refcode2=9695_434096_krTNLi&akid=9695%2E434096%2EkrTNLi)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241216?amount=5&refcode=em20241216-9695&refcode2=9695_434096_krTNLi&akid=9695%2E434096%2EkrTNLi)**
Thanks for your support,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241216-9695-footer&t=1&refcode2=9695_434096_krTNLi&akid=9695%2E434096%2EkrTNLi)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9695%2E434096%2EkrTNLi)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9695%2E434096%2EkrTNLi)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Urgent Alert
subject: Ohio and Florida:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **Two Senate special elections could change _EVERYTHING_ , team:**

| STATE: | SENATOR:
---|---
Ohio | JD Vance
Florida | Marco Rubio

If we win these crucial states, our chances of flipping the Senate will SKYROCKET! We need to be ready immediately once the elections are finalized, so don't delay:

**[Chip in $5 IMMEDIATELY to FLIP key states like these, defend our progress, and take back the Senate majority>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241216-UrgentAlert-SpecialElectionTable-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241216-UrgentAlert-SpecialElectionTable-ETG-sl1&akid=19161%2E9716520%2EqNTggI)**
| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241216-UrgentAlert-SpecialElectionTable-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241216-UrgentAlert-SpecialElectionTable-ETG-sl1&akid=19161%2E9716520%2EqNTggI)

President-elect Donald Trump **[interrupted a Japanese bank CEO's speech](https://substack.com/redirect/2f56fd02-f489-4d8f-b747-202b99b47ba0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to negotiate an additional $100 billion investment into the U.S. economy in an unexpected live T.V. moment.
"I'm gonna ask him right now, would you make it $200 billion dollars?" Trump asked SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son during a Monday televised press conference. Son was announcing a plan for his bank to invest $100 billion into the U.S. over the next 4 years.
He was not expecting Trump to **[put him on the spot like this...](https://substack.com/redirect/2f56fd02-f489-4d8f-b747-202b99b47ba0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2f56fd02-f489-4d8f-b747-202b99b47ba0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Well, my promise is 100 (billion) but you know,... I will try to make it happen," Son told Trump. "He's an excellent negotiator"
Trump said that the investment would create 100,000 American jobs in artificial intelligence and related fields, adding that the gesture showed "monumental confidence in America's future."
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2f56fd02-f489-4d8f-b747-202b99b47ba0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here ...**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a9d37059-f9b8-4595-9326-39c39c521561?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I remember how **the Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.**
And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
* More than 2 million lost jobs
* Stocks plummeting over 20%
* IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling

**We can 't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it.**
That's why I've put together **[a concise guide to help you protect your finances](https://substack.com/redirect/a9d37059-f9b8-4595-9326-39c39c521561?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during this downturn.
**[Request your free guide now to recession-proof your life](https://substack.com/redirect/a9d37059-f9b8-4595-9326-39c39c521561?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings.
[Request Your Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/a9d37059-f9b8-4595-9326-39c39c521561?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Republican EXPLODES at FEMA official for prioritizing illegals while Americans STARVED**
Rep. Marc Molinaro **[LOST IT at the FEMA director Deanne Criswell](https://substack.com/redirect/3daca176-e003-490f-ba9d-0b572068638f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for her agency prioritizing aid to illegal immigrants while Americans were left to struggle in the aftermath of Hurricane Helene.
**["Do you see the absurdity?!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/3daca176-e003-490f-ba9d-0b572068638f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Molinaro demanded.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3daca176-e003-490f-ba9d-0b572068638f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Ma'am, do you think in responding to an emergency, the priority of government ought to be to ensure that American citizens are triaged and that the services of FEMA are focused on responding to them first?!" he continued.
Criswell meekly answered that Congress passed law allowing FEMA to provide aid to illegal migrants, but did not reconcile Molinaro's concern that American citizens were not sufficiently taken care of during the horrific storm and may have been if resources were better appropriated.
"Our mission is to support people, help people before, during and after natural disasters," Criswell responded.
Molinaro was not satisfied at all with her answer. Watch the CLASH below:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3daca176-e003-490f-ba9d-0b572068638f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

# **[Kari Lake](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=680beb5e931f4b3ea3eba4f2abfaab93&_e=pz1GTCZPzdvhu0SvMjO_Ci0EcJSYaLu0Z7W7HsbNqeeLRw-G8houXSRx9ScJUUxHypUvtBg_B3Udh0yW3WWlNvS-hgHggMMw7yg4HKoGUHtAuIffwU6unOUaVx-GguPkjvmZERMy2xQyg9KB8hIeRaAZEDBMix-m5Otn6KyfTX_NnSdSGuufq9yZEBXGJRitEVG2xj36eHhVpyvFM0Wtwjf-rw474wl02OXtaIzT5-lgiUlz8Kqr2q7j8mswxqr14ZmQR9yp5_ps6AnzzW_Jg7HXOTcJhBy00WDA3SWvzonqJUpY4nHcmIn8D6gYwd5tDHiDbSC3-CN4Az1JlJ6QyAdTHLKZSi2Br7Q3ZX7lyChqOSDe0Uw6RImP120TWaOZv53GHE90u7iCjl0Z1CAkvkrItSLMB6jAwf4W132g4Qc%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=680beb5e931f4b3ea3eba4f2abfaab93&_e=pz1GTCZPzdvhu0SvMjO_Ci0EcJSYaLu0Z7W7HsbNqeeLRw-G8houXSRx9ScJUUxHypUvtBg_B3Udh0yW3WWlNvS-hgHggMMw7yg4HKoGUHtAuIffwU6unOUaVx-GguPkjvmZERMy2xQyg9KB8hIeRaAZEDBMix-m5Otn6KyfTX_NnSdSGuufq9yZEBXGJRitEVG2xj36eHhVpyvFM0Wtwjf-rw474wl02OXtaIzT5-lgiUlz8Kqr2q7j8mswxqr1mbGlnk9dYZBI9imESzcRNlsRKzGAoPo6F-fqEx8zpnMwBL-_N_Y8nAwbbg0VpiazIqIxrGO4Qq9ZWQ6IaPUG4bzsKdmvPUprp8vlGsvNCzPvqshfOjKzk_UbJD5A0CmX-L4_i5YN0KTQjFkK2EBItku8q8c7oQc-5sYxABDbGuM%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---

As we prepare to celebrate EMILYs List's 40th anniversary, let's take a moment to reflect on how far we've come:

In 1985, 25 fearless women — the Founding Mothers of EMILYs List — gathered in Ellen R. Malcolm's basement armed with their Rolodexes and an ambitious vision. Their goal? To create a network of at least 1,000 members dedicated to electing qualified Democratic pro-choice women to every level of office. Not only did they achieve this goal in just 10 months — they surpassed it.

Nearly 40 years later, our millions-strong community has made history time and time again. [**That is why I'm inviting you, Peter, to join this legacy and become a 2025 EMILYs List member.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98805369/517871836/2025016054?refcode=WTEFEX30_20241216_WhyMembership_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTVlOTU2Zi1mZWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VtLkFB5_uqzMUc5NEY83Nvh07GDTJwMZ-Hm4Ki_v40=) | [BECOME A 2025 EMILYs LIST EARLY BIRD MEMBER](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98805370/517871837/2025016054?refcode=WTEFEX30_20241216_WhyMembership_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTVlOTU2Zi1mZWJiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VtLkFB5_uqzMUc5NEY83Nvh07GDTJwMZ-Hm4Ki_v40=)

clean_body: 1️⃣ perfect way to secure your place on the list → | = Peter — I'm thrilled to share some exciting news: Today marks the kickoff of our Early Bird 2025 Membership Drive! As we prepare to celebrate EMILYs List's 40th anniversary, let's take a moment to reflect on how far we've come: In 1985, 25 fearless women — the Founding Mothers of EMILYs List — gathered in Ellen R. Malcolm's basement armed with their Rolodexes and an ambitious vision. Their goal? To create a network of at least 1,000 members dedicated to electing qualified Democratic pro-choice women to every level of office. Not only did they achieve this goal in just 10 months — they surpassed it. Nearly 40 years later, our millions-strong community has made history time and time again. = | = While our Rolodexes look a little different in 2024 than they did in 1985, our mission hasn't changed. We invest early and fight hard for Democratic pro-choice women running for office up and down the ballot, coast to coast. We have a big year ahead of us, Peter, with governor races to win and critical local elections! By donating today, you'll secure your 2025 EMILYs List membership — which means you're on the ground floor of an incredible year of recruitment, endorsement, victories, and so much more. Plus, you'll get a beautiful personalized membership card in the mail! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Christen Sparago (she/they) Interim Vice President of Digital, EMILYs List = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Team NDRC
subject: What’s happened in Ohio should anger each and every one of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We've never let a loss be the final word.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98805527/517872457/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmMGQ4NDg2LWZmYmItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nS24W4r1EOW6P4hYSUKES5U1PuMQagYTyZzPpuaSfMQ=&emci=cfabe668-cfbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=1f0d8486-ffbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter — What’s happened in Ohio should anger each and every one of us. Back in 2015, Ohio voters passed a constitutional amendment to create the Ohio Redistricting Commission to draw new maps. It’d take until 2021 for the Republican-led Commission to meet for the first time — but only two years for their proposed state legislative and congressional maps to be struck down a staggering _seven times_. During the 2022 election, Ohio voters were forced to use unconstitutional maps that the Ohio Supreme Court had already overturned for unduly favoring the GOP. **This year, Ohio voters had an opportunity to create a citizen-led redistricting commission — and of course, Republicans did everything they could to sabotage the ballot initiative. ** The Ohio Ballot Board even resorted to trickery in the phrasing that’d appear on official ballots! Republican Ohio Secretary of State Frank LaRose wrote the draft language and pushed it through along party lines, claiming that Issue 1 would “establish a new taxpayer-funded commission of appointees required to gerrymander the boundaries of state legislative and congressional districts.” What did the _actual_ proposal say? Issue 1 would "ban partisan gerrymandering." (See why we’re angry, Peter?) Republicans knew they couldn’t win by telling the truth, so they resorted to bald-faced lies. Republican Governor Mike DeWine spread more confusion at a press conference — take a look at what Biz, the NDRC’s president, had to say about thoses shenanigans: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98805528/517872458/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_StoryofOhio_email_20241216-NDRC-Tier1-StoryofOhio_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241216-NDRC-Tier1-StoryofOhio_&utm_campaign=StoryofOhio&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmMGQ4NDg2LWZmYmItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nS24W4r1EOW6P4hYSUKES5U1PuMQagYTyZzPpuaSfMQ=)
---
**In the end, Republicans successfully defeated Issue 1. Despite their deceptive tactics, it was still a close race — and we’ve never let a loss be the final word. **
[**We’re gearing up for a congressional map redraw next year in Ohio, and we’ll be ready for the fight. Will you join us with a $30 donation today to get us off to a strong start?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98805529/517872459/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_StoryofOhio_email_20241216-NDRC-Tier1-StoryofOhio_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241216-NDRC-Tier1-StoryofOhio_&utm_campaign=StoryofOhio&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmMGQ4NDg2LWZmYmItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nS24W4r1EOW6P4hYSUKES5U1PuMQagYTyZzPpuaSfMQ=)
[ADD MY NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98805530/517872460/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_StoryofOhio_email_20241216-NDRC-Tier1-StoryofOhio_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241216-NDRC-Tier1-StoryofOhio_&utm_campaign=StoryofOhio&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmMGQ4NDg2LWZmYmItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nS24W4r1EOW6P4hYSUKES5U1PuMQagYTyZzPpuaSfMQ=)

Please don’t skip this email, team.
It’s Carleigh here at NextGen, and I know what you’re probably thinking. This time of year, donating may be the very last thing on your mind. But I hope you’ll agree that **it’s more necessary than ever for young voters to continue fighting for our future**.
As we look ahead to a second Trump presidency, it’s critical that we take the necessary steps to fight back against the threats to our democracy. From his cabinet picks to his first-day promises, Trump’s ascendency will have an impact on young voters.
Our environment, education systems, federal bureaucracy, and much more are in danger.
**For us to step into 2025 prepared to tackle anything Trump throws at us, we have to act _now_.**
**We still need you with us in this fight.** Your support helps keep NextGen’s mission alive so we can empower young voters nationwide. This youth-powered movement wouldn’t exist without you.
So we have to ask:

name: David Hogg
subject: Announcing my campaign for DNC Vice Chair
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I’m running to bring new voices to the Democratic Party.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241216-1&t=1&akid=1537%2E587540%2EKbuEji)
Peter, I have a special announcement to make: **I’m running for DNC Vice Chair.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241216-1?refcode=em20241216-1537&amount=5&refcode2=1537_587540_KbuEji&akid=1537%2E587540%2EKbuEji)
**[Can you show your early support for my DNC Vice Chair run and for electing the next generation of bold, young progressive elected officials with a $5 split contribution directly to my campaign and Leaders We Deserve right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241216-1?refcode=em20241216-1537&amount=5&refcode2=1537_587540_KbuEji&akid=1537%2E587540%2EKbuEji)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241216-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241216-1537&refcode2=1537_587540_KbuEji&akid=1537%2E587540%2EKbuEji)**
**Peter, I’m running for this position because I want to help represent young people** and make sure that we are standing up to the consulting class that increasingly the Democratic Party is representing instead of the working class.
We need to realize that we are increasingly the party of sycophants. We are just surrounding ourselves with people who tell us what we want to hear instead of what we need to hear. More and more, we are surrounding ourselves with paid political consultants who let what donors say to them guide their talking points.
I want to bring fresh new voices to the conversation about where the Democratic Party goes from here. With your support, we can have a young person at the table.
**[If you’re ready for the next generation of leadership – at the Democratic Party and in races across the country – split a donation between my campaign for DNC Vice Chair and Leaders We Deserve right now to power this movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241216-1?refcode=em20241216-1537&amount=5&refcode2=1537_587540_KbuEji&akid=1537%2E587540%2EKbuEji)**
As always, thank you for your support!
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241216-1&t=2&refcode2=1537_587540_KbuEji&akid=1537%2E587540%2EKbuEji)**

Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Fair Fight
subject: 3 million registered Georgians didn’t vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Help us fuel the work and fights to come |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98806253/517874490/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241216_f_GAElectionAnalysis_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWU1NDA2OS0wMmJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u5fGMXR5RSG-YPst8pFf-YgcmUKWWqx0Ivtmm44Lilo=&emci=6de54069-02bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6ee54069-02bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1037277)

| | As we begin to dive into results and analysis from the recent election, we’re seeing a shocking trend: voters not showing up for our democracy. 3 million registered Georgians didn’t vote in November, and 700,000 voters who cast a ballot in 2020 didn’t vote in 2024. We know we have work to do to reach these voters and learn why they didn't head to the polls. When we see numbers like these, we have to take action. As voter suppression tactics ramp up, and a new administration threatens to weaken the right to vote, we must make the case for showing up and protecting free and fair elections. [**The work ahead will be critical, but with dedicated activists like you fighting with us, we can push back against anti-voter attacks and remind voters that their voices matter. Can you chip in a donation today to fuel our work in the months to come?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98806254/517874491/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241216_f_GAElectionAnalysis_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWU1NDA2OS0wMmJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u5fGMXR5RSG-YPst8pFf-YgcmUKWWqx0Ivtmm44Lilo=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98806255/517874492/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241216_f_GAElectionAnalysis_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWU1NDA2OS0wMmJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u5fGMXR5RSG-YPst8pFf-YgcmUKWWqx0Ivtmm44Lilo=)
---
Fair Fight is a national leader in the fight for voting rights and democracy. We’re trusted in this space, and we have the organizing power to reach millions of voters.
In the months to come, we’ll be doing all that we can to stop, slow, mitigate, and expose anti-voter activity, and prove to voters that when they show up, they make a difference.
Thank you for being with us.
Team Fair Fight

clean_body: Help us fuel the work and fights to come | | | As we begin to dive into results and analysis from the recent election, we’re seeing a shocking trend: voters not showing up for our democracy. 3 million registered Georgians didn’t vote in November, and 700,000 voters who cast a ballot in 2020 didn’t vote in 2024. We know we have work to do to reach these voters and learn why they didn't head to the polls. When we see numbers like these, we have to take action. As voter suppression tactics ramp up, and a new administration threatens to weaken the right to vote, we must make the case for showing up and protecting free and fair elections. = | = Fair Fight is a national leader in the fight for voting rights and democracy. We’re trusted in this space, and we have the organizing power to reach millions of voters. In the months to come, we’ll be doing all that we can to stop, slow, mitigate, and expose anti-voter activity, and prove to voters that when they show up, they make a difference. Thank you for being with us. Team Fair Fight = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2024 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. subject: Fani Willis Update
body:
Fani Willis Hides Communications with January 6 Committee and Jack Smith Notorious Fulton County District Attorney Fanni Willis refused to release any non-public documents in response to a court order finding her in default for failing to respond to our lawsuit seeking her communications with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee.

Tulsi Gabbard being targeted for surveillance under the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) “Quiet Skies” terrorist watch program (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security (No. 1:24-cv-03427)). The Transportation Security Administration is a component of the Department of Homeland Security. As noted in the December 11 court order, Judicial Watch seeks to expedite the lawsuit. Under Wray’s leadership, the FBI has become an enemy of transparency, the rule of law, constitutional government, and the civil rights of tens of millions of Americans. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71566&L=34118&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmVzaWduYXRpb24tY2hyaXN0b3BoZXItd3JheS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1ccdabc99ccc0fd4f96ad59b3cb9744c78bddaeafadd3d82daee79d95dc851fe)

It happens to involve a case Judicial Watch investigated and we obtained important government records that contradict the skeptical tone of the lengthy article, which portrays Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin as somewhat of a fear-mongering embellisher who fabricated the seriousness of the matter. “Virginia’s governor has used the arrest of two undocumented men who misunderstood directions to stop at a check-in station to inflame fears over illegal immigration,” according to the piece, published by the Washington Post a few days ago. The article quotes federal prosecutors dismissing the breach as an “Amazon delivery.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71566&L=34083&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmVkcy1kb3ducGxheS1taWxpdGFyeS1iYXNlLWJyZWFjaC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=c7af9dad82d5d30b6453745c7734b78637a56ac3b46df3a7461686ac8895cd08)

### [FBI Provided Democrats with Information on Whistleblowers Who Testified at Weaponization Hearing ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71566&L=34119&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL2ZiaS1wcm92aWRlZC1kZW1vY3JhdHMtd2l0aC1pbmZvcm1hdGlvbi1vbi13aGlzdGxlYmxvd2Vycy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6c7ca05e0859517b31ac0b38b2dda899198cf772e647ff2fbc9678d79258bda3) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced recently it received 54 pages of records from the Department of Justice in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit which show the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) Office of Congressional Affairs (OCA) provided a Democrat staffer with information on FBI whistleblowers who detailed the bureau’s targeting of political opponents and retaliation for their testifying at a May 18, 2023, hearing of the House Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71566&L=34119&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL2ZiaS1wcm92aWRlZC1kZW1vY3JhdHMtd2l0aC1pbmZvcm1hdGlvbi1vbi13aGlzdGxlYmxvd2Vycy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6c7ca05e0859517b31ac0b38b2dda899198cf772e647ff2fbc9678d79258bda3)

### [Grassley rips Wray's 'failed' leadership at FBI with 11 pages of examples in blistering 'no confidence' letter ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71566&L=34080&F=H&&hash=f027008f13c4205e1e6ce103778aa5b8fbc1124da79a705dcb439ce2f517271d) Fox News Republican Iowa Sen. Chuck Grassley doubled down that he believes Christopher Wray has failed his "fundamental duties" as FBI director in a blistering letter expressing he has "no confidence" in Wray’s continued leadership over the agency. Grassley’s lengthy letter to Wray, which spans 11 pages, detailed specific examples of Wray’s "failures" as FBI director. clean_body: Fani Willis Hides Communications with January 6 Committee and Jack Smith Notorious Fulton County District Attorney Fanni Willis refused to release any non-public documents in response to a court order finding her in default for failing to respond to our lawsuit seeking her communications with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 16, 2024 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | Fani Willis Hides Communications with January 6 Committee and Jack Smith Notorious Fulton County District Attorney Fanni Willis refused to release any non-public documents in response to a court order finding her in default for failing to respond to our lawsuit seeking her communications with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. ---|--- | | | | | (Washington, DC) – Judicial Watch announced today that it filed on December 9, 2024, a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuitagainst the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for records on former Rep. Tulsi Gabbard being targeted for surveillance under the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) “Quiet Skies” terrorist watch program (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security (No. 1:24-cv-03427)). The Transportation Security Administration is a component of the Department of Homeland Security. As noted in the December 11 court order, Judicial Watch seeks to expedite the lawsuit. ---|--- | | | | | (Washington, DC) – Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton made the following statement on the pending resignation of FBI Director Christopher Wray: Director Wray’s resignation is a good first step to cleaning house at the FBI. Under Wray’s leadership, the FBI has become an enemy of transparency, the rule of law, constitutional government, and the civil rights of tens of millions of Americans. ---|--- | | | | | Adding to the mainstream media’s huge credibility problems, a major newspaper has omitted critical facts in a story accusing a Republican governor of inflaming fears over illegal immigration for bringing attention to a serious breach at a U.S. military base earlier this year. It happens to involve a case Judicial Watch investigated and we obtained important government records that contradict the skeptical tone of the lengthy article, which portrays Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin as somewhat of a fear-mongering embellisher who fabricated the seriousness of the matter. “Virginia’s governor has used the arrest of two undocumented men who misunderstood directions to stop at a check-in station to inflame fears over illegal immigration,” according to the piece, published by the Washington Post a few days ago. The article quotes federal prosecutors dismissing the breach as an “Amazon delivery.” ---|--- | | | Judicial Watch “The Biden-Harris administration is running a major league cover-up on the near assassination of former President Trump,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced recently it received 54 pages of records from the Department of Justice in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit which show the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) Office of Congressional Affairs (OCA) provided a Democrat staffer with information on FBI whistleblowers who detailed the bureau’s targeting of political opponents and retaliation for their testifying at a May 18, 2023, hearing of the House Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Fox News Republican Iowa Sen. Chuck Grassley doubled down that he believes Christopher Wray has failed his "fundamental duties" as FBI director in a blistering letter expressing he has "no confidence" in Wray’s continued leadership over the agency. Grassley’s lengthy letter to Wray, which spans 11 pages, detailed specific examples of Wray’s "failures" as FBI director. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2024, All Rights Reserved |

clean_body: If we want to keep Christ in Christmas, defend American values, and keep our country safe, we need you to stay vigilant. We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House. | | | | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because... We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat! Remember: We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House. Remember: If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress. Remember: If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE. "Friend – we’re racing to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three. We need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the year to help win these Special Elections and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority." If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now. Our Conservative House Majority - and the fate of President Trump's legislative agenda - hangs in the balance. *** CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS | | "CONTRIBUTE 10 BUCKS BEFORE 12/31" | "CONTRIBUTE 20 BUCKS BEFORE 12/31" | "CONTRIBUTE 50 BUCKS BEFORE 12/31" | "CONTRIBUTE MORE BEFORE 12/31" Listen - This final deadline of 2024 was important before but now that our House Majority may depend on winning three Special Elections ... THIS IS THE MOST IMPORTANT DEADLINE OF THE YEAR! Majority Leader Steve Scalise agreed that 20,000 more contributions is the bare minimum we need before the end of the year to help jumpstart our efforts to hold FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21. Every contribution helps us refuel our voter contact budgets, recruit volunteers, and get our positive message out to voters - that's how we win key races like these. body:

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98806384/517875000/779512579?contactdata=RqmM2J4vt4F4UdXN/PLTyFptB4nDwCcAZWpUA/aarWV+EEtfU/WN2Og9zhWCOg1g/3GFZXMYzbpdceDCeVmPG0fUSVpJjmdpsIXm7L92ak9uzL0PRPdlD7bl4SdjINqF68qtJq8bWz6TU34dJCyTh94I8fqSVT3k9gpLBL5Kekc=&sourceid=1165968&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNGNhYjUxLTA0YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QuTuey1qd6Zo8xd1HlELCMnRk4_OxLnOVzFPG5xccrQ=&emci=9f6c611e-a3b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=914cab51-04bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1504551)
Peter, I’m a red-tailed hawk here with an invitation: Will you fly with me above Sonoma Coast Redwoods?
My friends at Save the Redwoods League are working hard to raise the remaining funds needed to purchase and protect Sonoma Coast Redwoods, and I know you’d want to help if you could see what I see:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98806385/517875001/793841832?contactdata=RqmM2J4vt4F4UdXN/PLTyFptB4nDwCcAZWpUA/aarWV+EEtfU/WN2Og9zhWCOg1g/3GFZXMYzbpdceDCeVmPG0fUSVpJjmdpsIXm7L92ak9uzL0PRPdlD7bl4SdjINqF68qtJq8bWz6TU34dJCyTh94I8fqSVT3k9gpLBL5Kekc=&ms=YE24_EM1_Img1&sourceid=1165968&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNGNhYjUxLTA0YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QuTuey1qd6Zo8xd1HlELCMnRk4_OxLnOVzFPG5xccrQ=&emci=9f6c611e-a3b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=914cab51-04bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1504551)
**If you give before December 31st your gift will have[double the impact](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98806386/517875002/793841832?contactdata=RqmM2J4vt4F4UdXN/PLTyFptB4nDwCcAZWpUA/aarWV+EEtfU/WN2Og9zhWCOg1g/3GFZXMYzbpdceDCeVmPG0fUSVpJjmdpsIXm7L92ak9uzL0PRPdlD7bl4SdjINqF68qtJq8bWz6TU34dJCyTh94I8fqSVT3k9gpLBL5Kekc=&ms=YE24_EM1_Link1&sourceid=1165968&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNGNhYjUxLTA0YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QuTuey1qd6Zo8xd1HlELCMnRk4_OxLnOVzFPG5xccrQ=&emci=9f6c611e-a3b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=914cab51-04bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1504551).** [ Give Now ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98806387/517875003/793841832?contactdata=RqmM2J4vt4F4UdXN/PLTyFptB4nDwCcAZWpUA/aarWV+EEtfU/WN2Og9zhWCOg1g/3GFZXMYzbpdceDCeVmPG0fUSVpJjmdpsIXm7L92ak9uzL0PRPdlD7bl4SdjINqF68qtJq8bWz6TU34dJCyTh94I8fqSVT3k9gpLBL5Kekc=&ms=YE24_EM1_Button1&sourceid=1165968&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNGNhYjUxLTA0YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QuTuey1qd6Zo8xd1HlELCMnRk4_OxLnOVzFPG5xccrQ=&emci=9f6c611e-a3b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=914cab51-04bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1504551)
---
As a red-tailed hawk riding the thermals, my eyes are trained on the golden grasslands, seeking Sonoma tree voles and rabbits among the rich ecosystem that calls this land home.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98806388/517875004/793841832?contactdata=RqmM2J4vt4F4UdXN/PLTyFptB4nDwCcAZWpUA/aarWV+EEtfU/WN2Og9zhWCOg1g/3GFZXMYzbpdceDCeVmPG0fUSVpJjmdpsIXm7L92ak9uzL0PRPdlD7bl4SdjINqF68qtJq8bWz6TU34dJCyTh94I8fqSVT3k9gpLBL5Kekc=&ms=YE24_EM1_Img2&sourceid=1165968&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNGNhYjUxLTA0YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QuTuey1qd6Zo8xd1HlELCMnRk4_OxLnOVzFPG5xccrQ=&emci=9f6c611e-a3b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=914cab51-04bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1504551)
Flying alongside me, you might find your gaze drawn toward the infinite horizon, the glittering Pacific crashing against the California coastline. You might notice historic Fort Ross to the north and Jenner, Bodega Bay, and Point Reyes to the south.
**This place is worth saving:[Will you swoop in with a matched gift to protect Sonoma Coast Redwoods?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98806389/517875005/793841832?contactdata=RqmM2J4vt4F4UdXN/PLTyFptB4nDwCcAZWpUA/aarWV+EEtfU/WN2Og9zhWCOg1g/3GFZXMYzbpdceDCeVmPG0fUSVpJjmdpsIXm7L92ak9uzL0PRPdlD7bl4SdjINqF68qtJq8bWz6TU34dJCyTh94I8fqSVT3k9gpLBL5Kekc=&ms=YE24_EM1_Link1&sourceid=1165968&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxNGNhYjUxLTA0YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QuTuey1qd6Zo8xd1HlELCMnRk4_OxLnOVzFPG5xccrQ=&emci=9f6c611e-a3b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=914cab51-04bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1504551)**
I love to build my nest in the majestic crown of an old-growth giants. The redwood saplings growing strong below the canopy will offer nesting spots for future generations of raptors like me.

clean_body: Take flight with me Peter, I’m a red-tailed hawk here with an invitation: Will you fly with me above Sonoma Coast Redwoods? My friends at Save the Redwoods League are working hard to raise the remaining funds needed to purchase and protect Sonoma Coast Redwoods, and I know you’d want to help if you could see what I see: If you give before December 31st your gift will have. As a red-tailed hawk riding the thermals, my eyes are trained on the golden grasslands, seeking Sonoma tree voles and rabbits among the rich ecosystem that calls this land home. Flying alongside me, you might find your gaze drawn toward the infinite horizon, the glittering Pacific crashing against the California coastline. You might notice historic Fort Ross to the north and Jenner, Bodega Bay, and Point Reyes to the south. This place is worth saving: I love to build my nest in the majestic crown of an old-growth giants. The redwood saplings growing strong below the canopy will offer nesting spots for future generations of raptors like me. When you donate to save Sonoma Coast Redwoods, you protect wildlife like me and preserve a magical place for redwood lovers like you. I hope you’ll visit one day. When you do, listen for my call – I’ll be saying “thank you” from the skies. Your feathery friend, | A red-tailed hawk (a Sonoma Coast local) ---|--- Photos by Justin Lewis, Coldwater Collective | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States tel:415-362-2352 | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- |

name: Patty Murray
subject: re: RFK Jr.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Confirming RFK Jr. as HHS secretary would be nothing short of a disaster for the health of millions of families, so I need your help.
| | |
---
[**Peter, I need your signature to oppose Donald Trump’s nomination of Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as HHS secretary. Will you add your name now and then let me explain?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98806595/517875725/1694327885?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk419-ot-nd&recurring=0&refcode=jtk419-su-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY0NzRiZC0wNWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q8OUmun7o4bOm15aCQgQF5PJY6KOMGongFzr0twTxmk=&emci=57316f3c-c0a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=086474bd-05bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=13116610)
| | [SIGN NOW: Reject RFK Jr.’s Nomination as HHS Secretary](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98806596/517875726/1694327885?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk419-ot-nd&recurring=0&code=jtk419-su-fl&refcode=jtk419-su-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY0NzRiZC0wNWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q8OUmun7o4bOm15aCQgQF5PJY6KOMGongFzr0twTxmk=&emci=57316f3c-c0a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=086474bd-05bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=13116610)
---
Donald Trump campaigned on grievance and revenge, so no one should be surprised that he is nominating dangerously unprepared and inexperienced candidates whose top qualification seems to be their loyalty to Trump above all else – and his selection of RFK Jr. is a stark example.
RFK Jr. is a notorious anti-vaxxer and fringe conspiracy theorist. As head of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), there’s no telling how far he could set America back in terms of public health, reproductive rights, research and innovation, and so much more.
The consequences here are not theoretical or superficial – health care access, coverage, research, and public health are life or death issues for people. The last time Donald Trump was president, he sent the uninsured rate skyrocketing and quite possibly did irreparable damage to trust in public health – and he has made clear he plans to do much worse in a second term, no matter the consequences.
**[I will speak out and vote against every Trump nominee who I believe to be unfit for the job – but I need your help. Will you sign my petition in opposition to RFK Jr.’s nomination?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98806597/517875727/1694327885?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk419-ot-nd&recurring=0&refcode=jtk419-su-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY0NzRiZC0wNWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q8OUmun7o4bOm15aCQgQF5PJY6KOMGongFzr0twTxmk=&emci=57316f3c-c0a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=086474bd-05bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=13116610)**

clean_body: Confirming RFK Jr. as HHS secretary would be nothing short of a disaster for the health of millions of families, so I need your help. | | | | | Donald Trump campaigned on grievance and revenge, so no one should be surprised that he is nominating dangerously unprepared and inexperienced candidates whose top qualification seems to be their loyalty to Trump above all else – and his selection of RFK Jr. is a stark example. RFK Jr. is a notorious anti-vaxxer and fringe conspiracy theorist. As head of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), there’s no telling how far he could set America back in terms of public health, reproductive rights, research and innovation, and so much more. The consequences here are not theoretical or superficial – health care access, coverage, research, and public health are life or death issues for people. The last time Donald Trump was president, he sent the uninsured rate skyrocketing and quite possibly did irreparable damage to trust in public health – and he has made clear he plans to do much worse in a second term, no matter the consequences. | | Thanks for standing with me, Patty Murray | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: From San Diego to Siskiyou, Adam is committed to being a Senator for all Californians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8219%2E5257348%2EN-zntt)
Derek,
Last week, Adam was sworn in as California’s United States Senator.
As he said on the campaign trail, he’s going to work tirelessly to be a Senator for _all_ Californians — whether you live in the Central Valley, in one of our state’s bustling cities, in our beautiful far north, the Imperial Valley, or anywhere in between.
Over and over again, Adam asked this one question to the Californians he met on the trail:
_"If I’m lucky enough to get this job, what can I do to help?"_
Thanks to your support, he’s getting right to work to deliver for the people of the Golden State.
**[Adam published a guest op-ed in the _Salinas Valley Tribune_ on Day One of his Senate term — read the piece here to learn about his priorities. ](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5005?t=4&akid=8219%2E5257348%2EN-zntt)**
[READ THE OP-ED](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5005?t=5&akid=8219%2E5257348%2EN-zntt)
---
We are so grateful for your support, Derek. Adam would not be in the position to help Californians up and down the state without your belief in his vision and your willingness to stand alongside him through thick and thin.
Thank you!
— Team Schiff

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: We’ve been overlooked for too long
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I’m excited to announce that I’m running for Congress here in New York’s 21st District.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98806903/517876511/634970978?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-12-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliNTY4OTFkLTA4YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oUy4COYTZlbJR5Gdi8sZhhVRhfkkxBv6O4TuiJJsuvc=)

Hi Peter, I’m Blake Gendebien

I’m a husband, father, dairy farmer, and business owner who was born and raised in the North Country.

**I’m excited to announce that I’m running for Congress here in New York’s 21st District.**

_**[Will you split $25 between my campaign and Fight for Progress today to help us kickstart our campaign and flip this seat in the special election?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98806904/517876512/634970978?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-12-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliNTY4OTFkLTA4YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oUy4COYTZlbJR5Gdi8sZhhVRhfkkxBv6O4TuiJJsuvc=)**_
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98806905/517876513/634970978?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-12-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliNTY4OTFkLTA4YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oUy4COYTZlbJR5Gdi8sZhhVRhfkkxBv6O4TuiJJsuvc=)
---
After serving in the Peace Corps, my parents moved to the North Country and started a dairy farm. I grew up working on the farm, earned a degree in agriculture, and later worked for a farm equipment manufacturer. For the past 22 years, with my family, I have owned and operated Twin Mill Farms, which currently has over 1,000 acres of land, 500 cows, and 12 employees.

Now, I’ve decided to run for Congress because the North Country is a national treasure and has been overlooked for far too long. It’s time for us to get the representation we deserve in Washington.

My experience as a farm owner, serving as Vice Chair on the Agri-Mark Board of Directors, and co-founding the Jules of Life Foundation – a nonprofit that assists patients and families battling cancer – has given me deep roots in our community.

**But this campaign isn’t about me; it’s about all of us.** It’s about all of the farmers, business owners, workers, families, teachers, coaches, and community members here in the North Country. I’m not running for Congress as a stepping stone to political power. I’m running because this is an opportunity to fight for the North Country, and I understand the challenges that folks here are facing.

[_**Will you split $25 between me and Fight for Progress today to join us?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98806906/517876514/634970978?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-12-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliNTY4OTFkLTA4YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oUy4COYTZlbJR5Gdi8sZhhVRhfkkxBv6O4TuiJJsuvc=)
